college_info.intro:
Sagar Institute of Science and Technology (SISTec) popular programmes are BTech, MBA, and MTech. BTech students can even opt for non-technical jobs in the future such as Social Media Specialist, Business Development Executive, or can take up relevant opportunities. MBA students can work in top companies that are invited to placement drives such as Amazon, Cognizant, and others.
While studying BTech or MTech, students will be taught important topics such as Natural Language Processing, Programming for Problem Solving, Python Programming, Augmented Reality & Virtual Reality, Deep Learning, Introduction to Data Science, Data Visualization, Data Structures and Algorithms, Database Management Systems, Object-Oriented Programming, and others. Below are some of the courses offered by Sagar Institute of Science and Technology (SISTec) and their respective eligibility and Sagar Institute of Science and Technology (SISTec) fees:

placements.overview: Sagar Institute of Science and Technology (SISTec) offers placement assistance to students. The number of placement opportunities created for Engineering branches such as CSE, ECE and Mechanical in 2025 was 65, 30 and 30, respectively. More than 1,150 offers for the batch 2024 were made in the previous year. The college also provides 100% internships to students. The highest and average package offered during SISTec placements 2024 was INR 20 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA, respectively. At the UG level, the college offers BTech in several specialisations such as Electrical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. At the PG level, the college offers MTech, MBA, and other courses to students. MTech is provided in specialisations such as Machine Design, Thermal Power & Engineering, and others. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: SISTEC - Good faculty, average placements, average infra, overall good ROI.

review_content.Placements: In Computer Science, almost 50-60% students are placed. The highest package last year was 20 LPA, and the lowest was 2.6 LPA. The average package lies around 4.5-5 LPA for the tech branch, and for other core branches it lies around 3.5-4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. Cisco also used to visit campus, but hardly 1 or 2 make it to crack. On campus, no paid internship is provided, only an unpaid summer internship is available in local industries. It's up to students to crack off-campus internships. The top roles offered are software trainee and assistant software engineer.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, my campus's faculty members are all so good.

review_content.Placements: I'm a fresher at my college and in batch 2025-26. So far, 50 companies have come and are still in the process of applying for both jobs and internships. More companies will arrive soon, and 20 students have been hired so far. The company's highest package so far is 20 LPA, and the medium package at my college has been 6 LPA paid till now.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is literally really clean, and the hostel rooms are also good.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very humble, kind, and they are all who completed their master's degree, and some have job experience. They teach us about our university subject, and also they take our classes from 1st year for CRT aptitude, and also help us to improve our English communication, build confidence, and build our body language, so they take our other sessions for all these kinds of extracurricular activities, so with the academics we are also learn how we have to live. The faculty here is very good. The behaviour of our faculty is too good, and they also help us in every situation. Whenever we need help, they definitely help us, and actually, they are so humble.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Emerging engineers at SISTec.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students in the 2024 batch secured placements. The highest package is 24 LPA offered by IBridge. The overall average for the larger SISTec group for 2024 was 4.75 LPA. 80 percnet students got internships in 2024. TCS, Wipro and Cisco are among the top recruiting companies. Roles like software engineer, data analyst, and front end developer are offered. Placement details sometimes refer to the broader SISTec group. Always verify information directly with the institution for precise batch and course data. Placement-focused training also begins in the first semester to equip students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good campus, but need better placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70 percent of students get placed, with packages ranging from 3 LPA to 10 LPA. The average package is 4-5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Capgemini and Bosch. Around 50 percent get internships in core and IT firms with roles like embedded engineer, network engineer and software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: ECE at SISTEC has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. The hostel offers clean rooms, decent food in the mess, and a canteen. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports facilities include cricket, basketball and indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Last year 75% of students got good placements in good companies.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got placements who worked hard for their dreams. The highest package is 20 LPA which is offered by Cisco. The average package is 3.4 LPA. Top companies are TCS, Wipro, and Cisco. 75% of students got internships in TCS, Wipro, and many more companies. Top roles are software engineer, data analyst, and front-end developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are big and good. They have a good environment. Wi-Fi is also available in the library for learning. Labs are available for practising the experiments. The hostel environment is also good in terms of cleanliness and health. The mess has a very clean environment. The food is very tasty.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college structure is good. There is a big ground and pool.

review_content.Placements: It totally depends on our skills. If our skills are good then we can get placed easily. There are also internships. The main language may be C or C+. The minimum package offered ranges from 2-3 LPA and the highest package offered ranges from 12-20 LPA. 50-60% of students get internships. Companies that visit the campus are TCS, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department is good and clean. There is a net problem. Classrooms are very nice and furnished. The library is well-managed.

admission_overview.college_name: Sagar Institute of Science and Technology (SISTec) Courses Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility and Last Dates

paragraphs: SISTec admission 2025 is open for all the courses. The institute offers various UG and PG courses.Sagar Institute of Science and Technologyconducts an online mode of application. Admission to the college is mainlymerit-based.However, for BTech course, the college accepts a valid score ofJEE Main, followed by counselling. The institute offers all UG and PG courses within the affiliation ofBarkatullah UniversityandRGPV. All the information related to Sagar Institute of Science and Technology admission (SISTec), along with course eligibility and selection criteria, is available in the given sections:

At Sagar Institute of Science and Technology, admission is both merit-based and entrance-based, followed by a state-level counselling process. Applicants looking for admission to any course are required to meet the basic course requirements before applying for the programme. Tabulated below areSISTec courseeligibility and selection criteria for SISTec Bhopal course admission 2024:

Sagar Institute of Science and Technology admissions are ongoing for all the courses. The admissions process starts with an online application process, followed by selection rounds and a counselling process. Candidates looking for admission can check the following steps for a detailedSISTec Bhopal admission process 2024:
Step 1: SISTec Application Process
Sagar Institute of Science and Technology conducts an online mode of application. Interested candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to apply for their desired programme.
Step 2: SISTec Selection Criteria

Sagar Institute of Science and Technology admissions are both merit-based and entrance-based. For some UG and PG courses such as MBA, MTech and MBA, the college offers direct admission based on their past qualifying exam. However, for UG courses, i.e., BTech, candidates are required to qualify for JEE Main exam with a valid score.
Step 3: SISTec Counselling Process

The candidates who get selected in the selection round are required to register for DTE counselling process for the final seat allotment. While applying for the counselling process, candidates must fill in their course or college choice in the form.
Step 4: Release of Merit List

After completing the counselling process, the final list of the shortlisted candidates is released on the official website of SISTec Bhopal. The list is prepared after assessing candidates' performance and records.
Step 5: Document Verification

At last, the shortlisted candidates are required to submit the required original documents for verification. Further, candidates are required to pay SISTec course fee and complete other admission formalities to confirm their seats.

faqs.answer: To be eligible for admission to BTech, candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board with a 45% aggregate. faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Sagar Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for a full-time MBA program at Sagar Institute of Science and Technology is INR 1.3 lakhs spread over two years. Additionally, the candidate will also have to pay INR 1.64 lakhs as a hostel fee. So, the total fee is INR 2.94 lakhs. It has 180 spots available for MBA admission.

After meeting the eligibility criteria candidates are required to appear for a counselling round conducted by DTH Bhopal. After fulfilling the admission criteria, candidates must simply apply online on the official website of the institute

description: What's new at Sagar Institute of Science & Technology cutoff 2023? JEE Main 2024 registration is ongoing for the academic year 2024-25. Candidates seeking admission to Sagar Institute of Science & Technology must register online. JEE Main exam 2024 is scheduled to be held on Jan 24, 2023 to Feb 01, 2023. Following the previous year's schedule, Sagar Institute of Science & Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 will start releasing the round-wise cutoff lists tentatively in the month of Jan.

SISTEC - Sagar Institute of Science and Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 685199 and 1470368 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 685199, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 1245937.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 685199.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the SISTEC - Sagar Institute of Science and Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security), with last-round closing ranks of 685199, 1264873, and 1370360, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: SISTEC - Good faculty, average placements, average infra, overall good ROI.
reviews.review_text: College is just 12 acres. Labs for all the departments, like the computer lab, physics lab, etc., are there, but they have limited and old resources only. A central library is there with a seating capacity of a maximum of 50 students, and books relevant to the college curriculum are available there. Classrooms have whiteboards. I am not a hosteler, but my friends told me that the mess food is below average, sometimes it's too bad, and I have visited hostel rooms, which are just okay for students...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, my campus's faculty members are all so good.
reviews.review_text: The college is literally really clean, and the hostel rooms are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Emerging engineers at SISTec.
reviews.review_text: SISTec Gandhi Nagar offers robust infrastructure. It features well-equipped labs, spacious smart classrooms, a comprehensive library with extensive resources, and Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, including hostels. Hostel facilities are considered good, with furnished rooms, 24/7 water, electricity, and security. The mess serves vegetarian food, sometimes with specific dietary restrictions (e.g., no onion/garlic). A well-maintained canteen also serves a variety of cuisines. Medical faciliti...

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, but need better placements.
reviews.review_text: ECE at SISTEC has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. The hostel offers clean rooms, decent food in the mess, and a canteen. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports facilities include cricket, basketball and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Last year 75% of students got good placements in good companies.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are big and good. They have a good environment. Wi-Fi is also available in the library for learning. Labs are available for practising the experiments. The hostel environment is also good in terms of cleanliness and health. The mess has a very clean environment. The food is very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: The college structure is good. There is a big ground and pool.
reviews.review_text: The department is good and clean. There is a net problem. Classrooms are very nice and furnished. The library is well-managed.

reviews.review_heading: Environment is neat and clean.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well maintained. Classrooms are also well-maintained. There are a wide range of collections of books available for students to read. Wi-Fi facility is also available in library. Wi-Fi is available in hostel 24/7. The quality of food in mess and canteen is also nice. Badminton, cricket, volleyball, and swimming are played here.

reviews.review_heading: My life at SISTEC MBA. Great campus and knowledgeable faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are at par. We have computer labs. For each student, a dedicated system is available. The library has all the necessary required books, which can be issued for the whole semester Our classrooms have a proper AV system for lectures. The college has Wi-Fi. The speed is slow. The canteen food is good. I am a day scholar, so did not opt for the hostel. The mess and sports facilities need to be worked on as they are not properly available for day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good. Teachers are also good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in my course. Classrooms are good and libraries are good. The hostel quality is normal or average. The hostel food is below average, and medical facilities are normal. Sports and games are good. The ragging is banned in the college. Hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of their fake promises.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good. The college infrastructure is just below average. The campus is very small. Medical facilities are very poor. There is zero sports culture, and if you are a sports enthusiast then do not join this college. It has the worst mess ever, and students can just survive on that type of food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, from my point of view.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Many courses are available in SISTEC like in CS there is CSE, and in specialty courses, there are AIDS, CS-IT, and CS cyber security. There are good facilities for sports and games. I cannot say about the hostel as I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: It offers good infrastructure, supportive faculty, curriculum, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our faculty members are very good in terms of behavior and teaching skills. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a big library. We have labs for each department. In hotels, there is good quality of food and building structures. Regular housekeeping services are provided to ensure cleanliness in common areas and rooms.

reviews.review_heading: The main thing is the quality of knowledge, which is well done and given by faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for my course are very good. The labs, classrooms, and library are good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also good. There is a library where we can study very peacefully and choose books to study, and labs are available for students when they want to use them.

reviews.review_heading: Sagar Institute of Science, Technology & Engineering is decent institute in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The institute's infrastructure is too good. The SISTec campus has a very neat and clean environment. It has a good environment, along with facilities like a swimming pool, a canteen, and mess facilities for the students. There is a spacious open-air amphitheater with ample seating space in the form of adjoining steps, a central point of attraction for the students that allows the audience to enjoy vibrant performances amidst the natural light. It provides a superb display in an open-air hall. A ...

reviews.review_heading: Everything you need to know about SISTec.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is average. Classrooms are big enough to study, and fully air-conditioned labs are provided to us. Books are not sufficient in the library. Spacious hostels are provided, and mess food is average. Also, we get sports lectures twice a month.

highlights.summary:
JEE Main 2025 Session 2 Results are out. Candidates can log in to check and download their results from jeemain.nta.ac.in.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: For more information about Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering for Women check out the below video:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Courses offered by Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering for Women include UG and PG level programmes in Engineering. The college offers three specialisations in BTech and one in MTech, both of which are conducted on a full-time basis. BTech courses at BVCOEW are completed in four years. However, candidates with a diploma in Engineering and Technology are directly promoted to the second year of the BTech programme (lateral entry). Likewise, MTech programme is concluded in two years. All of these programmes include internship opportunities, scheduled visits, guest lectures, and faculty development programmes, among other academic activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college, campus, and placements. Nice suggestion.

review_content.Placements: BVCOEW provides plenty of placement opportunities for students. Above 85% of students are placed every year from every branch. The average package is 6 Lacs p.a. Top companies that recruit students are Persistent, TCS, Cognizant, Atos, VOIS, etc. All the students of the 3rd year are provided with internship opportunities in different companies including Persistent and Cognizant.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has all the essential facilities including clean toilets on every floor, comfortable desks for students, smartboards in every classroom, all machinery and tools needed in laboratories and computer labs. Students also have two libraries to issue books and a reading hall which stays open till the evening. The college consists of a canteen which provides food at any college hour. The quality of food is good in the canteen and hostel mess. Hostels also have all the facilities- Wi-Fi, hygienic washrooms, maids, proper security, and three meals a day. Proper security is taken in the hostel by having 3 watchmen and face recognition for hostel entry. Also, the campus contains a huge ground to play a variety of sports including cricket, volleyball, basketball, and other sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the placement team and their efforts.

review_content.Placements: About 98% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Thoughtworks, Amazon, IDFY, Neilsoniq, etc. Almost 50% of students got internships on their own. The college does not provide internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is fine. Labs and classrooms are well maintained, but there is no Wi-Fi. Students have to bring their own devices. Classrooms are denied access to digital facilities like projectors. The campus is green and lush, but the college is not worth it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with good placements offered by the college.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

answer.text: COEP TECH fee range for various courses lies between INR 74,000 - 3,00,000. COEP offers a variety of courses B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, etc. For B.Tech the institute charges INR 75,000 and for M.Tech fee range is INR 74,000 - 1.4 Lakh.Bharati Vidyapeeth's fee range for various courses lies between INR 2,20,00 - 4,30,000. The institute offers only B.Tech and M.Tech courses. For B.Tech the institute charges INR 3.2 Lakhs - 4.3 Lakhs and for M.Tech fee range is INR 2.2 Lakhs.On comparison, Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering for Women is more expensive than COEP Tech.

overview_faqs.question: How is life at Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering for Women?
overview_faqs.answer: In this college, teachers help in solving doubts and also support participation in other things like dancing, speeches, sports, projects, etc. College is very strict; exams are taken twice a year. The placement ratio increases every year. There are so many events or festivals organized by the college, like technical quizzes, designing, bug finding, coding, robotics, etc. other than extra curricular activities related to sports also organise by college. Every year, a loan facility is available for students, and scholarships are provided by the college. In college, campus hostels are available, but they are quite expensive.

review_summary.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth Womens College of Engineering Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty.

content.Placements: Placements are average in our college, but most of the time, they won't support students in placement. I got an internship and placement at Vodafone Idea Limited for three months, so because of that, I am not able to go to college, but my name is on the defaulter list. This is the negative point of our college. One of our placement coordinators is the only person who is supportive of our placements. She is very good.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. Students thought that the food was good, but they were not able to eat. There is support for medical issues. There are no sports and games. There is no lab in our college. Wi-Fi is available in our hostel. PGs are better than the hostel. The hostel security is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty member, good placements in 2023-24, and facilities are good.

content.Placements: 60 to 70% of students have been placed in our batch until now. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA offered to the students. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Amdocs, Standard Chartered, TCS, and Capgemini. Some students get internships at IIT Roorkee, NIH, Oracle, Capgemini, and other companies. Software engineer, Devops engineer, data analyst, data scientist, front-end developer, and back-end developer are the roles offered for students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities given by college are water purifier, sports fields, labs, big classrooms with smart TVS with connected wi-fi, etc. The hostel facilities are also good; the mess provides healthy food on time, RO-purified water, and a breathable garden in front of the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college, campus, and placements. Nice suggestion.

content.Placements: BVCOEW provides plenty of placement opportunities for students. Above 85% of students are placed every year from every branch. The average package is 6 Lacs p.a. Top companies that recruit students are Persistent, TCS, Cognizant, Atos, VOIS, etc. All the students of the 3rd year are provided with internship opportunities in different companies including Persistent and Cognizant.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all the essential facilities including clean toilets on every floor, comfortable desks for students, smartboards in every classroom, all machinery and tools needed in laboratories and computer labs. Students also have two libraries to issue books and a reading hall which stays open till the evening. The college consists of a canteen which provides food at any college hour. The quality of food is good in the canteen and hostel mess. Hostels also have all the facilities- Wi-Fi, hygienic washrooms, maids, proper security, and three meals a day. Proper security is taken in the hostel by having 3 watchmen and face recognition for hostel entry. Also, the campus contains a huge ground to play a variety of sports including cricket, volleyball, basketball, and other sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the placement team and their efforts.

content.Placements: About 98% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Thoughtworks, Amazon, IDFY, Neilsoniq, etc. Almost 50% of students got internships on their own. The college does not provide internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is fine. Labs and classrooms are well maintained, but there is no Wi-Fi. Students have to bring their own devices. Classrooms are denied access to digital facilities like projectors. The campus is green and lush, but the college is not worth it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with good placements offered by the college.

content.Placements: Our college is good placement-wise. Many big companies offer thousands of jobs per year. Campus placement occurs per year. Overall, it is a good college and has a good campus. College offers good training for placements. So it is very beneficial for students to get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel is average because it doesn't have separate washroom for each room. Otherwise, it is good. The mess of the college hostel is also good. The food served is healthy and tasty. Strictness is provided for girls. Security-wise, it is also good. So overall, the hostel is good.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

The top recruiters in 2023 included Thought Works, Nielsen IQ, Capgemini and Accenture.

For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 98332 and 135859 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 98332, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms are well furnished and airy 
In every classroom their is projector facility
Labs are well maintained and every needed instruments are available. In hostel facilities are good 
There are two type of mess:-Maharashtra and south Indian. And main thing is, their is special hospital for bharati Vidyapeeth so no tension about medical emergency. And in college, sports weak is in January 1st weak.

reviews.review_heading: Review about engineering College in Pune I. e BVCOEW.
reviews.review_text:
College has the best infrastructure. College has 4 floor. 
4th floor is for Allied engineering department,  3rd floor is for Entc department,  2nd floor is for Comp and IT engineering department and 1st floor is for library and administrative department. There is enough ventilation in classrooms and labs. Wi-Fi facility is available on each floor. There is a gym facility for all girls students. There is free sanitary napkin machine available for girls students. College has very good parking faci...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2018-19 batch. Average faculty. Beautiful campus. Less facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has one main building, consisting of 5 floors. Each floor has around 7 to 10 classrooms and various labs. Computers and equipment in the laboratories are pretty good. Wi-Fi facility is provided, but very few students have a hint about it. One common library and some department libraries are also available here. No medical facilities are provided. Food available in the canteen is of pretty good quality. I don't know about the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with college facilities, infrastructure, placement and hostel facility provided
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is too good. Classrooms are big with projectors in each class to provide an actual view for each topic. Wi-Fi facilities, labs, library, and canteen are better. Hostel rooms are good and comfortable. Food provided is good. Outside the hostel there is a big open space full of greenery and a big playground of Bharati Vidyapeeth.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are helpful. Good placements in 2016. Good health, infrastructure and surrounding.
reviews.review_text: College labs are well designed. Proper ventilation is provided in the classrooms and labs. Requirements of the labs are always updated. Books in the library are always updated according to the newly updated syllabus. Canteen provides every food according to the requirements of students, hot as well as cold beverages are provided. Hostel rooms are clear, well ventilated and cleaned every day.

reviews.review_heading: A fully student oriented college by means of academics, as well as personality development.
reviews.review_text: There is a very proper infrastructure, and the ventilation is proper. The classrooms are well constructed, and source of light is natural and it is airy. Free Wi-Fi facility is also available. The labs are proper and full of the latest and well-maintained equipment. The gymkhana and canteen are the main attraction for students. The college campus is the centre of attraction, you must visit once.

reviews.review_heading: I loved my college. I got every kind of exposure here. The teachers were very supportive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average. They provide everything that a student needs. The Wi-Fi is not available for the students but all time NET connection is there for PCs students can access it anytime. We have a separate library, and every kind of book is available there. We have a canteen and a playground also. The college hostel provides room for 3 people including bills and food.

reviews.review_heading: Really good electronics and telecommunications staff.
reviews.review_text: In labs, all instruments and software are available, but they are not sufficient for all the students. The best thing is the library, as it's much big and all books and all project related stuff are available there. Canteen is the worst part, only pav-Bhaji is nice.Hostel rooms are small, and food quality is worst.The gym is open, but they will not allow using that. The medical facilities are not there, and this is the drawback. The Wi-Fi connection is not available. The sports ground is there, ...

college_info.intro: The popular programmes of Annamacharya University are BTech and MBA. To be eligible for the MBA programmes the aspiring candidates need a minimum of 50% in graduation.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Annamacharya University (Formerly known as AITS Rajampet) offers courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, BSc (Hons) Agriculture, MSc, MCA, etc. he university accepts scores of various state-level entrance exams for admission to respective courses such as EAPCET, ICET, PGCET, etc. However, Annamacharya University (AITS Rajampet) also conducts Annamacharya University Entrance Test (AUET) for the selection of candidates for a few courses, followed by a PI round. Moreover, applications for Formerly known as Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences, Rajampet university admission are submitted on the official website of the respective exams.

faqs.answer: A:    Annamacharya University accepts scores of various state-level entrance exams for admission to BTech, MBA, M.Tech and MCA courses. Candidates must apply and appear for the respective entrance exams in order to get admission to their desired programme. The university also conducts AUET exam for admission to BSc, BCA and BTech course. All the other state-level accepted entrance exams for admission are as follows:EAPCETPGECETICET

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: 200 students got placed in college from the campus drive. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are MNCs and top-level companies. 20 percent of students got internships through the campus drive. The role offered is a software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms, the library, and labs are good. Wi-Fi facility is good. The hostel facilities, like food and water, are not bad. The hostel fee is high. The canteen provides all items, and it's of high cost.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college, very helpful for students, very good jobs, etc.

review_content.Placements: Top companies are TCS, Accenture, and Wipro. The percentage of placed students is not revealed currently but following the previous trends it's expected to be about 70%. The highest package is about 23 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is too bad but there are no hostels on the campus. There is no hostel for boys even outside of the campus. But there is a girls' hostel just in front of the campus. The food is good, by the way. The hostel facility and safety are good. Not allowed to go out after 8:30 PM. Wi-Fi is very good in the hostel rather than on campus. It has good labs and good equipment. Our campus is eco-friendly. It is a very good college. There is a very big ground. We have a very big canteen. Our campus is very big, and near small villages and cities, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Annamacharya University (Formerly AITS, Rajampet) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college for students who want to enjoy B.Tech life and get placed in companies with below 8 LPA

content.Placements: The average is 50-70 percent of students are placed every year, with an average package of around 4-8 LPA, and occasional high packages are around 10-15 LPA, as per college records. Top companies like Infosys, TCS, Wipro, HCL, Emphasis, Accenture, and Basis are hiring on campus every year. And there is a chance of some startup placements. Most of the companies sponsor internships in the 8th semester, and based on the performance, they will continue them as a full-time employee. Most of the companies hire students as a software engineer trainee and an associate developer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Annamacharya university rajampet college infrastructure and smart classroom. Central library is good

content.Placements: 80 percent of students were joining B.Tech CSE. The highest package offered was 20 LPA, the lowest package offered was 9 LPA. The top role offered in my course CSE top recruitment team and students get good placements in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has hostel facilities, good food, proper infrastructure, smart classrooms, a central library, a canteen, and medical facilities. The playground is also good.
content.Faculty: Qualified teachers with good knowledge can help improve students knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 200 students got placed in college from the campus drive. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are MNCs and top-level companies. 20 percent of students got internships through the campus drive. The role offered is a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms, the library, and labs are good. Wi-Fi facility is good. The hostel facilities, like food and water, are not bad. The hostel fee is high. The canteen provides all items, and it's of high cost.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good college, very helpful for students, very good jobs, etc.

content.Placements: Top companies are TCS, Accenture, and Wipro. The percentage of placed students is not revealed currently but following the previous trends it's expected to be about 70%. The highest package is about 23 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is too bad but there are no hostels on the campus. There is no hostel for boys even outside of the campus. But there is a girls' hostel just in front of the campus. The food is good, by the way. The hostel facility and safety are good. Not allowed to go out after 8:30 PM. Wi-Fi is very good in the hostel rather than on campus. It has good labs and good equipment. Our campus is eco-friendly. It is a very good college. There is a very big ground. We have a very big canteen. Our campus is very big, and near small villages and cities, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It’s the best college for electrical and electronics engineering in Andhra Pradesh.

content.Placements: The best college in Andhra Pradesh to study electrical engineering. Teachers are very professional.
content.Infrastructure: There is a separate library for electrical students, so you can read more, and different projects are available to see, and you can create a project. Everything in the college is wonderful. The infrastructure is good, and the maintenance is very good. Food will be good, the same as home food, but the only drawback is that mobiles are not allowed. Definitely, you will feel comfortable; instead of mobiles, laptops are allowed. Wi-Fi is available, and it is too good. Wardens in the hostel care for it, and we can play many games in the lawn area.

admission_process.title: Annamacharya University (Formerly AITS, Rajampet) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Annamacharya University (Formerly known as AITS Rajampet) admissions 2025 are offered to various courses at UG and PG levels in the stream of Engineering, Management, Science, Computer Applications and Humanities. The offered courses areBTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, BSc (Hons) Agriculture, MSc, MCA, etc.

Annamacharya University (AITS Rajampet) admissions are completely entrance-based. The university accepts scores of various state-level entrance exams for admission to respective courses such asEAPCET, ICET, PGCET, etc. However,Annamacharya University (AITS Rajampet)also conductsAnnamacharya University Entrance Test (AUET)for the selection of candidates for a few courses, followed by a PI round. Moreover, applications forFormerly known as Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences, Rajampetuniversity admission are submitted on the official website of the respective exams. The university also offers scholarships to students of UG & PG courses. Candidates can avail of the scholarships by qualifying for AUET. More details aroundAnnamacharya University (AITS Rajampet) admission 2025are elaborated in the article below.

Annamacharya University courses are offered across multiple specialisation. The university offers primary weightage to the past academics of applicants. The selection process includes various parameters such as fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria, qualifying for entrance exams and other selection rounds. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for Annamacharya University course admission 2025:
Know more aboutAnnamacharya University courses

Admissions at Annamacharya University (Formerly known as AITS Rajampet) are completely entrance-based. The admission process begins by filling an online application form and proceeds with selection rounds and eventually ends with the counselling process. Check below the detailed steps for Annamacharya University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

Candidates seeking to apply for admission at Annamacharya University must apply for the entrance exams of the respective courses they are applying for. Aspirants can fill the online application form for AUET on the university's official website. However, for the remaining courses, candidates must apply on the official website of the respective entrance exams.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

After a successful online registration process, candidates must appear for the respective entrance exams accepted for admission to courses. The university shortlists students based on their past academic records and scores obtained in the respective state-level entrance exams. For admission to courses such as BSc, MSc, etc., candidates are offered admission through the university-levelAUET exam. For other courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA and MCA, candidates are shortlisted based onEAPCET, PGECET and ICET entrance exams. Further, candidates shortlisted via AUET scores are also called for aPI roundat Annamacharya University (AITS Rajampet).
Step 3: Counselling & Final Admission

At last, the selected candidates must appear for the counselling process. The final seat allotment is done through the counselling round. Candidates must pay a certain fee to confirm their seat at the university.

Here, hostel facilities are also available, and on our side of the college, we have many PGs and hostels to stay in. The food in the hostels is also better. That's it.

Good college for a sports person and good paramedics for emergencies.

review_summary.college_name: Techno Main Salt Lake Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Mostly satisfied with the college, decent placements, affordable, and average infrastructure.

content.Placements: In my department, the placement rate last year (2024) was 93 percent. I do not have official data, but the estimated average package is 6–7 LPA, and the highest package is 21 LPA. Most students are recruited by TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, etc., which are mass recruiting companies, but companies like Amazon and Deloitte also visit the campus. Mostly, placements in my department are for developer roles.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped and maintained. The college has 2 grounds and 3 buildings. The library could be better. Computer labs are good and equipped with ACs. Classrooms are well ventilated and have enough light. I have not opted for the hostel and live in a private PG. I cannot comment on the college hostel and mess food, but the college is tied up with a PG, which is generally known as the college hostel. I know facilities because my friends stay there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college campus. It is very small, even smaller than some of the schools.

content.Placements: My course is new for the college. I am in the 4th batch of this department so there is not much information about the placement scenario or this department. But some of the seniors say that the average placement from this college is about 4 LPA-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There are all the facilities in the college, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, and many more, except for a hostel. You will need to find a hostel/PG/flats on your own. Many events related to sports, education, and technology are organized in the college.

individual_reviews.title: It was not a good, not bad experience, average placement, but the infrastructure is great.

admission_process.title: Techno Main Salt Lake Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Techno Main Salt Lake offers admission to candidates in numerous courses. The admission process is conducted primarily online. Candidates have to register with the college by filling the application form. Candidates might be required to appear for an entrance exam, if applicable for the preferred course. The step-wise Techno Main Salt Lake admission process is given below:
Registration Process

Candidates must register with the college to apply for admission. Application forms for all the courses are available on the college's official website. If a candidate wants to apply offline, they can contact the admission office. The application form must be filled carefully before the last date.
Selection Criteria

After successfully registering with the college, the candidates are required to appear for an entrance exam if their preferred course requires. The entrance exams accepted by Techno Main Salt Lake include JEE Mains, WBJEE, MAT, etc. Candidates must score the required aggregate in these exams to take admission. While they can also be granted admission on the basis of merit of Class 12 or graduation, depending on the course-specific selection criteria.
Admission call and confirmation of seat

Once the exams have been conducted, and results are declared, candidates are selected on the basis of the merit of the exam or Class 12/graduation. If they clear all the criteria, they are selected and informed. To confirm their admission to the college, candidates must pay the tuition fee.
Fees and Seats

Techno Main Salt Lake fees includes several components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, mess charges, etc. The course fee differs with courses and course levels. The college offers a large no. of seats for a wide range of courses. Candidates who qualify for the selection process must pay the tuition fees to confirm their seat. Tabulated below are the Techno Main Salt Lake fees along with the seat intake for popular courses:

placement_data.title: Techno Main Salt Lake Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: As per the latest report, 948 students registered for the Techno Main Salt Lake placements 2023, of which 657 were placed in reputed companies. Techno Main Salt recorded a 69.30% placement rate in the academic year 2022-2023. The top regular recruiters of Techno Main Salt Lake include Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, Google, Bosch, TCS, IBM, Wipro, Capgemini, Accenture, L&T , etc.
Earlier, 907 students of the 2022 batch registered for the placements, of which 685 were placed with new-age job roles. Techno Main Salt Lake recorded 75.52% placements for the Class of 2022.

Talking about the branch-wise placements, a total of 141 CSE students registered for the Techno Main Salt Lake placements in 2023, of which 127 students were placed successfully. The institute recorded 90.07% placements for the CSE branch and 91% placements for the IT branch in 2023.

hostel_campus.college_name: Techno Main Salt Lake Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Mostly satisfied with the college, decent placements, affordable, and average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-equipped and maintained. The college has 2 grounds and 3 buildings. The library could be better. Computer labs are good and equipped with ACs. Classrooms are well ventilated and have enough light. I have not opted for the hostel and live in a private PG. I cannot comment on the college hostel and mess food, but the college is tied up with a PG, which is generally known as the college hostel. I know facilities because my friends stay there.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college campus. It is very small, even smaller than some of the schools.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities in the college, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, and many more, except for a hostel. You will need to find a hostel/PG/flats on your own. Many events related to sports, education, and technology are organized in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Techno Main College Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available for students at all times. Classrooms are clean. Labs are well maintained. The canteen is small but good, and there are two canteens available. Sports facilities are good. Many clubs are present.

reviews.review_heading: I hope that college will help you get your dream placement. Records are really great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good in the college. All the equipment are good to go. The Whole campus area is great, and the Rooms are Air Conditioned. College does not itself provide any Hostel Facility. You have to take PGs or a hostel yourself. Its slightly tough and costly to get PG or hostel just in that nearby area.

reviews.review_heading: It was not a good, not bad experience, average placement, but the infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, at least, Wi-Fi speed is nice, some classroom has AC. I never stayed in a hostel, so I don't know much about it, but some of my friends stay in a hostel, so they said that the ambience is great, the food quality is average, but edible, not like other college hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Quality of education and events.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is not available in this college. The infrastructure is good, lab facilities and libraries are well developed with Wi-Fi and air conditioning. However, there is less space available in the library, only 50 students can sit in the library at a time.

reviews.review_heading: For a better future, improvement, and life.
reviews.review_text: One of the best labs and classrooms with air conditioning. Campus features a lot of development for our betterment, as well as the advancement of the spacious rooms really catches attention. A sense of hostility is one that you will experience during the course of study.

reviews.review_heading: One of the top 3 private institutions in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there are total 9th floors and lift facilities are available. On each floor, there are Wi-Fi facilities as well. Every department has its own departmental library as there is a common library for all the students. There are well-facilitated labs for every department. My college does not have hostel facilities. But it has two to three canteens, and there are a lot of things available in the canteen. Other facilities such as medical and sports are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The value of education in terms of money taken by the college is absolutely not upto the mark.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not at all good in our college. The rooms are quite small and very less benches are present in a particular room. There are no ACs in normal room, although the fee of the college is so high. The playground of the college is never maintained and is not suitable for playing.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are very good. The campus life is good. Qualified teachers are present.
reviews.review_text: Basically, in our course, we have Wi-Fi and a library. Our lab facility is also good. Many computers are available in our lab. We have favorable facilities in our college. Many classrooms have digital boards, a projector, and whiteboards. The hostel has very good and hygienic rooms. The hostel food is very hygienic. The hostel has Wi-Fi facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is better than government colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good; there are 6 big labs under the IT department. The labs are for DBMS, CAN, OS, Python, programming, and one is for examination purposes. Everything is well facilitated, and all the labs are clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus environment at our college.
reviews.review_text: There was full Wi-Fi in our college. Many labs and classrooms were available. We had total 2 buildings in our college, one for B.Tech and one for non-B.Tech. Every building had Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and faculty rooms. We had 2 grounds to play and for mind refreshment also.

reviews.review_heading: A great place to pursue BCA with experienced faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with all the essential facilities such as Wi-fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-maintained library. The labs are updated with systems and tools. Although the college doesn't provide on-campus hostel accommodation for all students, there are several PG options available nearby. These PGs are safe, affordable, and mostly within walking distance from the college. The college also encourages sports, and there are areas for recreation and cultural even...

reviews.review_heading: Best placement in 2025 and the best in the past six years.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good but have poor Wi-Fi. The library is small but useful. The canteen is average. There is no on-campus hostel, which is why I am not satisfied. The infrastructure is okay but not very big. Medical and sports facilities need improvement. Overall, facilities are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good for our courses. Wi-Fi labs are available. There is a good atmosphere in the classroom. There is no hostel facility in this college.

college_info.intro:
Shiv Nadar University Greater Noida popular programmes are BTech, BSc, & MBA. BTech students can become Computer Science Engineers, Mining Engineers, Aeronautical Engineers, etc. Students can choose from multiple university-wide electives. The Shiv Nadar University Greater Noida Uttar Pradesh course curriculum is multidisciplinary. SNU Greater Noida students are free to select the opportunities for Undergraduate (UG) Research programme which enables the students to undertake various research projects in any discipline.
Shiv Nadar University's MBA students can become Business Operations Managers, Marketing Managers, Operations Research Analysts, and Management Analysts. The SNU MBA students are placed in top companies like Cognizant, Adobe, Bosch, etc. In the past, the MBA course students have received INR 10.04 LPA as average package.
Check the below video to know the detailed review of SNU BTech:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure and faculty are good. Overall, it is a good experience with everything.

review_content.Placements: About 73% of students get placed this year. The rest take up higher studies. The average package stands at around 9.5 LPA for students studying ECE (Electrical and Computer Engineering). The highest average is around 12 LPA for Computer majors and around 11 LPA for Business Management students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned 24/7. The libraries are open for an adequate amount of time for everyone to access. Hostel rooms are good, but some issues are not fixed with immediate action. Network issues are found in some places, but overall, Wi-Fi has good coverage everywhere. Medical facilities are really bad, even for the slightest issues, we are asked to go to a specialty hospital outside. The sports infrastructure is good. Canteen food can be made better, and slight improvements are being seen now.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A solid foundation for engineering students with world class facilities.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students got placed from my course this year. The highest package is 45 LPA, the lowest is 7 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are NVIDIA, Google, Microsoft, Qualcomm India, Samsung, etc. Most of the students about 85% got internships in companies like Wipro, HCL, Qualcomm India, Google, etc. The top roles that are offered are electrical engineer, software developer, design engineer, analog design engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus offers fully Wi-Fi and AC-equipped classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are excellent with hygienic food in the mess. Medical care is available in the campus. Sports and games are well-supported with proper facilities and trained coaches.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee structure of MBA in Shiv Nadar University?
course_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SNU Noida MBA ranges between INR 5 lakh and INR 11 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The fee range includes Online MBA and regular MBA fee. Admission fee, security deposit, annual tuition fee are the components of SNU fee structure. Besides, students wishing to stay in hostel have to pay an annual living fee. The living fee includes cost of hostel mess, laundary and medical insurance.

course_faqs.answer: SNU offers financial aids and scholarships to meritoriours students as part of encouragement to hardworking but financially weak students. A 100% tuition fee waiver is offered to applicants who have scored 90 percentile or more in CAT examination and meet the cutoff in the interview assessment. Also, there is provision of upto 100% scholarship for selected individuals on merit-cum-means-basis.

review_summary.college_name: SNU Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: There is really good infrastructure and facilities at SNU.

content.Placements: The placement process is going on right now. Placements are average as the student count is low. Top recruiting companies for our course are HCL, Microsoft, Adobe, HPE, etc. The top role offered is SDE. 30-40 percent of students get internships from companies like Adobe and Microsoft. Other roles offered are data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are top-notch, as compared to other colleges. The hostel experience is very good as hot water is provided. A pantry is also available. Wi-Fi is present all over the campus, which works excellently. The quality of food is excellent and is affordable. Apart from the mess, there are various other food stalls.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) Global - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a very good campus and infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are 100% placements, but companies are not coming up with a good package. Very few known and big companies visit the college for placements. For internships, there are no good companies, as some are even fraudulent, and they state something and make us do fundraising or sales. Companies that visit the college are not good.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms provided are very good. Especially MBA or master's students have personal rooms. There are AC rooms in all weather situations. The food is also good. There are both indoor and outdoor sports. For medical emergencies, there is a healthcare centre on campus. The campus also has its own incubation centre.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and faculty are good. Overall, it is a good experience with everything.

The highest average is around 12 LPA for Computer majors and around 11 LPA for Business Management students.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned 24/7. The libraries are open for an adequate amount of time for everyone to access. Hostel rooms are good, but some issues are not fixed with immediate action. Network issues are found in some places, but overall, Wi-Fi has good coverage everywhere. Medical facilities are really bad, even for the slightest issues, we are asked to go to a specialty hospital outside. The sports infrastructure is good. Canteen food can be made better, and slight improvements are being seen now.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed from my course this year. The highest package is 45 LPA, the lowest is 7 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are NVIDIA, Google, Microsoft, Qualcomm India, Samsung, etc. Most of the students about 85% got internships in companies like Wipro, HCL, Qualcomm India, Google, etc. The top roles that are offered are electrical engineer, software developer, design engineer, analog design engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The campus offers fully Wi-Fi and AC-equipped classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are excellent with hygienic food in the mess. Medical care is available in the campus. Sports and games are well-supported with proper facilities and trained coaches.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is best to enjoy your college life in a friendly environment.

content.Placements: Most students from the passed-out batch are placed, mainly around 90 percent. The highest package is 28 LPA, the lowest package is 6 LPA, and the average package is around 10 or 11 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Intel, Nvidia, Samsung, HCL, and many more. About 70 percent of students got internships from my course in companies like Wipro, TCS, HCL, etc. The top roles offered include IoT Engineer, Research Intern, Software Engineer, and Data Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided for my course are top-class, with a fully Wi-Fi campus, labs for experiments, every classroom with AC, and a well-maintained library. Facilities provided in hostels are excellent, with both single and double-sharing rooms available. The food quality is also excellent, providing nutritious and healthy meals. Our college offers essential medical facilities to ensure the health and well-being of all students and staff, with a tie-up with HCL Healthcare. Our college actively promotes physical fitness through a wide range of sports.

admission_overview.title: SNU Noida Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: SNU Noida admissions 2026 are based on entrance exam scores of the candidates for most of the UG and PG programmes. The university conducts its own entrance exam-SNUSAT to shortlists candidates for UG courses. SNU Noida also considers scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, SAT, GATE, GMAT, etc. for admission to specific programmes. The university offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels via its five schools, five centres and 24 departments. Besides, SNU also offers diploma and certificate courses.

faqs.answer: SNU MBA admission is based on CAT/ GMAT NMAT/ GRE/ GMAT followed by a PI round. Candidates wishing to get admission to MBA Analytics course can also apply with the GATE score. Aspirants who are shortlisted after the personal interview round need to confirm their admission by paying the course fee. For Online MBA, admission is based on Screening call. Candidates with 60% aggregate and above are directly called for screening call. Aspirants with less than 60% aggregate are required to appear for a test followed by a screening call. GMAT score is accepted for Online MBA. If selected, candidates will recieve a provisional offer letter of admission. Candidates need to secure their seat by paying admission fee.

paragraphs: SNU Noida offers admissionto candidates based on their entrance-exam or merit scores. Aspirants must first apply for the preferred programme to participate in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: SNU Noida Application Process 2026
Aspirants can fill out the application form online by paying an application fee. The fee for MBA isINR 1,800. Aspirants applying for SNUSAT have to pay an application fee of INR2.500.
STEP 2: Selection Process

Admission to UG courses is based on SNUSAT scores of the candidates followed by other rounds of selection. SNU also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as SAT, ACT, CUET, etc. The selection for MBA is based on scores of candidates in GMAT, GRE, CAT, etc.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Shortlisted candidates receive a provisional offer letter after passing all the rounds of selection. Aspirants have to then accept the offer and pay the admission fee and security deposit within the specific period. Aspirants also need to upload specified documents and pay theSNU feeto confirm their seat.
Check out more details in the below video:

paragraphs: Shiv Nadar University Noida has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. A total of 174 companies visited the campus in 2025 and placed students with good packages. The overall highest and average package offered to the batch 2025 stood at INR 54.82 LPA and 9.88 LPA, respectively. The average salary secured by the Engineering students of the batch 2025 was INR 10.82 LPA , whereas the MBA batch secured the average placements of INR 9.01 LPA . Some of the top recruiters of Shiv Nadar University Noida placements 2025 include Goldman Sachs, HCL, DE Shaw & Co, IBM, HP, Lenovo, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: SNU Noida Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

hostel.description: Hostel rooms are allocated on a first-come-first-serve basis. Each room has an individual space containing bed, mattresses, wardrobes, study table with chair, curtains and individual LAN ports. The common areas of the hostels are Wi-Fi enabled. Each hostel has a gym, which comes with the latest gender-segregated equipment and appropriate instructors.
facilities: 4 Table Tennis tables in ISC,  10 Tables in Hostels

library.description: The university has well-equipped library with a rich and extensive collection of books, scientific and technical journals and electronic reference materials for satisfying the academic and research needs of students and faculty community. The library and information center consists a reference section, circulation section, audio-visual section, periodical section, book bank and digital library. reviews.review_heading: There is really good infrastructure and facilities at SNU.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch, as compared to other colleges. The hostel experience is very good as hot water is provided. A pantry is also available. Wi-Fi is present all over the campus, which works excellently. The quality of food is excellent and is affordable. Apart from the mess, there are various other food stalls.

reviews.review_heading: It has a very good campus and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms provided are very good. Especially MBA or master's students have personal rooms. There are AC rooms in all weather situations. The food is also good. There are both indoor and outdoor sports. For medical emergencies, there is a healthcare centre on campus. The campus also has its own incubation centre.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty are good. Overall, it is a good experience with everything.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned 24/7. The libraries are open for an adequate amount of time for everyone to access. Hostel rooms are good, but some issues are not fixed with immediate action. Network issues are found in some places, but overall, Wi-Fi has good coverage everywhere. Medical facilities are really bad, even for the slightest issues, we are asked to go to a specialty hospital outside. The sports infrastructure is good. Canteen food can be made better, and slight improvements...

reviews.review_heading: A solid foundation for engineering students with world class facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers fully Wi-Fi and AC-equipped classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are excellent with hygienic food in the mess. Medical care is available in the campus. Sports and games are well-supported with proper facilities and trained coaches.

reviews.review_heading: It is best to enjoy your college life in a friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided for my course are top-class, with a fully Wi-Fi campus, labs for experiments, every classroom with AC, and a well-maintained library. Facilities provided in hostels are excellent, with both single and double-sharing rooms available. The food quality is also excellent, providing nutritious and healthy meals. Our college offers essential medical facilities to ensure the health and well-being of all students and staff, with a tie-up with HCL Healthcare. Our college actively prom...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good packages and a decent college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice for the entire campus. But for hostels, it's the reverse. You don't get clean drinking water, so we have to purchase water bottles from our side. You also don't get hot water 24/7. Also, you are not allowed to bring a theater or any electronics.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The mess food is good and the taste is also great. The food quality is maintained. There are breakfast, lunch, evening, dinner, and midnight meals offered to students. Hostels have twin and single sharing options and AC or non-AC options as well for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully AC, neat and clean, and also well-maintained. There is Wi-Fi all over the campus and the library has a 24/7 study room as well. The mess food has a variety of options and okayish quality of food. For sports, ISC is there which has all indoor sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education, really good infrastructure, and good enough placements.
reviews.review_text: There is amazing infrastructure. 24/7 Wi-Fi is there. We have a proper library with an all-time accessible hall. Projectors are there in classes. Food quality is also good. There are various food options. The mess and other vendors are there. There is a mini hospital inside the campus. There is also a sports complex with a gym, pool table, basketball, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Brutally honest review about SNU.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs with great computers (serve too for research purposes) and 24X7 Wi-Fi throughout the campus. Hostels are decent. Hostel rooms are double occupancy and are spacious. The only issue is that the hot water doesn't come in the assigned period. Mess food is terrible. I mean other college students say our is better than their but still hostel food is just good enough to fill our belly. There are good medical facilities and sports facilities too.

reviews.review_heading: I absolutely love this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-notch, with well-equipped labs and classrooms. You get every facility here. The food is managed by Sodexo, so there are no compromises in food and medical facilities. Hostels have a pantry and both squad and double-sharing rooms. Some floors have ACs, while others do not.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, good placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are well organized, neat, and clean. Proper hygiene is maintained in the preparation of mess food, and it is tasty with good options for students. There is a hospital inside the campus for all medical facilities for the students. The sports complex has all sports-related facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college overall, good placements.
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure and best classrooms. The library and classrooms are fully air-conditioned and well maintained. The students' Wi-Fi is present around the entire campus. The labs for practicals are also great in terms of equipment. The food at the mess is also good in taste.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty are amazing.
reviews.review_text: Mess food is quite good, with a variety of meals from North and South India served daily. It is completely hygienic and is served by the catering partner Sodexo, which is a well-known company in this field. Infrastructure is good, with high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioner, washing machines, and common rooms equipped with TV and table tennis. The registration process is also quite simple and is completed on the day of arrival. Hostel rooms are spacious, in good condition, and quite affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Hidden realities of SNU college
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. SNU is planning to increase the area further so that they can create more sports fields. Wi-Fi speed is 400mbps but only for the showcase, your mobile data will work faster than the Wi-Fi. Classrooms and auditoriums are well-equipped with projectors and ACs, but hostel rooms don't have AC. Even the water quality is not that good. Quality of food is acceptable, they provide 5 meals a day.

Shiv Nadar University also conducts workshops and guest lectures so as to increase the knowledge and required skills of the students.

reviews_list.review_title: The overall review of this college is good and it is budget friendly engineering college.

review_content.Placements: This college has decent placement records. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA in the last year. Top IT companies like Basetti, Euphoria GenX, Techno Exponent, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visit to recruit students from our college. Overall 30-40% of students got internships in Techno Exponent and Euphoria.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall campus is huge in size and has a large playground and volleyball ground separate. The campus will give you the fresh vibe of a greenery garden. Each classroom is a smart classroom and has access to a Wi-Fi network. It provides a hostel and mess near the campus at an affordable cost. The food available in the canteen is hygienic and fresh it is recommended.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is well maintained and has good placements.

review_content.Placements: The top recruiting companies are Microsoft, TCS, and Infosys. Nearly 80% of students got placed. The top roles offered are project manager and software developer. The highest salary is 12 LPA. The lowest salary is 3 LPA. Around 65% of students got internships in top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is average. The classrooms are in good condition, and facilities are very good. answer.text: Yes, as per student reviews on Shiksha, the college has a good infrastructure and facilities, with modern amenities such as smart classrooms, Wi-Fi-enabled rooms, and well-equipped laboratories. The hostel facility is decent, with comfortable rooms, a mess, and a canteen and the college also has a library, sports facilities, and a playground.On the teaching environment of the college the faculty members are cooperative and supportive, with many having strong academic backgrounds. The teaching style is generally considered good, with some professors being particularly helpful. The reviews also mention that the placement rates are reasonable with over 85% of students getting placed. Major companies such as Wipro, TCS, BASSETTI, and Capgemini visit the campus regularly.Therefore, as per Shiksha student reviews GMIT Kolkata is worth the investment because of its good infrastructure, teaching environment and good placement record.
