answer.text: Yes, candidates can apply for student loans if they have applied for the West Bengal Student Credit Card Scheme. According to the scheme, candidates apply for a loan of upto 10 Lacs at an interest rate of 4% per annum from the State Cooperative Bank and its affiliated Central Cooperative Banks and District Central Cooperative Banks and Public/ Private Sector Banks. If the interest is fully serviced during the study period, 1% interest concession will be provided to borrower. Candidates can make use of the scheme to fund their education in GMIT Kolkata.

answer.text: Gargi Memorial Institute of Technology has a Career Development Cell (CDC), which helps students with guidance and opportunities regarding placements. The CDC offers personalized and holistic career guidance and support to each student by organizing various workshops, seminars, webinars, mock interviews, and aptitude tests to enhance the employability and soft skills of the students. The body also facilitates the placement process for its students and helps them find suitable jobs/internships in the fields they desire. The CDC at GMIT Kolkata is highly effective, as it not only provides soft skills training, but also job opportunities through various recruiters during the placement rounds at the university.

individual_reviews.title: My Best College Life, Which I Have Enjoyed the Most.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students were placed in my course. The highest package is 14 Lacs and the lowest package is 4 Lacs. Capgemini, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. are recruiting for our course. 80 percent of students got internships from my course. ECE is the best department for IT and core to get a job.
content.Infrastructure: In my course, the faculty members are 9th well-educated professors. They are very helpful. All kinds of labs are in our department and they are in good condition. Free Wi-Fi is available on the campus and it's very fast. Classrooms are so clean. All classrooms are smart classrooms. The quality of the hostel is too good. The quality of food is mind-blowing. The canteen and medical facility are too good. On our campus, volleyball, cricket, football, and many types of games are played.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The overall review of this college is good and it is budget friendly engineering college.

content.Placements: This college has decent placement records. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA in the last year. Top IT companies like Basetti, Euphoria GenX, Techno Exponent, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visit to recruit students from our college. Overall 30-40% of students got internships in Techno Exponent and Euphoria.
content.Infrastructure: The overall campus is huge in size and has a large playground and volleyball ground separate. The campus will give you the fresh vibe of a greenery garden. Each classroom is a smart classroom and has access to a Wi-Fi network. It provides a hostel and mess near the campus at an affordable cost. The food available in the canteen is hygienic and fresh it is recommended.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is well maintained and has good placements.

content.Placements: The top recruiting companies are Microsoft, TCS, and Infosys. Nearly 80% of students got placed. The top roles offered are project manager and software developer. The highest salary is 12 LPA. The lowest salary is 3 LPA. Around 65% of students got internships in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is average. The classrooms are in good condition, and facilities are very good. There are no Wi-Fi facilities in our college, but a library and labs are available. The hotel facilities are good on campus. There is a canteen where you can buy some snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Business Systems - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, faculty members and curriculum .

content.Placements: Placement is good but not that great; it provides a very low salary as compared to other colleges placement. Big companies don't come to our college as it is situated in a rural area, that's why. I think about 80% of students sit for placement rounds, and internships are allowed .
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are good and supportive, infrastructure is also good and the college is very green; it also has a big football field, and our campus also has a small pond along with a bridge that looks attractive. The campus is full of stress and plants and mountains are there that look very beautiful.

hostel_campus.college_name: GMIT Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel facilities are available with separate girls’ and boys’ hostel, providing excellent food and lodging facilities.

library.description: The Central Library of GMIT occupies a very important place in the campus. It provides all necessary support towards teaching-learning process and research activities. Located at the first floor of GMIT admin building with 140 seating capacity, it has a rich collection of 21246 text books and reference books covering 2960 titles on all relevant subjects. The institute subscribes 36 nos. of periodicals, local & national dailies which are available for the benefit of the readers. Some of the facilities include Reprography, Printing, Scanning of reference books & articles along with educational CDs. GMIT library is partially automated with ‘# LIB MAN’ – user-friendly integrated library management software (ILMS) & Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) facility. Users can search & retrieve books smoothly through this software from using PC, Laptop or smart-phones inside the campus. GMIT Library uses Dewey decimal classification (DDC) Standards for classify the books. GMIT library has a unique feature of Book Bank facility which provides average of 4 to 6 text to every student at the beginning of each semester, as per their course curriculum. At GMIT-library, students and faculties access the NPTEL Video Lectures, E-Books, and E- Journals using the Multimedia lab facility. They also avail the access NPTEL Video Lectures using LAN connected PC anywhere inside the campus through specific IP. GMIT Library is also a member of National Digital Library (NDL) which has a collection of more than 6 lacs e-books where the students and staffs are members. The student members who participates in the NDLI Club webinars get a certificate from NDLI Club of IIT Kharagpur. These webinars are conducted by Library Committee along with respective departments.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Carrom Room, Billiards, Chess, Table Tennis

reviews.review_text: Many faculty members are there to teach; the faculty members are qualified from Jadavpur, Shibpur, Kharagpur. Library and Wi-Fi have been provided by our college authority. reviews.review_text: In my course, electronic and communication engineering, there are more facilities like fests, though it is low compared to other colleges in West Bengal under all engineering colleges. On the college campus, there is free Wi-Fi. For every department, there are 2 to 3 labs and 4 to 5 classrooms. In the hostel, the food is not good, not bad.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of bad education system.
reviews.review_text: There are no extra facilities here, everything is normal. Yes, there are AC classrooms and smart classrooms for first-year students. Also, there is limited Wi-Fi connection for everyone, and a library is available for all students. Hostel facilities are average, and food is definitely available. The food quality is fair, but the hostel has a special menu on special days. There are medical facilities, but no sports or games are organized from the hostel.

In smart classrooms, you will get free Wi-Fi. There is a library, which is filled with a lot of books. On the first floor of this college, you will find too many practical lab classrooms where you will gain practical knowledge.

A huge playground is available in our college for conducting sports, functions, fests, and festivals.

paragraphs: GMIT Kolkata has the facility of providing scholarship schemes under central and state Government programmes. The students apply to the scholarships as per notification from the Government. The Government scholarships that students can use to aid their education are:

Gargi Memorial Institute of Technology has affordable fee strcture. The fee structure of BTech programme ranges between INR 3 lakh- INR 6 lakh. The fee strcture is inclusive of various components such as caution deposit, exam fee, tuition fee, etc. Students must note that this fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to changes.

Yes, candidates can apply for student loans if they have applied for the West Bengal Student Credit Card Scheme. According to the scheme, candidates apply for a loan of upto 10 Lacs at an interest rate of 4% per annum from the State Cooperative Bank and its affiliated Central Cooperative Banks and District Central Cooperative Banks and Public/ Private Sector Banks. If the interest is fully serviced during the study period,  1% interest concession will be provided to borrower. Candidates can make use of the scheme to fund their education in GMIT Kolkata.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are good for all branches.

review_content.Infrastructure: Good for B. Teach and good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is provided in campus surroundings, and classrooms are very good with projectors and smart TVs. Sports and fests are very good.
review_content.Faculty: Well-trained faculty members and well-disciplined students exist, and it consists of 13 specializations in the CSE branch and many other branches in the School of Engineering.
review_content.Other: Events and fests are good. The campus crowd is good. connectivity, campus surroundings are good. A scholarship facility is available in our college. Extracurricular activities are very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore.

review_content.Placements: About 60 percent of students get placed. The highest package offered is 13.5 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3.75 LPA. The average package offered is 4.5 LPA. Many students are eligible to get jobs in the campus placements themselves. There is an international cell which helps students who want to study a Master's abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure with air-conditioned labs. It has very good hostels with very big and vast rooms. It has the Sodexo food company, which maintains neat, hygienic, and good food. This college has a very good van facility that runs all over Bengaluru.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Technology (Big Data) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I am satisfied with the college I chose.

review_content.Placements: 80 to 90 percent of students got placement in our course. The highest package offered is 25.5 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 5.5 LPA. The average package offered is 7 LPA, and the top recruiting companies include HCL, Microsoft, Accenture, Infosys, etc. Approximately 70 to 85 percent of students secured internships with companies such as HCL, Infosys, Microsoft, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good for our course, which provides Wi-Fi, labs, advanced classrooms, and a library. We get proper hygienic food in the hostel and canteen. We will get immediate medical facilities, sports, and games are very much available, which we can play whichever we are interested in.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Value for your money unless you are a topper.

review_content.Placements: 100% placement in the college, which is actually true, you will at least get placed in a call centre. I have heard from the seniors that this year might not continue. They made you sign a contract before sitting in the placement that you have to take whatever job you get in the placement, and you cannot leave the round unless you are rejected by every company that comes. The highest you will get here is about 10LPA, which is rare.
review_content.Infrastructure: Most of the students join here to see the infrastructure. It is really good. It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus, so you have Wi-Fi everywhere. One thing you will notice is that the ceilings are not painted. We have a decent sports facility. There is no dedicated cricket field, but there is a football field. There is a clinic on the campus, which is free of charge for a consultation. The hostels are strict, you cannot go outside without your parents permission. You need to take it every time you go out. The food is below average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college is brilliant and very fantastic.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students got placed from the course at the highest package of 25 LPA, with the lowest packages meeting the 10 LPA requirement. Companies like Reliance and Wipro, which are engineering companies, offered internships to students. About 50% of students secured top roles as engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The very brilliant infrastructure is a great day. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very nice, the library is fantastic, the quality of postal facilities is average, and the food is average. The canteens are brilliant, and the medical facilities are not so good, but the sports and games are very brilliant.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and supportive environment. Faculty members are qualitative.

review_content.Placements: Placement at my college is quite active, structured, and pleasant way of approach. It is basically a systematic approach to competitive exams conducted before the exams, and to achieve their goals in both personal and professional settings and achieve success.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is a guide that highlights the practical application of serverless computing and microservices architecture that segregates responsibilities among independent deployable services like AWS Lambda and API Gateway, and throttling control are essential to protect.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average starting salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering graduates?
overview_faqs.answer: The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

description: School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BE/BTech programmes via the COMEDK UGCET examination. Students can view the exam-wise sections below to know the cutoffs for various accepted examinations across different rounds, categories and quotas. Refer to the pointers below for more exam-related updates:

School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore Karnataka PGCET Round 2 Seat Allotment ranks are out for admission to MBA/ MCA courses. However, the Round 2 cutoff is behind the login and is only accessible via student login. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore Round 1 cutoff for the General All India category candidates along with previous years' trends.

Karnataka PGCET score is considered for School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore MBA admission. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table below to check out some of the important dates for Karnataka PGCET.
Download round-wise consolidated PDFs for School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore Karnataka PGCET Counselling 2023 from the table below:

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) has the lowest cutoff rank of 39019 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 51095, in the General All India quota.

According to the School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Information Science & Engineering stood at 51906 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 72517. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is brilliant and very fantastic.
reviews.review_text: The very brilliant infrastructure is a great day. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very nice, the library is fantastic, the quality of postal facilities is average, and the food is average. reviews.review_heading: Good placements and supportive environment. Faculty members are qualitative.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a guide that highlights the practical application of serverless computing and microservices architecture that segregates responsibilities among independent deployable services like AWS Lambda and API Gateway, and throttling control are essential to protect.

reviews.review_heading: It was good at the festival and in studies, but we need to seek placements externally.
reviews.review_text: Our college gives equal importance to everything, including sports, and the infrastructure is quite good. I don't stay in the hostel, so I don't know much, but people usually say the hostel is clean and decent but a bit expensive. It costs about 1,75,000.

reviews.review_heading: The college has great infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good and the campus includes grounds, libraries, different blocks for courses, and many more. Classrooms have digital boards and good computer labs. The hostel experience in my first year was so great but I wasn't able to adjust to the food, but the rooms are great.

reviews.review_heading: Below average faculty, above average infrastructure, average placements, and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the university is great. Good Wi-Fi, classes are equipped with smart display and the infrastructure with respect to the department is also above average. Though, I am a day scholar I have heard that the infrastructure of the hostel is also great.

reviews.review_heading: A very good opportunity to explore yourself other than your studies.
reviews.review_text: The university hostel offers twin-sharing rooms and triple-sharing rooms. The students in the hostel are provided with beds, study tables, and cupboards. The students staying in the university hostel get access to free Wi-Fi. They are also provided with hot and cold drinking water, laundry, and indoor-outdoor game facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and teaching is good but placements are terrible.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The college is very beautiful infrastructure-wise. It is well-built with all the amenities available like labs, classrooms, library and gym room also. There's a fountain and a garden for students to hang out. The college has multiple cafes in each block so the students find it comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education, good placements, and excellent infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure and quality of the food were good. Medical facilities are available (Manipal Hospital), and separate football and basketball courts are available. Often, we have game leagues including both video games and athletics.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with placements, and I'll recommend being prepared for everything.
reviews.review_text: No lab exams are done in ECE. The hostel is good and the food is also good, everything is perfect except for some matters. There is a college bus from the hostel to the college, and they provide a shuttle service for local students for free of cost. It's a better college, not the best one.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied as they provide more opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are mainly excellent and infrastructure in our college is the center of attraction as it is well-maintained every day. Wi-Fi is always available, classrooms have modern seating methods, and library is also modern with many facilities and excellent infrastructure and comfort.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and nice faculty members. Students are from many parts of India.
reviews.review_text: No need to worry about this, management was too good in maintenance. Mini projects and major projects were done by students during semesters. They will focus on individual performance and from day 1 every student will stand on stage and speak confidently. No problem with communication, and they will prepare students for group discussion and interviews from semester 1.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about School of Engineering, Presidency University, Bangalore

likes.text: Top companies which recruit students from here are Wipro, Peps, Tell, Reliance, Vedanta, etc., and many other MNCs.
The placement rate of the college is good and they are striving hard to increase the campus placement in further years.

paragraphs: The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Sardar Patel Institute of Technology:

college_info.intro:
Sardar Patel Institute of Technology offers a range of UG, PG & PhD level courses oi the fields of Engineering & Technology. SPIT Mumbai popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech is offered at the UG level for the duration of 4 years. BTech programme is given in 3 streams like Computer Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering & Computer Science and Engineering. There are 240 seats for Computer Engineering while 120 seats for the other two streams. After completing the programme students can work in both government & private sectors. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, or can take up various fields relevant to their stream.
MTech is offered at the PG level. The duration of the course is 2 years. MTech is offered in streams like Electronics & Telecommunication & Computer Engineering. The total seat intake is 18 for each stream. After completing the programme students can get a full time job or can go into academia by doing PhD prpogramme. Below mentioned are some of the popular programmes offered by SPIT Mumbai and their respective eligibility and fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    As per the past year trends, Sardar Patel Institute of Technology cutoff for Round 1 in 2023, the closing ranks for all BTech specialisations ranged between 6952 and 12780. The most competitive specialisation has been B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) with a closing rank of 6952, followed by B.Tech. in Computer Engineering with a 7261 rank and finally followed by B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering at R1 closing rank of 12780 for the General category students belonging to All India Quota. review_summary.college_name: Sardar Patel Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college experience is the best.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is typically high with computer science and IT branches having nearly 90-100 percent placements, while other branches also have strong placement records. The highest package can go above 40-50 LPA (mainly for CS/IT students in product-based companies). The lowest package varies but is usually around 3-4 LPA. The average package is generally in the range of 8-12 LPA for CS/IT. Around 5-8 LPA for other branches. Top recruiting tech giants are Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Atlassian, Adobe, Oracle, etc. Finance & consulting are J. P. Morgan, Goldman Sachs, Deloitte, Morgan Stanley, etc. Product & startups are Uber, Zomato, Paytm, CRED and Razorpay.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Placement Rate: 100 percent (2021-2022) The highest package is 30.5 LPA. The average package is 12.4 LPA. Top recruiters are Microsoft, Oracle, TCS, Infosys, Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan, Deloitte and Capgemini. Students secured internships at Amazon, Microsoft, VMWare, Siemens, BNP Paribas, and Dolat Capital. Top roles are software engineer, data scientist, business analyst, IT consultant, and financial analyst. SPIT Mumbai maintains a strong placement record with top companies offering lucrative packages and internships across various domains.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is wide with Wi-Fi and well-equipped modern labs. We have digital classrooms. The library has 20,000+ books and access to online journals. There are limited hostel seats. We have a clean living space. The mess & canteen provide nutritious meals. On-campus clinics with doctors and ambulance services are there. We have a gym, indoor & outdoor sports, technical clubs, and cultural activities. There is an annual fest Oculus. We have a cultural fest named Techno-cultural fest. We have a mess. The campus is 47-acre. It is green.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college experience is the best.
reviews.review_text: The department facilities at SPIT offer modern infrastructure for students, ensuring a good learning environment. Some of the key facilities include: Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, comfortable seating, and air conditioning. Labs have high-end computers and the latest software/tools for programming, AI/ML, networking, and hardware experiments. Wi-Fi provides high speed. The campus is wide with internet access. There is a well-stocked library with academic books, research papers, an...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: The campus is wide with Wi-Fi and well-equipped modern labs. We have digital classrooms. The library has 20,000+ books and access to online journals. There are limited hostel seats. We have a clean living space. The mess & canteen provide nutritious meals. On-campus clinics with doctors and ambulance services are there. We have a gym, indoor & outdoor sports, technical clubs, and cultural activities. There is an annual fest Oculus. We have a cultural fest named Techno-cultural fest. We have a me...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, good infrastructure, excellent college crowd (seniors and faculty). .
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for the course are pretty good, and cleanliness is well maintained throughout the college. The college does not provide a hostel but the quality of food in the mess and canteen is good, and the taste is fine.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with facilities and placement ratio.
reviews.review_text: The college provides pretty good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in required places. Labs, classrooms, and the library are maintained as per the requirements of students. There is no hostel right now, but the food quality is good. Sports are not focused much.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best teaching college with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: They provide advanced labs, classrooms, and a library. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the college. The college does not have a hostel but has a very good canteen. There is a mess on the campus, and a playground is available for every sport. There are good committees in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong teachers, an industry-aligned curriculum, superb placements, and solid infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: SPIT provides air-conditioner classrooms, modern labs, a well-stocked library, campus-wide Wi-Fi, good food in the canteen, on-campus medical facilities, sports grounds, gym facilities, etc., for students' overall well-being. They also provide access to digital resources.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college life at Sardar Patel Institute of Technology (SPIT).
reviews.review_text: SPIT currently does not have hostels, but construction is going on. The infrastructure of classrooms is nice, but the infrastructure of labs, corridors, and the library can be improved. There is Wi-Fi available for each classroom and lab room. All the rooms are air-conditioned and well-ventilated. There is a canteen in our college, which provides good food at affordable rates. The mess in our college provides good food too. There is a gymkhana which has space for dance practices or other miscell...

reviews.review_heading: Focus on in-demand skills, projects, internships, soft skills, and networking for career growth.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and there's no hostel for spite students. The hostel is only for their MBA program students (SPJIMR) and for (SPACE) students. The entire campus has a lot of space, and it’s a very huge campus. There's a lake inside the college, 2-3 grounds, and many things.

reviews.review_heading: Placements-wise, a good choice, but difficult to score in semester exams.
reviews.review_text:
Our course offers air-conditioned labs and classrooms, Wi-Fi-enabled, a well-stocked library, and collaborative space for projects.
Hostel facilities are well-maintained, with mess (food) and a hygienic canteen, medical assistance, and diverse sports amenities for overall growth.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching faculty is average, but infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: College is well-equipped with smartboards and Wi-Fi in each lab and classrooms. Library has a wide range of updated books and offers a digital library as well. There is an in-house canteen that serves great food and snacks at reasonable rates.

reviews.review_heading: All about Sardar Patel Institute of Technology, Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: SPIT doesn't provide hostel services and  you can opt for PGs at a nearby college in Andheri. The college does offer mess for students at a minimum cost and clean, tasty mess food. Sardar Patel College of Engineering has a hostel, which is on the same campus.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Sardar Patel Institute of technology.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge library, which is well maintained and has almost all the books one needs. All the classrooms and labs are well maintained and air-conditioned. The Wi-Fi is present in all the labs, and it has pretty good speed. One drawback of the college is that it does not have a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Average faculty, poor infrastructure, but good placements .
reviews.review_text: Poor infrastructure. Washrooms are just better than public and municipal washrooms. The college doesn't have their own canteen; they don't have their own hostel; and SPIT students are not allowed in the SPCE hostel. So the only option left is to live in PGs available near colleges or private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best you can get amongst other available options.
reviews.review_text: Lab culture is very good, although the college doesn't provide hostels. Also, the canteen is missing so you would have to go to the SPEC canteen or the SPJIMR mess/canteen. You have exposure to other extracurricular things except courses, which helps in overall development and has a good alumni network.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus life is great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Our college has 8-storeyed buildings. All facilities are good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Projectors are available in our classrooms. Laboratories are also well maintained. The food served in the mess is decent. Canteen is available. Many students finish their lunch and tiffin having fun.

likes.text: Companies like Infosys, TCS, Barclays, Microsoft, Capgemini, Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan, L&T, Credit Suisse, Zycus etc and much more visited the college for placements every year.
There is a separate cell in our college so that students can get placed in quite good companies, and many famous companies also visit our college.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. review_summary.college_name: IILM University Greater Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is decent and can provide a good placement if you work hard and study.

content.Placements: Almost 100 percent of students got placed with the highest package of 18 LPA, and the lowest is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, PwC, and BlackRock. 90 percent of students got internships in companies like Infosys. Top roles offered are data analyst, software developer, and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good, with AC classes and highly equipped labs for higher studies. The computer lab has good computers. Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The hostel also has good facilities with AC rooms and Wi-Fi. Clean and hygienic food with sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Pros are excellent industry tie-ups. Cons are high fee structure may not suit all budgets.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed from B.Tech CSE. The highest package they claim is 40 LPA, the lowest is 2.40 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA., I think 70 percent of students got an internship. Recruiting companies are Microsoft, Google, IBM, Salesforce, Amazon, Airtel, etc. Architect designer is a top role.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories, robotics lab, hostel, and residential are available. The Room quality is very good. Food is average. Canteens are available for everyone. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are both indoor and outdoor, but cricket is excluded.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is the best decision I have ever made.

content.Placements: 88 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. The average package offered is 8 LPA. The lowest package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Microsoft, and Google. Students get placed with their good skills. Top roles offered are software developer and backend developer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available include Wi-Fi, labs, and a library, which is fully air-conditioned. It has four boys' hostels and one girls' hostel. There is a cafeteria, which includes North Indian, South Indian, and continental food with good beverages.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best college in Greater Noida for B.Tech CSE is IILM University.

content.Placements: In my college, like IILM University, the average placement offer percentage is 90%. The highest package offered in B.Tech CSE 2024 was around 22 LPA, and the lowest was around 3 to 4 LPA on average. Top recruiting companies are Apple, IBM, Larsen & Toubro, Reliance, BlackRock, Extern, and Wipro. The internship percentage in my course is above 95% because the college offers a lot of internship opportunities for students and companies like Flipkart, Amazon, and fintech companies. Top roles offered in my course are senior backend, front-end, and team lead manager positions in software companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Knowing the inside view of IILM.

content.Placements: Around 40-50 percent of my seniors have been placed in average companies. The average package ranges from 8-10 LPA. Companies like Apple and IBM come to hire their specialisation students, and other companies come for overall students. Many startups and other companies come for internship purposes, like HCL Tech, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The best thing about my college, according to me, is the infrastructure and campus. Buildings are made very beautiful. The campus is again pretty and green. Each classroom has its own Wi-Fi mode. Our B.Tech side has a central library for all B.Tech students. Hostels and mess are very beautiful. The food is nice and has variety. Many sports are supported by the college, like football, basketball, badminton, pickleball, etc. There are 4 different brand canteens inside the campus.

admission_process.title: IILM University, Greater Noida Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: IILM 2026 Admissions Open|Apply Now

IILM University admission processconsists of different stages such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. Interested students need to complete all the steps to get admission in the university. Students can check the points below to know detailed IILM admission process 2026:
1. IILM University Greater Noida Application Process 2026

Register online and submit your completed application with academic details. After filling the form, upload the scanned copies of all academic documents. The documents include marksheets, entrance exam scores, Identity Proof, etc.
2. IILM University Greater Noida Selection Process

IILM Greater Noida selects candidates based on merit and entrance exam scores, such as CUET/CLAT/ CAT etc. Candidates looking for UG course admission must complete Class 12 as the basic educational qualification. Similarly, for PG courses, students should complete their graduation. After the form is submitted, the university will schedule either an in-person or online round of PI. Final merit list is made based on academic merit + entrance score + Interview performance, among other criteria.
3. IILM University Greater Noida Admission Confirmation
Once the selection rounds are over, selected aspirants receive the admission offer letter. Such aspirants are required to pay theIILM Greater Noida feeto confirm their admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: IILM University Greater Noida Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: College is decent and can provide a good placement if you work hard and study.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, with AC classes and highly equipped labs for higher studies. The computer lab has good computers. Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The hostel also has good facilities with AC rooms and Wi-Fi. Clean and hygienic food with sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Pros are excellent industry tie-ups. Cons are high fee structure may not suit all budgets.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories, robotics lab, hostel, and residential are available. The Room quality is very good. Food is average. Canteens are available for everyone. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are both indoor and outdoor, but cricket is excluded.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best decision I have ever made.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available include Wi-Fi, labs, and a library, which is fully air-conditioned. It has four boys' hostels and one girls' hostel. There is a cafeteria, which includes North Indian, South Indian, and continental food with good beverages.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Greater Noida for B.Tech CSE is IILM University.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are above par for a student’s needs. Infrastructure is also cool and has a Gen Z vibe, like a dream college. Classrooms are good. Compared to the library, the BBA library is better than the B.Tech one because of the engineers’ behavior. The hostel is also good, but it costs more for a normal middle-class student, with a price range of around 1.6 LPA for a shared room. Sports are also good because of clubs and societies.

reviews.review_heading: Knowing the inside view of IILM.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about my college, according to me, is the infrastructure and campus. Buildings are made very beautiful. The campus is again pretty and green. Each classroom has its own Wi-Fi mode. Our B.Tech side has a central library for all B.Tech students. Hostels and mess are very beautiful. The food is nice and has variety. Many sports are supported by the college, like football, basketball, badminton, pickleball, etc. There are 4 different brand canteens inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A student taking admission in IILM University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of IILM University is vast. There are labs for every department, and they are well-equipped with the tools. The food quality of the mess is good, and it is also consumed by the professors of the college. The hostel is good for living, as we compare it with the outside hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus life and the facilities are satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is quite decent. We have Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-maintained labs, and a good library with enough study space. The hostel facilities are okay. Rooms are clean and basic and the campus mess food is very good. The canteen has better options. Medical facilities are available on campus and seniors say they respond quickly in emergencies. Sports grounds and indoor games are also available, so the campus infrastructure is good for daily student life.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and study but placement and all are poor.
reviews.review_text: It is not highly developed but it is good compared to other universities. We have labs and library to study in university. Sports facilities are not so good there. Medical facilities are normal. About hostel, they are good enough for students. We have all the facilities in the hostels, like sports gym. Mess food is hygienic but not tasty, something they make poor quality of food but sometimes good.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement, below average infrastructure and facilities, with a good curriculum and facultys
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average too, the new block for engineering is bad, structured classes, and no projectors in any of the classrooms, the mic facility is useless. Teachers cannot just stand and teach at one place, the campus is overcrowded, sometimes you do not even have the place to eat lunch.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements, infrastructure, with a good faculty support.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is overcrowded, the new building, which is for first year students, is just pathetic, with structured classrooms with absolutely no network connection or Wi-Fi. No projectors in the class, the mic is of no use as teachers cant just stand and talk, and sometimes you do not even find a place to eat your lunch on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, an average college with an average infrastructure, good faculty, and decent opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The new engineering block, which is only for the first year students, is actually bad, no actual structure of the classrooms, no projectors or smart boards, not even Wi-Fi is available in the whole block, and the network is the biggest issue of the whole campus. Apart from the structure of the classroom, the tables and chairs are comfortable, and the lighting and soundproofing are also good. The whole campus feels overcrowded as the infrastructure is limited and the student intake is too high. T...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure well maintained. Hostel is nice and the environment is well maintained. The university provides all necessary infrastructures, including many sports areas to play. The menu food is nice and hygienic. Faculty is more interactive and has a nice nature, which helps students to get more interactive.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am very satisfied because of faculty members, average placement since 2020.
reviews.review_text: I didn't live in a university hostel so I cannot express truly what the hostel of university is about Wi-Fi, labs, and classroom. Wi-Fi is average of sometimes it works, sometimes it does not. Labs are too good. Classrooms are well organized. Library is very good. Talking about the quality of foods there is meal station in our college in which the food is too good. Mess and canteen are too good. The quality of food is very high. Facilities you will get a basketball court, football ground, cricke...

reviews.review_heading: Better choice in Greater Noida as a private university.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty good. The only thing to compromise is the food, which is not too good here. I am in the out of campus hostel of IILM, and there are too many facilities like a gym, swimming pool. The inside campus hostel is not available most of the time, if you get it, then its your luck.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: In CSE department, all classes are fully Wi-Fi and with AC. There is also a huge library in which students can study on their own terms whatever they want to study, as far as classroom is concerned. There are also 2-3 canteens in which all types of food are available to eat whatever you want. Medical facilities are also top notch which are available 24X7. Sports and games facilities are also available in which you can compete with other college students.

faqs.answer: According to the LD College of Engineering's qualifying criteria for candidates to appear for the GUJCET Exam, students must have a minimum of 45% in class 12th if they belong to an unreserved category. However, candidates from the reserved category must have a grade point average of 40% in class 12. Candidates applying for GUJCET must review the entire GUJCET eligibility criteria before filling out the application form.Candidates who do not meet the GUJCET eligibility standards will not be considered for admission as per the norms given by Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB).The various conditions of eligibility for GUJCET 2024 as per Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board are · The candidate must be an Indian and should have a Gujarat domicile.· The candidates should have passed or appeared for Class 12 or equivalent.· The candidate must have studied Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/ Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as the main subject for pharmacy.· The candidate must have studied Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as the main subject for Engineering.· Candidates should have scored 45% (40% for the reserved category) in Class 12.

review_summary.college_name: LDCE Ahmedabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and experienced faculty with affordable fees.

content.Placements: In my course, Mechanical Engineering at LDCE, the placements are quite good. Almost 70% to 80% of students get placed every year. The highest salary package offered is around 10 LPA to 12 LPA, and the average package is about 5 LPA. Top companies like Reliance, Adani, L&T, and Tata Motors come to our campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of LDCE is decent. Since it is a very old government college, the buildings look old, but the Mechanical department has big classrooms and well-equipped labs for practicals. The library is vast and contains almost all the books required for our course. Wi-Fi is available in some areas of the campus. I am a day scholar, but my friends say the hostel is affordable and has basic facilities with an average mess. However, the campus has a big ground for sports, and there are facilities for indoor games too. Overall, the campus life is good and very active.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best college, best placement and facilities, and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: They give very nice placement, and almost 80 to 90 percent of students get placed every year. Last year, the highest package is 13.5 LPA, and the average package is 5-6 LPA. Top companies are MICRON, Torrent Power, L&T, Infosys, etc. Almost 99 percent of the students get internship from the Electrical Engineering course. Top roles offered are power systems engineers, control/automation engineers, and renewable energy specialists.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent, and facilities are very good. There are Wi-Fi and every equipment in the lab. Hostel is also pretty good, quality of food in the mess and canteen is very good. For sports, there are also many facilities provided, and medical facilities are also good; there is a doctor available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This college gives us the best placements.

content.Placements: 80-90 percent of students get placed in my course. The highest package offered is 28 LPA, and the average package is 8 LPA. The lowest package is 6 LPA. Top roles like full-stack developer, mobile app developer, data analyst, etc., are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: BSNL Wi-Fi connections are available in labs. The library is not very big. The library is average with an AC facility. individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the good placements in 2024.

content.Placements: In my college, in my branch, around 90–95% of students get placed. The minimum placement package is around 6 LPA. Many companies offer jobs in my course, such as Torrent Power, Adani Solar Power, government companies, Tata Motors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: My college has smart classrooms and a library. Wi-Fi is available for studying, and labs are provided for BME and Physics. The college has water filters for good quality water, a good canteen, and a good hostel mess.
content.Faculty: In my college, all faculty members are very helpful with subject-related doubts and projects. Faculty also guides us for company work and helps us become good employees. The semester exams are well-structured and difficult, and the passing marks are 23 out of 70. Faculty is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good college for the mechanical engineering course. There is a 100% placement ratio.

content.Placements: 100% of students from the mechanical engineering course got placed in L D College of Engineering. The highest package ranges from 21-22 LPA. The average package ranges from 6-7 LPA. Top recruiting companies like L&T, Suzuki, etc., hire students. All students get internships in my course. I don't know about roles offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: There is a network issue. Wi-Fi is not so powerful. Wi-Fi is password-protected, so we need to adjust this thing. The hostel facility is not so good, as I saw the hostel building and also got a reference from hostel boys. The canteen and mess are not as good as we expected.

admission_process.title: L D College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: L D College of Engineering admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 41 programmes.L D College of Engineeringoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. L D College of Engineering admission is done based on scores of exams like JEE Main, GATE, and ACPC Admission. The university offers over 41 courses at UG and PG levels in field, such as Engineering and IT and Software. Read more details around L D College of Engineering admission in the following article.
At UG and PG level, B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech are among the top courses offered at L D College of Engineering.

faqs.answer: According to theLD College of Engineering'squalifying criteria for candidates to appear for the GUJCET Exam, students must have a minimum of45%in class 12th if they belong to an unreserved category. However, candidates from the reserved category must have a grade point average of40%in class 12. description: L D College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the L D College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

L D College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via ACPC Gujrat entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 900047 and 928484 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 900047, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 900012.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 900047.

For the OBC category students, the JEE Main last round closing ranks varied between 900554 and 928275 for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. Of all the BTech specialisations, the most competitive was B.E. / B.Tech. was the easiest grab for students with a least competitive cutoff
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

L D College of Engineering GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General AI category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 900047 to 928484. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.
In the final round for the General AI category, the L D College of Engineering B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 900047 to 928484, wherein the toughest branch was B.E. in Computer Engineering.

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and experienced faculty with affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of LDCE is decent. Since it is a very old government college, the buildings look old, but the Mechanical department has big classrooms and well-equipped labs for practicals. The library is vast and contains almost all the books required for our course. Wi-Fi is available in some areas of the campus. I am a day scholar, but my friends say the hostel is affordable and has basic facilities with an average mess. However, the campus has a big ground for sports, and there are facili...

reviews.review_heading: Best college, best placement and facilities, and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent, and facilities are very good. There are Wi-Fi and every equipment in the lab. Hostel is also pretty good, quality of food in the mess and canteen is very good. For sports, there are also many facilities provided, and medical facilities are also good; there is a doctor available.

reviews.review_heading: This college gives us the best placements.
reviews.review_text: BSNL Wi-Fi connections are available in labs. The library is not very big. The library is average with an AC facility. There is a bad infrastructure in the hostel and other buildings. Mess, bathrooms, security, and daily cleaning facilities are available in the hostel. The infrastructure is so bad, but girls' hostel is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: My college has smart classrooms and a library. Wi-Fi is available for studying, and labs are provided for BME and Physics. The college has water filters for good quality water, a good canteen, and a good hostel mess.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for the mechanical engineering course. There is a 100% placement ratio.
reviews.review_text: There is a network issue. Wi-Fi is not so powerful. Wi-Fi is password-protected, so we need to adjust this thing. The hostel facility is not so good, as I saw the hostel building and also got a reference from hostel boys. The canteen and mess are not as good as we expected.

reviews.review_heading: Ahmedabads best college L. D.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are moderate because it is a government college. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, library etc. Excellent. Medium quality of the hostel facilities. Good quality of food is available in the mess but not in the canteen. My college also provides medical facilities, sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Life at LD College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is still developing as it is an almost 75-year-old college, so buildings are quite old, but construction is going on for newer ones. Sooner you'll get a new building for students, and all will be equipped with all the facilities for students in the upcoming year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, L. D. College of Engineering is good for gaining practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: We have all kinds of labs, such as mechanical, computer, textile, rubber, etc. There are many Wi-Fi routers too in our college & some smart boards are also available in the classroom. We also have a library & its a big one, according to the college. Newly constructed hostel is very good. Satisfactory facilities are given to the hostelers, but in old hostel, students are facing a few problems, such as leakage/shortage of water & selling, etc. The quality of food in the canteen & mess both are goo...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best ROI.
reviews.review_text: My course is decent, but the facilities provided are average. In terms of usefulness, well, thats bad as most things might work sometimes and some might not. The hostel infrastructure is just bad, even for a government college, its unlivable.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college L.D.
reviews.review_text: According to the infrastructure, the best facilities are provided by LDCE. The infrastructure of LDCE is very old, and now the departments are under repair. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, sports club, and any other clubs are provided by LDCE. Good quality food is available in the mess. Canteen food is hygienic, according to me.

reviews.review_heading: The LDCE is the best college for students who want to make their future bright.
reviews.review_text: There are enough, or I can say that good facilities are available for students, like smart and air-conditioned classrooms. There are labs for different subjects that contain all the necessary instruments. There are good facilities for hostelers. There are three different messes for hostelers, and one of them is special for Swaminarayan food.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good. If you are ready to give your efforts, then come to this college.
reviews.review_text: This college is government and very old so infrastructure is not good. But lab and classrooms are good. All the instrumentations are in nice condition, and renovations are continuing. Every branch has provided hostel room, and students can get a room based on their rank. Canteen, mess, sports, and games are all very good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges, LDCE.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the LDCE is very old, but environment is healthy. Very best facilities provided like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, cricket ground, library, mess, canteen, etc. I'm not living in college hostel, so I do not provide any information about hostel. Food quality in mess is best, but in canteen it is very bad. Also include facilities like medical facilities, sports and games, many events, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Placement records are too good. Infrastructure is not good, but facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: LD College of Engineering is a government engineering college, so its infrastructure is not so good, but classrooms and library are good, and some labs are under renovation. Some hostel buildings are very old and not very well maintained, but food in mess is good. Canteen is also good, and the sports grounds are in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: It is a green college on the earth.
reviews.review_text: Mostly students choose their college according to how many students get placement, not infrastructure. LDCE infrastructure is very old but many facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, labs, smart classroom with AC, library, etc. Good facilities are provided by LDCE hostel. Best quality of food is available in mess but not introduced in canteen.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing B.Tech. from Faculty of Technology University of Delhi?

faqs.answer: A:    As the University of Delhi's Faculty of Technology is concerned, JEE Main scores are taken into consideration to admit students for B. Tech. That being said, the university may also use scores in Class 12 board examinations for that particular category of students or programs in merit-based admissions. The official website of the university should be checked first before applying to keep up with the changing criteria every other year. This will ensure that those applying are aware of all entrance exams considered, and changes in the process for admission to B. Tech programs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My college has very good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: My course is Electrical Engineering. There are a total of 48 students in my course. My college is new, so no placements have been done yet. Our first year of placement is in 2026. However, some students get internships on their own. For example, one senior of mine is doing an internship at IISM.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good. We have AC rooms with modern benches and smart classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. There is also a library. Where we can study without any noise, with computers available. Most course books are accessible.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A new college that is expected to become something good.

review_content.Placements: Currently, no batch has passed out so we do not have any stats about placements. The placement committee has been constituted formally, but currently it is not working. Nor do we have any idea about how college will help us in internships, so if you are judging colleges by past placement stats, then you should not come here.
review_content.Infrastructure: College’s own building is under construction and got delayed because of some issues with the forest department. Now it will take 2-3 years to complete. Currently, college is using Kannada Bhavan and the new DUCC building which is under construction. Kannada Bhavan is very good but DUCC new building is under construction and does not have Wi-Fi in DUCC. answer.text: Typically, the Faculty of Technology of the University of Delhi is rated as Tier 2 within India's context of engineering colleges. While it is indeed a well-reputed school in terms of academic excellence, faculties at large, and placement opportunities, this faculty still tends to be behind the strong elite Tier 1 institutes such as the Indian Institute of Technology (IITs) and National Institute of Technology (NITs). It is one of the competitive choices for students seeking top-notch education in a prime professional university atmosphere. Still, in its ascending curves, it is a sure bet for young minds aspiring to be future engineers.

faqs.question: Is Faculty of Technology University of Delhi Tier 1 or Tier 2?

answer.text: After qualifying for B.Tech under the Faculty of Technology, Delhi University, students can find employment in nearly all fields. They can get themselves employed as:Software DeveloperSystems AnalystNetwork EngineerData ScientistProject ManagerThe university has strong industry ties. Companies like Deloitte, Infosys, and TCS are regular recruiters from the talent pool. The average salary of the B.Tech graduate is about INR 8 Lacs per annum. The placements here are highly competitive. Some may opt for further studies or pursue specialisations in AI or cybersecurity.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing B.Tech. from Faculty of Technology University of Delhi?

answer.text: Even though the Faculty of Technology, University of Delhi, has an excellent placement record to its credit, it does assure placements to a certain extent only; the university cannot guarantee 100% placement for every student. However, most of its graduates get selected by big companies, but the placement also depends upon the market conditions, the student's performance, and other career choices. In the faculty, active support to students comes through training, workshops, and industry interfaces for upgrading employability. Many of the top companies in the sector ranging from IT, and engineering, to consulting, participate in the recruitment process, thereby creating a strong placement ecosystem for its graduates.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: High fees and unknown placements.

content.Placements: Since Fot is new and started in 2023, placement is unknown, but obviously, they will contact companies, as this college is on the main campus of Delhi University. I can not surely say anything about placement since its a new college. We will get to know about placements next year.
content.Infrastructure: A whole new building is under construction, while some of our classes occur in the old building, with good infrastructure, and come classes in new building, which is not yet complete, with only a few rooms complete. The worst part, but soon, construction will be complete.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: So this is a good college, the faculty are very kind and are well-educated and well-experienced.

content.Placements: As this is a new college, the first batch is yet to pass out in 2027. But as this college comes under Delhi University, which is a premium university and a central university, good placement is expected for the first batch. Top MNCs will be showing up for placement, as said by our dean.
content.Infrastructure: Whole building has Wi-Fi-supported classrooms and labs. Well air-conditioned classes and labs. A huge science library is also there. There are 2 canteens, and the quality of food is good. For sports and games, we have a badminton hall with 8 courts and a football ground. A gym facility is also there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college has very good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: My course is Electrical Engineering. There are a total of 48 students in my course. My college is new, so no placements have been done yet. Our first year of placement is in 2026. However, some students get internships on their own. For example, one senior of mine is doing an internship at IISM.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good. We have AC rooms with modern benches and smart classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. There is also a library. Where we can study without any noise, with computers available. Most course books are accessible.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A new college that is expected to become something good.

content.Placements: Currently, no batch has passed out so we do not have any stats about placements. The placement committee has been constituted formally, but currently it is not working. Nor do we have any idea about how college will help us in internships, so if you are judging colleges by past placement stats, then you should not come here.
content.Infrastructure: College’s own building is under construction and got delayed because of some issues with the forest department. Now it will take 2-3 years to complete. Currently, college is using Kannada Bhavan and the new DUCC building which is under construction. Kannada Bhavan is very good but DUCC new building is under construction and does not have Wi-Fi in DUCC. Classrooms and labs are great; every classroom has AC and smartboard and since college is new, the equipment in labs are also new.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The summary of my college is that it is a good college for courses like CSE, ECE, and EE B.Tech.

content.Placements: Faculty of Technology was started in 2023, so the batch is currently in the 3rd year. There have been no placements so far, but the 3rd-year students have secured good internships, and there is also a dedicated placement cell. FOT comes under DU, so we will surely have good placements in 2027.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by the college are very good. All classrooms have AC and are big enough for every batch. Labs are also well-equipped with all the instruments up to date. They provide us with Wi-Fi, and the speed is mind-blowing. The canteen also serves good and tasty food at a very low cost.

admission_process.title: Faculty of Technology, University of Delhi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Faculty of Technology, University of Delhi admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Faculty of Technology, University of Delhi considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, and ISC for admission to specific courses.Faculty of Technology, University of Delhioffers courses at the UG level.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 4,32,000.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

The fee structure of the Faculty of Technology Course includes various components such as the course fee, the registration fee for JEE Mains, DU Application fee and more. The fee for JEE Main application form for General candidates is INR 1000 for male candidates while for female candidates and reserved category candidates, the application fee amounts to INR 800 and INR 500 respectively.
Find the total tuition fee of the Faculty of Technology course in the table below:

DU BTech application process 2023 started on Jul 5, 2023 and the last date to apply was Jul 25, 2023. Candidates seeking admission to the Delhi University BTech course must apply for the JEE Mains entrance exam and then register their candidature on the official website of Delhi University.
Follow the steps mentioned below, to apply for the Faculty of Technology Course:
Step 1: Visit the admission portal of the University of Delhi BTech, https://engineering.uod.ac.in/
Step 2: Click on "New User Registration" and register using a valid mobile number and Email ID.
Step 3: Create a password and then click on proceed. A confirmation mail will be sent to the registered email.
Step 4: Log in using the registered email and password.

Step 5 Enter the required details, and upload relevant documents. The candidates are advised to carefully fill in all the details because once the application is submitted, the information provided cannot be changed.
Step 6: Pay the application fee.
The category-wise DU BTech application fee is mentioned below:

DU, Faculty of Technology admission is a multi-step process. The DU BTech admission process 2023 started in the month of July with the registration process. Further steps include providing preference for BTech specialisations followed by seat allocation based on the CRL in JEE Mains. The descriptive version of DU BTech admission process is mentioned below:

Candidates seeking admission to FoT BTech must register their candidature on the official website of Delhi University, after appearing for JEE Mains. DU BTech application process is conducted online. Aspirants must fill in the form with utmost care because once submitted the information entered cannot be edited.

DU BTech seat allocation is purely based on the Common Rank List obtained in JEE Main Paper-1. The candidates will be allotted seats in their top-most preferred specialisations considering the following aspects:

Candidates who are allocated seats are required to pay the seat acceptance fee and physically report at the campus for document verification. The Faculty of Technology will be verifying the following:
The Faculty of Technology, Delhi University will be conducting several rounds of seat allocation for the vacant seats.

Kannada Bhavan is very good but DUCC new building is under construction and does not have Wi-Fi in DUCC.
