reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are very good. All classrooms have AC and are big enough for every batch. Labs are also well-equipped with all the instruments up to date. They provide us with Wi-Fi, and the speed is mind-blowing. The canteen also serves good and tasty food at a very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: About faculty of technology, facilities provided, and opportunities available.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are well-equipped with basic facilities like well maintained cooling system, smart boards, and other such basic facilities. Talking about hostels, that is the only shortcoming of our college. There is no specific hostel designed for the students of faculty of technology. But we do have certain number of seats (3-4) in each of the DU hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Better option than private, but it's all about what options you have.
reviews.review_text: Currently, our classes are going on in Maharishi Kanad Bhawan in the Science department of the North campus of DU. Our main building construction is ongoing and is expected to be completed by the end of 2026. No hostel is provided by the college. Many students live in PGs near the campus area, and some live in flats.

reviews.review_heading: College life here is happening. The college has a green campus.
reviews.review_text: Currently, the college does not provide hostels for students. However, there are PGs available nearby the college campus with affordable prices, as well as flats. Wi-Fi is available on the college campus, the labs are well-equipped, and all the classrooms have AC and digital boards.

reviews.review_heading: All I can say is that our college is new, but it will get better over time.
reviews.review_text: As our building is not ready, the construction of our building is going on. It's expected that it will be completed by 2026. And there is no hostel provided by the college. Some students get a university hostel by some reservation. All students live in PGs and flats.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech in DU north campus.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not available and you can apply for DU hostel but it is very less chance that you get it. Main building construction is going on, it is expected that it will be completed in mid-2026. Currently, the Maharishi Kanad Bhawan main building is where classes are running.

reviews.review_heading: I am very hopeful about the placement of the college.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of labs and classrooms and a new campus for FOT is under construction. There is Wi-Fi available everywhere and also we have a central science library but this library is for the whole science department. Canteen, DU hospital for students, and multi-purpose hall for all the games are available here.

reviews.review_heading: There is no campus life, no sports, and no hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have its own building, and it runs classes in another building. They don't provide any hostel facilities. Wi-Fi is available, but with very low speed. The canteen is available inside, with cheap food, but it is not so good. The college has a medical facility, and there is no sports facility.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good for studies, but it doesn't have a good environment.
reviews.review_text: There is no permanent building available; current classes and labs are stabilized in Maharishi Kanad Bhawan. The facilities include a good Wi-Fi connection and fully air-conditioned classrooms and labs. Currently, we are permitted to use the central science library. There are many canteens, some of them are government-authorized and some are private, and they offer good options at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied, please don't go to this college. I left this college after doing 1st year.
reviews.review_text: There is only one building which you can call your college. They say the new building is under construction but it will take a lot of time. The labs and equipment are good, and Wi-Fi is available. The library is there but you will not find any useful books there. The college doesn't have anything of its own, they are begging from the university.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not fully satisfied with college, but I'm hopeful it give us good opportunities in the future.
reviews.review_text: There is no separate building for FOT B.Tech. Classes are conducted in the main North Campus of Delhi University. The assigned building has a limited number of rooms, but it is sufficient for two consecutive batches of students. Labs are good, but there are no sports facilities or games available. Wi-Fi facility is available. There are no hostels for B.Tech students. The food quality in the university canteen is extremely good, and medical facilities are also available.

data.description: The candidates are not eligible for direct admission into the Faculty of Technology at the University of Delhi for the B.Tech. programme. The candidates qualify in the entrance test conducted for JEE Main, and admission is given strictly based on rank obtained in JEE Main. Post entrance exam of JEE Main, the universities take applications through their own portal, in which seat allotment takes place. However, admission criteria also require a minimum 60% in 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. So, there is hardly any scope for direct entry without following these criteria.

paragraphs: Chanakya University admissionsare entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Chanakya University is as per the steps below:

The mode of application is online. Students need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://admissions.chanakyauniversity.in/pg-application-form., for admission to the various programme. The application fee is INR 1,000. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
The university admits students based on Chanakya University Pravesha Pareeksha/CAT/MAT/XAT/GMAT/ATMA/CUPP. It also considers the students academic performance for final selection.

Once done with the exam scores the University conducts PI for the candidates. Aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted students need to come for verification of documents and pay theChanakya University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

college_info.college_name: Chanakya University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Chanakya University has released its concession policy for the Academic Year 2025-26. The University offers fee concessions to students based on different eligibility criteria. Merit-based scholarships are only available for direct admission candidates (paying the full fee). The University offers these scholarships for eligible students of first-year. To prove the eligibility criteria, students must provide supporting documents and an application form. Enlisted below are the Chanakya University Scholarships for Academic Year 2025-26:
Chanakya University offers merit-based scholarships to UG programme students with different eligibility criteria. Candidates must secure the below-mentioned scores and secure a scholarship:

Similarly, Chanakya University offers PG Programme Merit-Based Concessions on the basis of courses such as MBA and other PG-level programmes. The eligibility criteria require candidates to secure valid scores in previous qualifying examinations. Below is the list of the qualification criteria along with the concession amount:

Chanakya University offers means-based scholarships to candidates belonging to different criteria such as wards of Defence Serving and Retired/ Serving Police personnel, single parent (mother only), state-level sports person, national-level sports person, orphans and physically challenged. The eligibility criteria include a minimum aggregate of 50% to 70%. The scholarship values from INR 25K to 25% or 50% relaxation in tuition fee. However, the scholarship amount varies for the Physically Challenged Students.

Chanakya University offers a concession to candidates pursuing UG or PG-level courses. To be eligible for the Chanakya University admission process, for majority of courses, candidates are required to appear for the CUET entrance exam. Valid scores in the CUET examination are further required to qualify for the scholarship criteria, offering a concession to eligible candidates scoring 85% to 95% plus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: TIST Arakkunnam: An honest review from a fresher.

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent for CSE, IT, and Safety branches. Mass recruiters like TCS and Infosys offer an average of 3.5–4.5 LPA, though high packages can reach 12 LPA. The placement cell offers dedicated training for technical grounds, which is a huge advantage when trying to crack higher package offers.
review_content.Infrastructure: TIST has a green, open campus that offers a quiet place to study. The labs are well equipped, and the large library is a really useful resource for students. Overall, the infrastructure is practical and simple, making it a good spot to focus on coursework.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements in the past couple of years in our college.

review_content.Placements: The average LPA that our CS branch has received during the past academic year has been around 6–6.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Cognizant, Infosys, UST, and KarTech. Currently, the placement drive is still going on, and as of now, companies like UST, Infosys, and Cognizant have recruited a good number of students and have offered good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. Wi-Fi often seems to be slow, especially in the basement-level labs. Classrooms and libraries are well maintained. All necessary resources are provided in the library. Regarding sports, necessary training and coaching are provided for students in football, kho-kho, etc., for both boys and girls. The food in the canteen is healthy, budget-friendly, and satisfactory.

faqs.question: Q: What are the top courses offered at CUSAT Cochin?

faqs.answer: Yes, CUSAT offers a BSc degree to students. Candidates willing to pursue a BSc at CUSAT have to enrol themselves into the Integrated MSc programme offered at CUSAT. The university offers eight Integrated BSc + MSc courses in the full-time mode. The duration of these courses is five years, which is further divided into ten semesters. Candidates successfully completing six semesters of the programme are eligible to exit the programme with a BSc degree. For more information, candidates can visit the official website of the university.

In 2023 rankings, the university made a position jump to 37. Looking at the placement, CUSAT MBA 2023 placements statistics are also available. The highest and average package offered to the participants of the placement drive stood at INR 20.14 LPA and INR 9.32 LPA, respectively. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech CSE at CUSAT?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech in CSE at CUSAT is INR 3.61 lakh. CUSAT CAT is used for BTech course admission. The primary requirements for admission to the BTech Computer Science programme are a Class 12 certificate and an overall percentage of 50% in PCM and 50% in Mathematics. While SEBC students from Kerala State (non-creamy layer category) are entitled toa 5% relaxation in qualifying exam scores, the Kerala Scheduled Caste (KSC) and Kerala Scheduled Tribe (KST) populations simply need pass marks.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the fee for BSc at CUSAT?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for CUSAT Integrated BSc-MSc programme ranges between 53,850 and INR 1.56 lakh. The fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Apart from tuition fee, the total fee structure includes library fee, lab fee, caution deposit, etc.Apart from the course fee, candidates also need to pay an application fee. The application fee for General is INR 1,500 (for a maximum of two test codes). For Kerala SC/ ST candidates, there is a relaxation in the application fee.

review_summary.college_name: CUSAT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College offers a good campus life.

content.Placements: About 75 percent of students are placed through campus interviews themselves. The highest package in the last academic year for Computer Science and Engineering was 14 LPA from a Japanese company. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, IBM, etc. Most of the roles are for software engineers.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure. All classrooms are properly vented and kept tidy. There are 3 libraries in total in each block. College has separate hostels for boys and girls inside the campus itself, and the food and accommodation in the hostel are well settled.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Supportive teaching and good placement training.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are good. Students become eligible for placements in the final year. Our college provides regular training in aptitude, soft skills, and interview preparation. Many reputed companies visit the campus every year, like Infosys, Wipro, and IBM. About 70 percent of students got placed in different companies, and they got a package from 3 LPA to 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is spacious and well-maintained. Classrooms have projectors and boards. The laboratories are equipped with many systems for practical learning. The library has a good collection of textbooks and reference books. Computer labs have proper internet access and updated software.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: TIST Arakkunnam: An honest review from a fresher.

content.Placements: Placements are decent for CSE, IT, and Safety branches. Mass recruiters like TCS and Infosys offer an average of 3.5–4.5 LPA, though high packages can reach 12 LPA. The placement cell offers dedicated training for technical grounds, which is a huge advantage when trying to crack higher package offers.
content.Infrastructure: TIST has a green, open campus that offers a quiet place to study. The labs are well equipped, and the large library is a really useful resource for students. Overall, the infrastructure is practical and simple, making it a good spot to focus on coursework.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in the past couple of years in our college.

content.Placements: The average LPA that our CS branch has received during the past academic year has been around 6–6.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Cognizant, Infosys, UST, and KarTech. Currently, the placement drive is still going on, and as of now, companies like UST, Infosys, and Cognizant have recruited a good number of students and have offered good packages.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. Wi-Fi often seems to be slow, especially in the basement-level labs. Classrooms and libraries are well maintained. All necessary resources are provided in the library. Regarding sports, necessary training and coaching are provided for students in football, kho-kho, etc., for both boys and girls. The food in the canteen is healthy, budget-friendly, and satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It has good placements and a calm campus, but self-effort matters a lot.

content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering batch of the College of Engineering, Chengannur. Around 65-75 percent of students from our course got placed through campus placements, mainly in IT and software roles. The highest package offered ranges from 25-30 LPA, which is offered to a few exceptional students. The average package ranges from 4-6 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 3-3.5 LPA. Major recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, EY, Accenture, IBM, and UST Global. Around 40-50% of students secured internships through self-effort, college support, or online platforms. Common roles offered are software engineer, system engineer, analyst, and related positions.

admission_overview.college_name: CUSAT Course Admissions 2025: Dates, Eligibility, Selection, Application

admission_overview.title: CUSAT Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: CUSAT admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts CUSAT CAT or Cochin University of Science and Technology Common Admission Test to shortlist candidates for some of the programme. Entrance exams are also conducted at university level for lateral entry to BTech courses. Apart from CUSAT CAT, Cochin University also accepts CAT, GATE, KMAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. CUSAT conducts Department Admission Test (DAT) for PhD, post-doctoral, and PG diploma programme admission. The university offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG, PhD, post-doctoral, and PG diploma levels in multiple streams like Science, Technology, Management, etc. BTech is the flagship course of CUSAT, admission to which is based on CUSAT CAT scores. Interested candidates can fill out the CUSAT application form online on the university's website.

eligibility_selection.title: CUSAT Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: CUSAT admission criteria vary course-wise. CUSAT CAT is one of the criteria for admission to most of the courses.Cochin University of Science and Technology conducts CAT or Common Admission Test in online mode to select candidates for admission to most of the programmes. Apart from entrance exam, aspirants also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria. Class 12 is the minimum requirement for UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG courses. Check below popular CUSAT courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 examination of the state of Kerala or any other examination accepted as equivalent thereto with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry as optional subjects with at least 50% marks separately and 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SEBC candidates of Kerala)
Bachelor's degree in any subject with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SEBC candidates of Kerala State who are certified as belonging to the non-creamy layer)
courses_table.selection_criteria: CUSAT CAT/ KMAT/ CMAT/ and IIM-CAT + GDPI

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate to 75% aggregate (5% relaxation for Kerala SC/ ST)
BSc degree in relevant subjects with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate to Kerala SC/ ST)
BCA/ Bachelor's degree in CS/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc Data Analytics with Mathematics with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate to Kerala SC/ ST)
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 65% aggregate with Mathematics/ Statistics as one of the Subjects (60% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates belonging to Kerala)

faqs.answer: Cochin University of Science and Technology admission to MSc programmes is based on the CUSAT CAT (Common Admission Test) score. The entrance exam is conducted by the Directorate of Admissions. Candidates who appear for the entrance examination and secure a good score shall be eligible to take admission.  Besidesm aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements specific to MSc specialisations.
faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for admission to M.Sc at CUSAT?

faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 or equivalent with at least 65% aggregate with Mathematics/ Statistics as one of the Subjects to apply for BVoc at Cochin University of Science and Technology. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST candidates belonging to Kerala. Hence, candidates can apply for BVoc with 65% in Class 12. However, they also need to pass CUSAT CAT for admission to BVoc programme.
faqs.question: Is 65% in Class 12 enough to get BVoc at Cochin University of Science and Technology?

faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed BCA/ Bachelor's degree in CS/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc Data Analytics with Mathematics with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate to Kerala SC/ ST) are eligible to apply for MCA at Cochin University of Science and Technology. Candidates should have relevant documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

paragraphs: Cochin University of Science and Technology admissionis a multi-step process. Candidates have to register, appear for selection rounds and finally book their seats by paying the programme fee. Cochin University of Science and Technology conducts an entrance examination by itself for admissions into both UG and PG courses. However, candidates are also allowed to apply for examination based on scores obtained in any national or state level entrance exams. Below is step-wiseCUSAT admission process:

1: CUSAT Application Process 2025:Candidates can apply online for the course of their choice on the official website of CUSAT. Below is the application fee that aspirants need to pay to register for a course.
Application Fee
INR 1,500 to appear for two test codes
Kerala SC/ ST candidates
INR 700 to appear for two test codes

CUSAT shortlists candidates for most of the courses based onCUSAT CAT results. CUSAT CAT is a computer-based test which has a different syllabus for each course admission. Below is the admission criteria for the top courses:
CUSAT BTech Admission 2025:CUSAT offers admission to its flagship programme i.e. BTech based on CUSAT CAT scores of the candidates. The university also accepts admission for BTech (lateral entry).

CUSAT Integrated Law Admission 2025:The university offers five-year Integrated Law programmes-BA LLB (Hons), BCom LLB (Hons) and BSc LLB (Hons). The selection for these courses is based on CUSAT CAT scores of the candidates.
CUSAT PG Admission 2025:At the PG level, the university offers MSc, MTech, MBA and LLB programmes. The university accepts scores in GATE for MTech, KMAT, CAT and CMAT for MBA.
CUSAT PhD Admission 2025:The university shortlists candidates for PhD based on their score in DAT. The test has two parts: a written and an interview.

CUSAT releases a rank list based on the performance of the candidates in the selection rounds. The university uses tie-breaking policy to shortlist candidates with same rank. Aspirants must score equal or above theCUSAT cutofffor admission. Below is the CUSAT Round-3 cutoff:

Once the rank list is released, selected candidates must come for document verification andCUSAT CAT Counselling. They need to pay a programme fee to confirm their seat at the university. Below are the documents required at the time of seat allotment:
Download:CUSAT Documents Check-List

CUSAT fees include multiple components like tuition, library, lab, quasi, etc. There is also a one-time caution deposit that candidates need to pay at the time of admission. There is a relaxation in fees for SC/ ST candidates.
CUSAT follows a fee refund policy in case of cancellation or withdrawal of admission. A 100% refund is processed in case of admission cancellation before the formally notified last date of admission.
Find belowCUSAT feeand average package for top courses:
NOTE:The given fee information is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

CUSAT refunds some percentage of fee depending on the time of admission cancellation. A maximum of 100% refund is done. The refund is applicable on the aggregate fee which excludes the caution deposit and refundable deposits, if any. Below is the fee refund policy followed at CUSAT:

CUSAT intake varies course-wise. The university reserves some percentage of seats under different categories like State Merit Seats and All India Merit Seats, All India Quota. The seats are also reserved for sports persons, differently abled candidates, Children of staff of CUSAT, Children of Ex-Servicemen, etc. Below is theCUSAT seat intakefor top courses:
NOTE:The given fee information is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Out of the total intake for each course, some are supernumerary seats. The university reserves some seats for students belonging from Kerala. Aspirants should have relevant document proving their claim to get the reserved seat. Below is CUSAT seat reservation policy:
For more information about CUSAT check out the below videos:

courses_data.description: CUSAT offers full-time and part-timeMBAprogrammes through the School of Management Studies. MBA is a two-year course spread across four semesters. Part-time MBA is a three-year course divided into six semesters. The university offers full-time MBA in various specialisations such as Marketing, Finance, HRM, International Business, IT Management, etc. Aspirants who have passed a bachelor's degree in any subject with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SEBC candidates of Kerala State who are certified as belonging to the non-creamy layer) are eligible to apply for the MBA programme. The selection for this course is based on scores of the candidates in CUSAT-CAT, KMAT, CMAT or IIM-CAT followed by GDPI.

The other is CUSAT CAT conducted by Cochin University of Science and Technology. CUSAT CAT is accepted for MBA and other courses except PhD and Diploma programmes. faqs.question: How many marks should I score in the CUSAT entrance exam to get admission to computer science?
faqs.answer: Computer Science Engineering is a popular BTech specialisation offered at CUSAT. Aspirants need to qualify CUSAT CAT to get a seat in BTech CSE. As per previous year CUSAT CAT cutoff for BTech for General Category, aspirants need to secure a rank under 700 to get a seat in the BTech CSE programme. CSE is a highly competitive branch of BTech. Hence, candidates must prepare well to get a seat in this course.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for CUSAT MBA?
faqs.answer: After graduation, candidates can apply for CUSAT MBA. Below is detailed eligibility criteria:Aspirants who have passed a bachelor's degree in any subject with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SEBC candidates of Kerala State who are certified as belonging to non-creamy layer) can apply for MBA programme.Candidates belonging to Kerala Scheduled Caste (KSC) and Kerala Scheduled Tribe (KST) communities are eligible for applying, if they have minimum pass marks in the qualifying degree.

faqs.answer: Yes,  250 is a great score. Candidates securing 250 in CUSAT CAT can get into any of the BTech specialisation. As per the previous year CUSAT CAT cutoffs, aspirants with a rank below 300 have a great chance of getting into some of the top BTech specialisations like Computer Science and Engineering, Naval Architecture and Ship Building, Electronics and Communication Engineering, etc.

faqs.question: Is CUSAT good for BTech?

The programme is quite affordable as compared to many of the good BTech offering universities. The total tuition fee for BTech ranges between INR 85,800 and INR 8.6 Lacs depending on the specialisation selected by the candidate.Talking about placements, the highest and average package offered during CUSATBTechplacements 2023 stood atINR 25 LPAandINR 5.88 LPA,

faqs.question: Is there MSc in CUSAT?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers full-time MSc in 19 disciplines along with seven integrated MSc (five-year) courses. Admission to the course is entrance-based. faqs.question: What is the expected CUSAT CAT 2024 cutoff?
faqs.answer: Cochin University of Science and Technology admission 2024 to MBA course is based CUSAT MBA 2024 scores. As per the previous year's CUSAT MBA cutoff 2023, the overall cutoff for MBA for All India quota is 83, whereas for Home State Quota, it is 73. placement_report.college_name: CUSAT Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: CUSAT Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the latest media report, the highest and average packages offered so far during CUSAT placement 2024 stood at INR 25 LPA and INR 7.32 LPA, respectively . Further, the participating recruiters offered over 700 job offers to various courses of the batch 2024 . The top recruiters of Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) placement in 2024 included ISCO, TCS, Accenture, Air India, IBM, MRF, Ernst & Young, Hyundai, Visteon, Alstom, Zifo, SAP, Reliance Industries, IOCL, Gail, etc.

Earlier, CUSAT released the placement stats for its MBA batch that graduated in 2023. According to the report, the highest and average packages offered to the MBA students during CUSAT placement 2024 stood at INR 21.20 LPA and INR 8.55 LPA, respectively . The students of the MBA batch 2023 received a total of 144 job offers from reputed companies. Some of the top regular MBA recruiters of Cochin University of Science and Technology include EY, TCS, Kellogg's, SAP, DHL, HDFC Bank, Khimi Ramdas, Reliance, among others.
Download: CUSAT MBA Placement Brochure 2023-2024

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech CSE at CUSAT?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech in CSE at CUSAT is INR 3.61 lakh . CUSAT CAT is used for BTech course admission. The primary requirements for admission to the BTech Computer Science programme are a Class 12 certificate and an overall percentage of 50% in PCM and 50% in Mathematics. While SEBC students from Kerala State (non-creamy layer category) are entitled toa 5% relaxation in qualifying exam scores, the Kerala Scheduled Caste (KSC) and Kerala Scheduled Tribe (KST) populations simply need pass marks.

faqs.question: What is MCA Cost Sharing in CUSAT?
faqs.answer: The university offers a two-year MCA course in Cost Sharing specialisation. Admission to the PG course is through CUSAT CAT. The seat intake for the course is 78 + 2 Sponsored seats. This mentioned seat intake includes supernumerary seats and is the total seat intake for the Department of Computer Applications, Campus 1 and CUCEK Campus 2.

description: Cochin University of Science and Technology. Kochi cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various UG and PG courses. Candidates seeking admission can scroll down to view sections across different exams. courses. rounds. and categories.A few more updates for the CUSAT cutoff are given below:

The CUSAT KEAM Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BTech programmes for all rounds and categories belonging to the Home State quota. As per the last round closing cutoff rank for the General HS category, the cutoff ranged from 10038 to 66316, wherein B.Tech. in in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be toughest course for admission for this category. Students can refer to the table below to know the first and last round closing cutoff for the General HS category candidates.

The CUSAT BTech Cutoff 2025 is out on the basis of the KEAM entrance examination. The most sought-after course was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at College of Engineering, Chengannur, followed by B.Tech. in in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with the closing cutoff in the last round being 10038 and 12439, respectively. Students can refer to the table below to view the cutoff for 2025, 2024 and 2023 for various categories, rounds, and specialisations.

CUSAT accepts the KEAM entrance examination results, followed by KEAM counselling for admission to the BTech programmes. Students who are aiming for admission can see the table below to know the important dates for admission.

Cochin University of Science and Technology Common Admission Test (CUSAT CAT) is conducted by Cochin University of Science and Technology for admission to various courses in multiple streams, including Engineering, Environmental Studies, and Humanities, etc.

The CUSAT BTech Cutoff 2025 according to the CUSAT CAT examination in the last round closing ranks ranged from to for the General AI category. Wherein, BTech CSE, usually the most sought-after specialisation had the cutoff of

In this section, students can see the cutoff for 2025, as well as for 2024 and 2023 for all rounds and categories under the Home State category. Only in the absence of sufficient number of GATE qualified candidates, candidates without GATE Score will be considered for admission on the basis of score obtained in the Test (DAT) conducted by the Department concerned.

The CUSAT MBA cutoff 2024 has been concluded with the release of Round 2 cutoff. According to CUSAT cutoff 2024, the closing rank for Cochin University of Science and Technology MBA course stood at 163 for Al India General category students. For cutoff 2023, the overall closing rank for CUSAT MBA was 83. And similarly for 2022, the cutoff was 76. It can be easily observed, that CUSAT has witnessed an increase since 2022.

highlights.description: CUSAT is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #50 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Overall, #32 under University, #82 under Management, #13 under Law, and #6 under State Public University. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. nirf.description:
As per the overall score, CUSAT has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2025, CUSAT climbed 1 rank to #50 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, CUSAT climbed 2 ranks to #32 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'Management' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, CUSAT fell 1 rank to #82 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

qs_world.description:
CUSAT has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, CUSAT climbed 92 ranks to #509 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, CUSAT climbed 47 ranks to #132 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

library.description: The Library has a collection of 95000 inclusive of several valuable reference books,  doctoral theses and back volumes of periodicals, patents, 51 Indian Journals, 92 foreign print journals, CD-ROM etc. The Library has started a special Collections Section on the top floor of the building.  It includes a collection of theses, patents, art books, census reports, vipassana Rekha and books on library and information science. Central Library subscribes to about 45 online journals and 13 databases and about 15,000 e-journals also available through various consortiums.

sports.description: CUSAT also encourages students to participate in extracurricular activities and organises cultural events quite frequently, such as the University Youth Festival, Talent Showcases, and plenty of other sports events. Students are also motivated to take part in various student clubs like HR, marketing, NSS, and NCC for a holistic approach to life at Cochin University.

cafeteria.description: The campus cafe opens from 8:00 am to 8:00 pm on all working days including Saturdays. A wide variety of South Indian and North Indian dishes are available. During lunchtime, meals are available at very nominal rates.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College offers a good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure. All classrooms are properly vented and kept tidy. There are 3 libraries in total in each block. College has separate hostels for boys and girls inside the campus itself, and the food and accommodation in the hostel are well settled.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive teaching and good placement training.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious and well-maintained. Classrooms have projectors and boards. The laboratories are equipped with many systems for practical learning. The library has a good collection of textbooks and reference books. Computer labs have proper internet access and updated software.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: TIST Arakkunnam: An honest review from a fresher.
reviews.review_text: TIST has a green, open campus that offers a quiet place to study. The labs are well equipped, and the large library is a really useful resource for students. Overall, the infrastructure is practical and simple, making it a good spot to focus on coursework.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the past couple of years in our college.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. Wi-Fi often seems to be slow, especially in the basement-level labs. Classrooms and libraries are well maintained. All necessary resources are provided in the library. Regarding sports, necessary training and coaching are provided for students in football, kho-kho, etc., for both boys and girls. The food in the canteen is healthy, budget-friendly, and satisfactory.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by College of Engineering, ChengannurReviewed on 2 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has good placements and a calm campus, but self-effort matters a lot.
reviews.review_text: For the CSE department at College of Engineering, Chengannur, classrooms and labs are decent and sufficient for regular academic needs. Labs have the required systems and software. The library is well-maintained with enough textbooks and reference materials. Hostel facilities are average, with basic rooms and manageable living conditions. Mess food quality is mixed, while the canteen is useful for snacks. Basic medical facilities are available. Sports facilities exist but are limited and mostly ...

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for doing an M.Sc. in Forensic Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is very good. The laboratory here is very good and big, and all the materials are available for practical classes. The classrooms are very modern. The college has separate hostels for boys and girls. The quality of food in the hostel is very good. The college has its own big campus where all kinds of outdoor games are played.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for M.Sc. in Chemistry.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was very good. There was a hostel facility here for which you have to pay a small amount separately. But the hostel facilities were very good. There was a big playground in the college campus where all kinds of outdoor games were played. The college had a central library where all kinds of books were available for free. The quality of food in the canteen was also very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Cochin University College of Engineering Kuttanad, Cochin University of Science and Technology, KochiReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Although it's a good campus, there are some negatives. Should improve the sports activities.
reviews.review_text: The department has good computer labs with some updated systems, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and a central library with academic books, journals, and digital resources. Labs support practical learning effectively. There is no hostel for the college currently. However, there are many private apartments.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, good faculty, and energetic events. Good placement and worth money.
reviews.review_text: If you are joining as a first-year student for B.Tech, the chance of getting a college hostel (university hostel) is very low unless you have any sort of reservation. But you will eventually get it in the following 2nd or 3rd year. But you can get good guest facilities near the campus at a low cost (not as low as a college hostel).

reviews.review_heading: There are many opportunities for growth, and placements are consistent.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and classrooms have smart boards. Labs have AC, but some equipment is outdated and of poor quality. The university library is really good, spacious, and has AC rooms. Mess and canteen food are average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Cochin University of Science and Technology, Kochi.
reviews.review_text: We also have a great library with a wide variety of book genres. Our canteen is very affordable and has good food. Hostel facilities are limited.

reviews.review_heading: CUSAT overview of performance, reputation, and student life explained.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is mediocre, but library facilities are quite well. The canteen in SOE is empty most of the time as none really goes there. Hostel mess food is quite nice with monthly fests and all. For sports, there are courts and grounds, and it is quite active after college hours.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, ChengannurReviewed on 12 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the lack of events and campus life, but teaching and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is good, but not hostel, the boys' hostel is only available for first years, and a minimum number of students are admitted, while others need to look for paying guest houses. Girls' hostels are available for all years, and 3 girls' hostels are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a vast ocean of memories.
reviews.review_text: It provides everything you could ask for from a university. You ask for education, you get that. You ask for a library, you have that too. You ask for connections or meeting new people, you definitely get that. You ask for comfort, budget-friendliness, etc. You have it.

reviews.review_heading: Other than the contact faculty members, everything is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is basic, nothing more than that. The Wi-Fi is good. Labs are also good, and we do have a great university library and okayish classrooms. The hostels are mostly well-kept, and the mess food is awesome. There is a dedicated sports arena for those who are interested in them.

highlights.summary:
WOXSEN University Admissions Open

Woxsen University admissions 2026 are open for UG and PG courses. Find below other recent updates:

college_info.intro:
Woxsen University Hyderabad has 7 constituent schools. Some of the schools of study are the Woxsen School of Business, Woxsen School of Technology, & Woxsen School of Art and Design, etc. Woxsen University Telangana schools has a wide range of programmes at the UG, PG, PhD, & executive levels. Woxsen University courses are offered across many streams like Management, Arts and Design, Law, Technology, & Sciences. MBA/PGDM is the most popular course among the students going for admissions followed by BTech & Bachelor of Design (BDes). Woxsen University is known as the Top MBA University Hyderabad. These students get good placements in good organisations. The highest & average packages offered during Woxsen University BTech placements for the year 2025 were INR 24 LPA and 9.50 LPA. For the MBA course, the highest and average packages offered to the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 19 LPA and INR 9.10 LPA. respectively.
Woxsen University Hyderabad students learn technology education through advanced learning techniques like Industry Exposure, Applied Learning, & International Student Exchange. The university has 24 student clubs, events, competitions, and other facilities available for the development of students.
Check the below video to know more about Woxsen University courses:

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for teach researchers only

review_content.Placements: Till now, only one batch has completed with the highest 24 LPA. The current batch is facing a little bit of issues with placements, and now my college is trying to collaborate with new companies to get more students placed. We are the fourth batch of it.
review_content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is provided for every room and classroom. The library contains a minimum number of books on the teach field. The teach contains a large number of GPUs for faster processing and running of programs. The mess has very good food.

reviews_list.review_title: Campus is peaceful, wonderful, world-class infrastructure, and greenery.

review_summary.college_name: Woxsen University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It offers good campus facilities and supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: I am from the 2028 passing out batch of the B.Tech. My branch is CSE data science. Our course focuses on data science subjects along with industry-oriented training, internships, and technical skills development. Around 85-90 percent of the eligible students from our course got placed through the campus recruitment process. The package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA. Infosys is the top recruiting company for our course. A top role offered is a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi, programming and computing labs, projectors, and a smart board. The library has a large collection of textbooks and reference books. Regular housekeeping is done. The mess provides hygienic and balanced meals, with a rotating weekly menu. First-aid services are provided. It has indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Woxsen University.

content.Placements: Placements have been great so far. The highest package is at 24 LPA, the lowest is 7 LPA, and the average is 10 LPA. These are the statistics for the first batch to graduate. They graduated last year, and our 2025 batch is yet to graduate. But their placements are impressive so far, considering they are just the second B.Tech batch to graduate.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good. Classrooms are interactive, and each class contains 58 students. The hostel and food are also really good. Sports facilities meet international standards, and the campus is full of hangout spots, especially the library, a student hotspot.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college for teach researchers only

content.Placements: Till now, only one batch has completed with the highest 24 LPA. The current batch is facing a little bit of issues with placements, and now my college is trying to collaborate with new companies to get more students placed. We are the fourth batch of it.
content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is provided for every room and classroom. The library contains a minimum number of books on the teach field. The teach contains a large number of GPUs for faster processing and running of programs. The mess has very good food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Blockchain, IoT and Cybersecurity) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Campus is peaceful, wonderful, world-class infrastructure, and greenery.

content.Placements: 80%-90% of students got placed. The highest package is 24 LPA, the lowest is 7 LPA, and the average is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are JTP, Scientific, Ariqt, and Suhora - 75% of students are getting internships. Top roles include developer, machine learning engineer, and data engineer.
content.Infrastructure: - The whole campus is equipped with Wi-Fi - 10th the largest Library - Fully-furnished Classrooms - Technical advanced Labs - Good Food - Spacious Hostel Room (2 per each room & 3 per each room) - We have a General Store which almost all consists of the things we can buy - We have a hospital for students - We have sports arena and fields and Gyms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good and safe environment.

content.Placements: Woxsen University has emerged as a leading institution with 80% to 90% of students got placed and with the highest package of 24 LPA, the average is 10 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 7 LPA. JTP and Centrific are the top companies for the B.Tech course. About 75% of students from the course got internships in the field of development.
content.Infrastructure: College has good infrastructure compared to other top-class universities. Good arena for sports to showcase our extracurricular activities. Hostels are so hygienic and clean, and they are so good to stay. Food in the canteen is also good. It's a good and peaceful environment to get a degree.

admission_overview.college_name: Woxsen University Admissions 2026 (OPEN): Courses, Fees, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Woxsen University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Woxsen University admission 2026 is open. The university offers both merit and entrance-based admissions to candidates. Woxsen University conducts its entrance exams, like W-JEET and WAT, for admission to specific courses. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams such as GMAT, GRE, NMAT, JEE Main, etc.. Woxsen University offers various courses across various specialisations at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels. Interested applicants must start by applying online/ offline for admission.

eligibility_selection.title: Woxsen University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Woxsen University admission is primarily entrance-based. Candidates have to check and meet the minimum eligibility criteria to apply for the respective UG & PG courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for the Woxsen University Hyderabad admission 2026: Course Name

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in Science discipline with at least 55% aggregate
courses_table.selection_criteria: JEE Main, VITEEE, TS EAMCET, MHT CET, or W-JEET + Personal Interview (PI)

courses_table.eligibility: UG in relevant discipline with at least 60% aggregate
courses_table.selection_criteria: GMAT/ GRE/ NMAT/ XAT/ CAT/ WAT+ Personal Interview

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board, with a minimum aggregate of 55%
Class 12 in any discipline with at least 55% aggregate
Class 12 with minimum 55% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics subjects, or 10+3 diploma examination with Mathematics as a compulsory subject.

faqs.answer: First and foremost, applicants must meet the minimal requirements for admission to Woxsen University's three-year BBA (Hons) program. Applications for this course are open to students who completed Class 12 with a minimum cumulative grade of 55% from an accredited board. Applying for a BBA at Woxsen does not need enrollment in a particular stream. Every applicant must fulfill the minimal educational requirements.
faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for BBA at Woxsen University?

faqs.answer: Students have to meet the basic eligibility to get admission in Woxsen University. The eligibility may change depending on the programme. The basic eligibility and minimum percentile for Woxsen University admission is tabulated below:Course NameEligibility BTechClass 12 in Science discipline with at least 55% aggregateMBA UG in relevant discipline with at least 60% aggregateBBA (Hons)Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board, with a minimum aggregate of 55%BA (Hons)Class 12 in any discipline with at least 55% aggregate B.ArchClass 12 or Class 12 scheme of examination with minimum 55% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics subjects, or 10+3 Diploma examination with Mathematics as a compulsory subject.
faqs.question: How much percentile is required for Woxsen University?

faqs.answer: Woxsen University offers admission to three MBA courses namely MBA General, MBA Financial Services and MBA Business Analytics through NMAT scores. Candidates with a valid score are only eligible for the further admissions round of  Psychometric Test and the Personal Interview. Candidates seeking MBA admission can check out Woxsen University NMAT cutoff trends in the table mentioned below for the General category All india candidates:Section20222023NMAT Overall Score160160
faqs.question: What is Woxsen University NMAT cutoff 2023?

paragraphs: Woxsen University admissionis a multi-step process. Check below the five simple steps that candidates need to take for Woxsen University course admission:

Candidates need to submit their application form online on the official website of the university before the Woxsen University application last date. The applicant should provide all of the information requested in the application, both in the mandatory and non-mandatory sections.

As per the Woxsen University admission process, candidates will either need to appear for the University-level or the national-level entrance exam. Aspirants must check the entrance exam accepted for the course of their choice. W-JEET and WAT are conducted by the university for admission to specific courses. National-level entrance exams like GMAT, GRE, NMAT, JEE Main, etc., are also accepted.
Candidates shortlisted based on the entrance exam need to come for the personal interview round. The emphasis is on oral communication skills, conduct, confidence, and clarity of expression.

Candidates who meet the Composite Score requirements based on the three steps outlined above will be updated and will receive a provisional offer letter. Candidates will be given seven days to accept or decline the offer.
Check out more aboutWoxsen University Admission Processin the video below:
lists: Appear for the Online Entrance Exam

faqs.question: Can I join BBA (Hons) at Woxsen University without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, there is no provision of direct admission for BBA (Hons) at Woxsen University. Aspirants have to qualify for either WAT or CUET UG exam with a valid score. The selection criteria for BBA (Hons) at Woxsen University considers entrance exam scores and performance of candidates in Personal Interview round conducted at the university itself. Click here for the detailed Woxsen University BBA (Hons) admission process.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for BBA (Hons) in Woxsen University?
faqs.answer: Woxsen University conducts WAT, which is an in-house entrance exam of Woxsen University. WAT is an online 1 hour test of 100 marks comprises questions around Quantitative Aptitude, English, Reasoning, Reading Comprehension, and General Knowledge. There is no negative marking applicable in WAT. Candidates can also apply via a valid score of CUET UG, which is conducted every year by NTA.

faqs.question: Is EAMCET accepted at Woxsen University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Woxsen University accepts EAMCET exam scores for admission to BTech course. Candidates can qualify for this exam to secure a seat to BTech course. Further, the university also accepts valid scores of entrance exams such as VITEEE, MHT CET, W-JEET, etc. Admission to all courses at Woxsen University is entirely based on scores of respective entrance exams.

faqs.question: How can I apply for Woxsen University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are willing to be admitted to BBA (Hons) at Woxsen University must fill an online application form by visiting the official website of the university. The stepwise application process for Woxsen University BBA (Hons) admission 2025 is mentioned below:Step 1:Visit the official website (woxsen.edu.in).Click on ‘Apply Now’ on the Home page.Register with basic details to generate login credentials.Fill out the application form and pay the application fee of INR 2,000.Upload all the documents.Submit and print the application form.Step 2:Appear for the Online Entrance Test – WAT (Woxsen Aptitude Test) or submit your SAT, CUET scoresStep 3:Participate in the Personal Interview round, where you get the opportunity to share more about yourself, your interests, and aspirations.

placement_report.college_name: Woxsen University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Woxsen University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Woxsen University has announced its placement statistics for 2025 concerning BBA, MBA, BDes, and BTech programs. The placement cell has successfully offered excellent job opportunities to its students. In the 2025 Woxsen University placement, the MBA , BBA , and BTech courses attained a placement rate of 100% . The BDes department achieved a placement rate of 97% . The highest package offered to the students was INR 19 LPA . The highest and average packages offered to the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 19 LPA and INR 9.10 LPA . respectively.

The highest and median packages offered to the BTech batch 2025 stood at INR 24 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA . respectively. For BDes batch 2025, the highest and median package offered during Woxsen University placements 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 6.2 LPA . respectively. The BBA (Hons) batch 2025 achieved the highest package of INR 10 LPA and the median package of INR 7 LPA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Woxsen University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Woxsen’s ultra-modern campus sits on a sprawling 200 acre landscape, in a serene and pollution free environment in Hyderabad. Adorned with thoughtfully built indoor & outdoor spaces, the campus has been designed by renowned architects specialized in educational architecture. The living spaces at Woxsen are one of a kind, comparable to any ivy-league institution's student residential facilities. These hostels offer twin sharing and three sharing rooms for boys and girls in separate blocks. The university has a total of 1087 rooms in all the hostel blocks combined. Proper wifi services, water supply, air-conditioned (A/C) & non-air-conditioned rooms, 24/7 security staff, CCTV Surveillance available.

data: Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Gym, Shuttle Service, Labs

library.description: Heralding a new generation of self-learning centres in higher education, Woxsen University's brand-new Library and Self-Learning Facility- Vithal Gandhi Centre, provides students access to over 18,000 offline and 33000+ online resources. Built on an expansive 70,000 Sq. Ft., the state-of-the-art facility is perhaps one of the largest in India. The centre offers students, faculty, and staff unhindered access to internationally recognized books, journals, annual reports, market studies, reference titles, magazines, and newspapers. This vast collection covers a broad range of topics in management, design, architecture, technology and more. The library offers 10205 books with 18 Journals, 1500 Online Resources, and 500 Audio-Visual Materials. Subscription for leading Magazines, Newspapers & Journals. ICT based resources such as e-books, e-journals, databases. E-resources including JGate plus, Shodhganga, Shodhgangotri and NDL. Institutional Repository for thesis and dissertations. Automatic Book Circulation Kiosks.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Golf Course, Box Cricket Arena, Volleyball Court, Kabaddi Court, Croquet, Billiards Lounge, Foosball and Air Hockey, Chess Lounge, Carroms

cafeteria.description: Each of the 4 eateries on campus is distinct with menu offerings and ambience, from a sprawling cafeteria to a quaint coffee shop and a multi-cuisine restaurant, Woxsen has it all. To suit the taste pallet and personal choices, both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes are provided in the cafeteria. Special dietary requirements of students are also catered to the best of our capabilities provided the institution is informed in advance of the requirements.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Physics Lab, AI & Robotics Studio, Analytics & Behavioral Lab, Bloomberg Finance Lab, Digital Design Lab, Robotics Lab, Fashion Design Lab

reviews.review_heading: It offers good campus facilities and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi, programming and computing labs, projectors, and a smart board. The library has a large collection of textbooks and reference books. Regular housekeeping is done. The mess provides hygienic and balanced meals, with a rotating weekly menu. First-aid services are provided. It has indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Woxsen University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. Classrooms are interactive, and each class contains 58 students. The hostel and food are also really good. Sports facilities meet international standards, and the campus is full of hangout spots, especially the library, a student hotspot.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for teach researchers only
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is provided for every room and classroom. The library contains a minimum number of books on the teach field. The teach contains a large number of GPUs for faster processing and running of programs. The mess has very good food.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is peaceful, wonderful, world-class infrastructure, and greenery.
reviews.review_text:
- The whole campus is equipped with Wi-Fi
- 10th the largest Library
- Fully-furnished Classrooms
- Technical advanced Labs
- Good Food
- Spacious Hostel Room (2 per each room & 3 per each room)
- We have a General Store which almost all consists of the things we can buy
- We have a hospital for students
- We have sports arena and fields and Gyms.

reviews.review_heading: Good and safe environment.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure compared to other top-class universities. Good arena for sports to showcase our extracurricular activities. Hostels are so hygienic and clean, and they are so good to stay. Food in the canteen is also good. It's a good and peaceful environment to get a degree.

reviews.review_heading: Woxsen University - great infrastructure but not academics.
reviews.review_text: Woxsen is famous for its infrastructure, I feel it's not less than any foreign universities and 5-star hotels, everything, classrooms and hostels feel so rich. Every room has a separate Wi-Fi router and also has advanced AI and robotics labs. And the library is one of the richest and most attention-seeking on the campus. Food is so good with multiple cuisines, and we also have a separate sports arena with a football and cricket stadium and courts of all sports possible.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied as value for money.
reviews.review_text: We have awesome infrastructure. I would say it is one of the best in southern India. Facilities are tremendously good, including proper Wi-Fi connectivity and clean, distraction-free classrooms. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very good. We have a buffet system here, which means we can serve ourselves as much as we want. Medical facilities are good too. However, in emergencies, the university takes the patient to the nearest hospital for speed treatment. Sports and games are top-n...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and the quality is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure-related everything is good. The university provides us with good facilities. Libraries are good and provide good books for every subject, which helps us in our studies.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good place to pursue UG programmes of your interest.
reviews.review_text: World-class facilities are provided with very modern infrastructure. The food and quality is just like regular mess and we have 4 dineout spots in the campus which includes 2 cafeterias and 2 restaurants. All labs are equipped with adequate amount of equipment and technician to guide the students. The students are encouraged to learn technical skills by practically applying them in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus facilities, great infrastructure, great placement, and internships.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is included everywhere, in well-designed labs with full full-proof camera and a great library. Great facilities in a hostel, alternative cleaning days, good quality food, good medical facilities, and great grounds for sports and games, good opportunity for people.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the campus is in development and even the students.
reviews.review_text: The courses are great and no complaints about them. The food and accommodation are okay but for the money we pay here, it must be better than this. Labs are dedicated to each school and the total campus is full of Wi-Fi connectivity. Medical facilities are impressive.

reviews.review_heading: Woxsen is the best choice compared to other top universities in the country.
reviews.review_text: Coming to facilities and Woxsen's infrastructure, I can say they are top-notch, and no one will be disappointed compared to any other college in the country. Coming to food and facilities in the college, Woxsen has very good food and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really very good and strict college. I will highly recommend others who play sports.
reviews.review_text: In Woxsen University, the infrastructure is really very nice. Everywhere you can easily get Wi-Fi, and labs are also very advanced. Classes are also really good. Canteens are a very nice place to hang out. Hostels are really hygienic, and the food is too delicious. We have a very big sports area and very luxurious games.

reviews.review_heading: Exceptional placements and industry connections, complimented by strong infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is so amazing and beautiful. The library and the material and books are so amazing. Classroom facilities and faculty members are also amazing. Wi-Fi facilities are there in college. Mess food is also good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members, facilities, food need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the facilities need to be improved. There are times when water doesn't come in the washrooms, and being a girl, it's really difficult to deal with this. The library is very good, and a person who is willing to learn can make good use of it. The facilities of the hostel are not very good, but I feel like the new wardens are kind of good. At times, water isn't available in the hostels. The quality of the food in the mess is very bad. I lost all my mus...

college_info.intro:
Rayat Bahra University comprises more than 10 departments, including Enginnering & Technology, Managemnet Studies, Political Science, Computing, Education, and others. The affialited colleges and departments of the university offer a wide range of courses at UG, PG, diploma, certificate and PhD courses across various streams. BTech, BSc and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the university.
Rayat Bahra University Mohali offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programe offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of CSE, Mechanical, Automobile, ECE, Mechatronics, Civil, Biomedical, Aerospace, and others. The MBA course offered by the RBU Mohali is a two-year programme. It is offered is several specialisations, including Health Care Management, Finance, HR, Digital Marketing, Fashion Managemnet, and others. Below mentioned are the Rayat Bahra University popular programmes:

reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good in this university, as various developments are going on

review_content.Placements: Approximately 62% of students from the B.Tech batch were placed through on-campus recruitment drives, though according to student reviews, the effective placement rate is estimated to be around 80-90%, the highest package is 25 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 4 to 4.5 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Amazon, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, HCL, etc.; additionally, approximately 90% of students got internships from our course at Infosys, TCS, etc.; and we offer roles like software developing engineer, full-stack engineer, data analyst, and QA tester.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: According to me, it is an average college, not that much bad or good but just a mix of it.

review_content.Placements: The placement is good here but from what I've seen in my course the students prefer to go for further studies. The average package as mentioned by the university on their website for pharma is 4 LPA. The recruiting companies in our department are comparatively better than the other departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The whole university is smaller than you expect but they are renovating the building regularly and about the classrooms and library, they both are good the only issue with them is, even though they've given free Wi-Fi, it doesn't work all the time and the speed is slow. The hostel I've heard is not the best but not the worst too, the food in the mess is average. Canteens and shops have great value. The sports facility is only available after the class hours that is after 4:30 pm.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is an amazing university. The college provides good placements for doctors and engineers.

review_content.Placements: I am going to complete my first year this month and I have learned more than I thought. My seniors got the actual placement which they didn't expect. It's great to be in this university. 93% of students got placements in the course. They got internships in different hospitals actually. My university has its hospital so most students join there for internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a separate laboratory for each subject. We have an anatomy subject and for that, we have a good lab with good equipment. The hostel quality is extraordinary. The food is almost good but as you can understand hostel food is hostel food it can't taste like home food but it is good, healthy, and hygienic.

review_summary.college_name: Rayat Bahra University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Rayat Bahra University: An overview of academic structure and student development.

content.Placements: Placement rates tend to be decent, but average packages often align with overall university states. MBA / Management: Often slightly higher average packages in some reports. Pharmacy & specialized Streams: variable, often linked to industry internships.
content.Infrastructure: Separate hostels for boys and girls are available on campus, designed to give a safe and comfortable home-away-from-home for students. Rayat Bahra University's every hostel includes common rooms, activity areas, dining/mess hall, reading rooms, and canteen access. Rayat Bahra University facilities typically include hot water in winter, Wi-Fi internet, security, and power supply.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The amount of fees they charge does not justify the services they provide. Not recommended.

content.Placements: Not all courses provide placement opportunities, but courses like MBA, B.Tech, and others do provide placement opportunities in MNCs. The average package goes in lacs. For an internship, the college does not assist. B.Sc. students do not have any placement opportunities. Only a few students get internships, and also not many, approximately around 60 percent only.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are clean and well-made. There are good labs with proper equipment, proper boards and screens for study purposes, but there are no Wi-Fi or AC facilities. The library is good and spacious, but it does not have books from all courses, so you have to submit an application to request books, and you will do so. The hostel facilities are not good. Most of the rooms have fungus growing on the walls, there is no proper ventilation, the bathrooms are not properly cleaned, and the food is average as well. Hostel not recommended. The canteens are good, and there are different outlets providing food at reasonable prices.

individual_reviews.title: According to me, it is an average college, not that much bad or good but just a mix of it.

content.Placements: The placement is good here but from what I've seen in my course the students prefer to go for further studies. The average package as mentioned by the university on their website for pharma is 4 LPA. The recruiting companies in our department are comparatively better than the other departments.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The whole university is smaller than you expect but they are renovating the building regularly and about the classrooms and library, they both are good the only issue with them is, even though they've given free Wi-Fi, it doesn't work all the time and the speed is slow. The hostel I've heard is not the best but not the worst too, the food in the mess is average. Canteens and shops have great value. The sports facility is only available after the class hours that is after 4:30 pm.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing university. The college provides good placements for doctors and engineers.

content.Placements: I am going to complete my first year this month and I have learned more than I thought. My seniors got the actual placement which they didn't expect. It's great to be in this university. 93% of students got placements in the course. They got internships in different hospitals actually. My university has its hospital so most students join there for internship.
content.Infrastructure: We have a separate laboratory for each subject. We have an anatomy subject and for that, we have a good lab with good equipment. The hostel quality is extraordinary. The food is almost good but as you can understand hostel food is hostel food it can't taste like home food but it is good, healthy, and hygienic.

placement_report.college_name: Rayat Bahra University Placements 2025: Highest, Average Salary Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: Rayat Bahra University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Rayat Bhara University has ended its placement season for 2025. As per the official website the highest package given to the students during Rayat Bahra University placements 2025 was INR 1.25 Crore per annum . While, the average package for the top 25% stood at INR 9.25 LPA. Further, 50,000 jobs have been offered at Rayat Bahra University by over 1,175 recruiters that visited the campus for placements.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing BPharm from Rayat Bahra University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can seek various government job roles after completing the BPharm degree from Rayat Bahra University. Graudates can pursue roles within the central and state government sectors. Moreover, the health sector does require more workers in both government and private field. Some of the gov. job roles are: Pharmacist in Government Hospitals Drug Inspector Drug Analyst in Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation Pharmacist in Defense Services For pursuing these job roles BPharm graduates are required to clear specific government exams or meet experience requirements for some of these roles.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Sc from Rayat Bahra University?
faqs.answer: Candidates can get government job opportunities after completing the BSc course from Rayat Bahra University. The university offers several specialisations in the BSc courses, so the gov. job roles depend on the BSc specialisations students choose. Check out the different jobs available according to the offered specialisations: After completing BSc Optometry from Rayat Bahra University, candidates can apply for jobs in the public sector, such as ophthalmologist's assistant or optometrist. After completing the BSc in Medical Lab Technology degree, candidates can work in health care sectors and get various job roles, such as senior technical officer, chief technical officer, medical laboratory scientist, laboratory manager, lab supervisor, medical representative, etc. After completing a BSc in Chemistry, Biochemistry, and Statistics candidates can appear for competitive exams, such as SSC CGL, RRB, and FCI, etc.
