reviews.review_heading: Rayat Bahra University: An overview of academic structure and student development.
reviews.review_text: Separate hostels for boys and girls are available on campus, designed to give a safe and comfortable home-away-from-home for students. Rayat Bahra University's every hostel includes common rooms, activity areas, dining/mess hall, reading rooms, and canteen access. Rayat Bahra University facilities typically include hot water in winter, Wi-Fi internet, security, and power supply.

reviews.review_heading: The amount of fees they charge does not justify the services they provide. Not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are clean and well-made. There are good labs with proper equipment, proper boards and screens for study purposes, but there are no Wi-Fi or AC facilities. The library is good and spacious, but it does not have books from all courses, so you have to submit an application to request books, and you will do so. The hostel facilities are not good. Most of the rooms have fungus growing on the walls, there is no proper ventilation, the bathrooms are not properly cleaned, and the food is ...

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good in this university, as various developments are going on
reviews.review_text: Department of Computer Science and Engineering of Rayat Bahra University is well-equipped to meet the academic and technical needs of students. The campus offers high-speed Wi-Fi internet, where labs are equipped with updated software and high-performance systems. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with an enhanced learning system.

reviews.review_heading: According to me, it is an average college, not that much bad or good but just a mix of it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The whole university is smaller than you expect but they are renovating the building regularly and about the classrooms and library, they both are good the only issue with them is, even though they've given free Wi-Fi, it doesn't work all the time and the speed is slow. The hostel I've heard is not the best but not the worst too, the food in the mess is average. Canteens and shops have great value. The sports facility is only available after the class hours that is...

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing university. The college provides good placements for doctors and engineers.
reviews.review_text: We have a separate laboratory for each subject. We have an anatomy subject and for that, we have a good lab with good equipment. The hostel quality is extraordinary. The food is almost good but as you can understand hostel food is hostel food it can't taste like home food but it is good, healthy, and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Please don't take admission here your future will be spoiled.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as free Wi-Fi for everyone. Labs are also good and all the devices in the lab working properly. Library is so awesome as all the content you can get from the library. I'm a day scholar so I can't say anything about mess and hostel. Very poor in sports and spoiling all the athlete's lives.

reviews.review_heading: Almost 80% students are placed.
reviews.review_text: 100% satisfied, well-equipped classrooms, a well-stocked library, and functional computer and science labs. The university also provides Wi-Fi access. The university also provides well-equipped to support practical learning and research. The campus is best.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Clinical Embryology at Rayat Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities available here. Wi-Fi facility are also provided across the whole campus. Hostels are good too, and they also have Wi-Fi. Gym facilities are provided too. The mess food is good too. Classrooms are attached to labs, so you can have full hands-on experience.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rayat Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: There is a central library from where you can issue books for some time and you can sit there and study till 4:00 PM, if you are a day scholar and for hostel student it is open 24/7 and provided with Wi-Fi in library. Classrooms have infrastructure and sufficient space where approximately 35-40 students can sit properly. Now if we talk about hostel, good rooms are available in hostel but mess food is not worth it according to the payment we have made for mess.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with staff and resources provided at this university.
reviews.review_text: We have well-equipped classrooms, a well maintained library, computer labs, science labs, as well as Wi-Fi facility in this college. There is 20X7 access to library for the hostlers. The quality of food is also very good. There are 24*7 medical facilities available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure that has buildings classroom are well maintained and are comfortable for the better environment of students. Moreover, there is no air-conditioner so in summer it is difficult to study in classrooms due to excessive heat. Rather than this, everything is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Great BCA course and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our BCA department has modern computer labs, WiFi, spacious classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, and the mess offers hygienic food. Medical support is available on campus, and there are good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: University is good but the hostel is not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The campus is tidy and green with lots of trees and parks. The classes have windows and are well ventilated with enough space to accommodate a good amount of students in one class. However, hostel facilities are lacking. They take 55,000 from us per semester, and the room is not even provided with basic facilities. The food in the hostel mess is another disaster. Not recommending hostels.

reviews.review_heading: I am a student, Rayat Bahra University heading towards my future and making it bright.
reviews.review_text: There are a large number of classrooms with great infrastructure. Each classroom is equipped with a projector for displaying the content of topics related to the syllabus, which helps students in smart, easy, and efficient learning.

reviews.review_heading: Very Much Satisfied with the Campus
reviews.review_text: The complete campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the hostel also has Wi-Fi facilities. For day scholars, the library is open until 4:30 PM (Mon-Fri), but hostelers get access to the library 24/7. It has all labs for medical and non-medical courses, as well as for HM courses and other courses too. The food quality is average, and there is a hospital from the Bhara group nearby. Various games and grounds are also available on campus.

data.description: Rayat Bahra University was spread across 25 acres of area. The university has state-of-the-art infrastructure to the students. From the library to e-learning rooms, RBU comprises all the basic and modern amenities. Some of these facilities provided by RBU include labs, seminar rooms, a university convocation centre, hostels, a mess, a cafeteria, a sports complex, a convenience store, etc.

paragraphs: LU admission processincludes the application process, Entrance Test, announcement or merit list and fee payment. Candidates seeking admission to LU must visit the official website of the University. The step-wise admission process is given below:
1. Lucknow University Application Process 2026

The application process is carried out in online mode. Aspirants must fill in all the details in theLucknow University admission form 2026-26carefully. To apply successfully, candidates have to pay an application fee ofINR 800.
2. Appear for the Entrance Test

Once the registration has been completed successfully, Lucknow University will announce the schedule of the entrance test in the UG and in the PG programs.To get admission at LU, registered applicants will be required to take the entrance test.Applicants are required to download Lucknow University admit card to appear in the university-level entrances.
3. Announcement of Merit List

LU will publish the course-wise tentative merit lists based on the performance of the candidates in the entrance test.A list of candidates whose name has been included in the merit list would then attend the centralised counselling round.
4. Fee Payment & Confirmation of Admission
After the counselling round, the University will release the seat allocation list for final admission. Candidates selected must pay the tuition fees to confirm admission.

TheLucknow University feestructure for different courses varies with the specialisation and the affiliated college with which they are available. Lucknow University BTech admission is entirely entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission must visit the official website of the University to apply online.

faqs.question: How can I confirm my admission after the release of the Lucknow University merit list?

After fee submission, candidates are required to verify the required documents to confirm their seats for final admission at Lucknow University. courses_data.name: University of Lucknow MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Lucknow University offers a two-year full-time MBA programme, covering several specialisations. The course is also offered in a self-financed mode. Lucknow University MBA admission is completely entrance-based. Lucknow University's flagship MBA programme is being offered via the Institute of Management Sciences.Lucknow UniversityMBA admission is based on candidates' performance in theLucknow University Management Entrance Test (LUMET).

faqs.question: How much is the Lucknow University MBA fees?
faqs.answer: Lucknow University MBA fee will range between INR 1.3 lakh and INR 3.2 lakh. In addition to the fee mentioned here, an amount of INR 5,000 will have to be deposited as refundable caution money by all candidates at the time of admission. Also, students who graduated from Universities other than the University of Lucknow (including associated Colleges) have to deposit a one-time non-refundable enrollment fee of INR 500. The given fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the Eligibility of LLM Lucknow University?
faqs.answer: The University offers a two-year full-time LLM programme in the field of Law. Lucknow University LLM admission is based on an entrance test. faqs.question: Is Lucknow University under CUET?
faqs.answer: As per the official website of CUET, the University of Lucknow doesn't come under the Common University Entrance Test (CUET). However, the University of Lucknow offered lateral entry admission to the BPharm, MCA and BTech courses on the basis ofCUETmerit. Lucknow University admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate courses is based on University-level entrance exams, such as LUMET for Management course.

faqs.question: How does the counselling process work at Lucknow University?
faqs.answer: Once results are announced, students have to register for counselling on the Samarth portal via LURN. Steps involve choice filling, seat allotment, document verification, and payment of fees. Allocation of seats is done based on rank, preference, and reservation rules.

faqs.question: Is Lucknow University Entrance Exam tough for MBA admission?
faqs.answer: The Lucknow University Management Entrance Test (LUMET) will comprise of 100 objective-type questions to be answered in 90 minutes consisting of General Awareness, English Verbal Ability and Comprehension, Data Interpretation and Logical Reasoning and Quantitative Aptitude. The entrance exam for Lucknow University admission is not very difficult. However, aspirants must prepare for it well by practicing question papers and questions on the mentioned topics. placement_report.college_name: Lucknow University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Lucknow University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: University of Lucknow has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The University achived 81% placements in the academic year 2024-25. The highest and average package offered during University of Lucknow placements 2025 was INR 24.61 and INR 7.86 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Lucknow University in 2025 include ONGC, Sopra Steria, IBM, Deloitte, Infosys, CCD, MRF, etc.

Earlier, the average and median salary offered to the batch 2024 was INR 8.6 LPA and INR 8.3 LPA, respectively . The participating recruiters presented 2588 job offers to the students of the batch 2024.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Lucknow University?
faqs.answer: Lucknow University offers good placement annually. The University has achived 81% placements in the academic year 2024-25. The highest and average package secured by the batch 2025 was INR 24.61 and INR 7.86 LPA. Earlier, the participating recruiters presented 2588 job offers to the students of the batch 2024.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during Lucknow University placements?
faqs.answer: The Lucknow University highest package offered to the batch 2025 was same as it was offered to the batch 2024, which stood at INR 24.61 LPA. Earlier, the student of MSc Geology received the highest salary of INR 23.61 by ONGC.

faqs.question: What is median package offered during Lucknow University placements?
faqs.answer: The median package offered to the batch 2025 is yet to be released. The overall median package offered during Lucknow University placements 2024 was INR 8.3 LPA. Earlier, it was INR 14.4 LPA in 2023.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for BPharm Placements at Lucknow University?
faqs.answer: Lucknow University provides placements and intersnhip opportunities to BPharm and other course graduates. Some of the top recruiters for BPharm Placements at LU according to the information given on official website and reviews are: Healthcare Vitaana Lisa Woodco Pvt Ltd Hexaware Technologies CEDCOS Technologies Airdit Software Services Pvt Lt K P Relible Technique Pvt India IPG Technologies Woxen Digital Pvt Ltd Karvy Data Management Service Cancer Aid Society Sunpharma KRPL Cipla

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for MBA at Lucknow University?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the most popular course of the University of Lucknow. The MBA placement details are yet to released for the batch passed out in 2025. Overall, the University achived 81% placements in the academic year 2024-25. . The highest and average package offered was INR 24.61 and INR 7.86 LPA.

faqs.question: How much is the Lucknow University MBA fees?
faqs.answer: Lucknow University MBA fee will range between INR 1.3 lakh and INR 3.2 lakh. In addition to the fee mentioned here, an amount of INR 5,000 will have to be deposited as refundable caution money by all candidates at the time of admission. Also, students who graduated from Universities other than the University of Lucknow (including associated Colleges) have to deposit a one-time non-refundable enrollment fee of INR 500. The given fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the other fee components for MBA courses at Lucknow University?
faqs.answer: Apart from the tuition fee, there are multiple components in the total fee of the MBA course at Lucknow University. Check out those components with their amounts in the table below: Fee components Amount (for 1 - 2 years) Tuition INR 20,000 - INR 3.24 lakh Hostel INR 13,100 One-time Payment INR 5,500 Total fee INR 38,600 - INR 3.43 lakh The mentioned fee and seat intake are as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Is Lucknow University good in terms of placement?
faqs.answer: According to Shiksha ratings, University of Lucknow has been rated 3.3 out of 5 for placements. The highest package offered during the 2023 placement drives stood at INR 23.61 lacs. The top recruiters who visited the university were HCL, ICICI Bank, Bajaj, MRF, Paytm, and other reputed organizations. A rise of over 8% was seen in the UG 3-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022.

description: Lucknow University cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Lucknow University UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

Lucknow University JEE Main Cutoff 2025 will be reflected on this page soon. In the meantime, students can look at the JEE Main cutoff 2024 for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 129997 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 114850 in 2022.

University of Lucknow accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to the Lucknow University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.
Lucknow University CUET PG Cutoff 2025 results will soon be available in this section. Until then, candidates can refer to the table below to know the the Lucknow University CUET PG cutoff 2024.

Lucknow University accepts CUET PG scores for admission to the Master of Computer Applications (MCA). According to the Lucknow University MCA cutoff 2024, the last round cutoff score for General category students under the Home State quota was , and the Round 1 cutoff was for the same cate
Lucknow University MCA admission is based on candidates' CUET PG entrance exam performance. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table below to view the important CUET PG 2025 dates.

As the Lucknow University UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Lucknow University.
During last round B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering proved to be the toughest for this category, with the closing cutoff being .
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top two most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with the closing ranks of 449829 and 457543, respectively.

For admission to Lucknow University for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to University of Lucknow.

Students who want to know the UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for various rounds can refer to the table below. Candidates also have the option to view the cutoff data for the previous two years, i.e., 2024 and 2023. These cutoff lists can also be downloaded for later use.

Offered across one course namely, Mahir-e-Tib in Tahaffuzi-wa-Samaji Tib, the University of Lucknow offers admission based on AIAGPET scores and counselling. AACCC has released AIAPGET cutoff 2023 up to Round 4 i.e Stary Vacancy Round. As per cutoff 2023, the closing rank for Mahir-e-Tib in Tahaffuzi-wa-Samaji Tib is 3233. Candidates can check the AIAGPET cutoff for Lucknow University in the table below:

Students can refer to the table below to know the Lucknow University LUMET Cutoff 2024 for admission to various MBA course specialisations. In 2024, the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme admission had a cutoff of 196 for gender-neutral students under the All India category. For more information, see the table below:

LUACMAT, also known as Lucknow University Associated Colleges Management Admission Test, is conducted annually for admission to BBA, B.Com, B.Voc, BCA, and BJMC courses at the associated colleges of Lucknow University. As per Lucknow University UG cutoff 2024, the Round 1 score for top courses including BBA in Tourism was 24, for B.Sc. in Mathematics it was 2860, for Integrated LL.B. it was 4137, for Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) it was 85.5 and for Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.

For postgraduate courses, the University of Lucknow accepts PGET/ LUCSAT scores. As per the Lucknow University PG cutoff 2024, the scores ranged between 10.5 and 150, wherein the MVA in Stone Carving (115) was the most competitive as compared to other PG courses. In 2023, the last-round cutoff score for the same course stood at 115 which is comparatively less than the 2024 last-round cutoff score. The easiest course to get into Lucknow University was the Master of Travel and Tourism Management

The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Lucknow University rankings.

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Lucknow University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the Lucknow University's rankings in 'Overall' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Lucknow University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Lucknow University fell 1 rank to #98 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Law' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Lucknow University fell 6 ranks to #29 rank in the 'Law' category by the NIRF ranking.

In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Lucknow University fell 30 ranks to #781 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Lucknow University fell 4 ranks to #244 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good and value for money.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty and learning environment.

Hostel accommodation is available off-campus or in nearby PG. All classrooms are large and air-conditioned. The lecture rooms are equipped with AV systems and modern projectors. The built-in area includes classrooms, labs, and an auditorium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by National Post Graduate College - NPGCReviewed on 5 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good and affordable college for studies.
reviews.review_text: College is good and has green view. There is a nice environment with a huge crowd and a friendly nature. There are people surrounding with the same attitude and same nature of mind. There is fresh air on campus. It is all about the green environment. Our college initiates to plant more and more trees on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for my course. The faculty is very generous and helpful. The infrastructure is amazing.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were very good. The quality of food is the thing for which I have deducted 2 stars, but both medical and sports facilities were very good, and also there were annual sports tournaments, and we have a gymnasium too in university.

reviews.review_heading: Good facility, knowledgeable faculty, average placement, and quite good infrastructure.

The mess is there. There are all facilities like medical, etc. Sports and games are also organised among colleges and also among hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college. Placement was nice. Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of our college were top-notch. Labs were well-maintained and clear, or very useful for our practicals. Wi-Fi was not available for students. The classroom was clean and well-maintained. The library was very useful in our college life. I didn't live in a hostel during my college life, so I didn't describe it, but the food was awesome. I tried it many times. Medical facilities were very good. Sports period and ground were maintained, and sports material like cricket kit, basketball ...

highlights.summary:
Amrita School of Engineering, Bengaluru admissions 2026 are open. Candidates can apply online on the official website to apply for their desired programme.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru, popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech and MTech students are placed in top companies such as Atlassian, Cisco, Google, Microsoft, TCS, Cognizant, and others. BTech and MTech students can become Engineers or can go for other technical as well as non-technical streams. BTech students are taught Computational Physics, Discrete Mathematics, Technical Communication, and various other topics as per the chosen specialisation.
Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru, is one of the popular colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru courses and their respective eligibility and Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru fee:

As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered to the BTech  batch 2025 stood at INR 80.4 LPA and INR 9.08 LPA, respectively. Cisco, Microsoft, Amazon, Bosch, Arista, MC Kinsey were among the top recruiters.
faqs.question: What is the Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru placement truth? Does it offer good placement with great salaries?

faqs.question: Is JEE required for ASE, Coimbatore?

faqs.answer: A:    You can check your merit list on the official website of Amrita School of Engineering. Go to the website and enter your registration number, email and password then you will get your AEEE result.
faqs.question: How can I check my merit list in ASE, Coimbatore?

faqs.answer: A:    If you want to take admission in ASE, Coimbatore then you have a good rank in your JEE Mains of under 15 thousand rank or if you gave AEEE which is the entrance exam of ASE then also you have a good rank or marks. The cutoff for AEEE varies for the various categories of candidates, and it will vary for each of the four engineering school campuses under Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetam. However, the overall cutoff for AEEE is 159 - 194.5 marks.

reviews_list.review_title: Detailed and unfiltered review of Amrita University, Bangalore.

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent, but more than corporate placement opportunities, research and foreign exchange studies are better. Placements are good in CSE and CSE AI. The average is around 12–15 LPA, but they are lower in branches like Robotics and Mechanical.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good at Amrita University Bangalore. Rooms are large enough for four students, which does not make it difficult because rooms have enough space. The campus is located in Bangalore, so it is not as large as it is seen in movies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: You should prefer Amrita Bangalore for B.Tech.

review_content.Placements: Do not choose this college if your only goal is placements, because placements are average at Amrita. Computer Science and AI branches are getting the best placements, but the lower branches are struggling with it. Many top companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Microsoft, etc., visit the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good, and very spacious rooms are available. Each room is 4 sharing, but it doesn't cause any difficulty as the rooms are large enough. The infrastructure of the college is good enough, but it feels a little small but you have to keep in mind it is in Bangalore.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of Amrita Vishwa Vidya Peeth, Bengaluru.

review_content.Placements: I will really suggest joining two branches. If you are aiming for good placements, you should prefer branches like Computer Science, which has average of around 16 LPA, CSE, or artificial intelligence, or electrical and communication. Branches like mechanical placements are not that good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, cleanliness is maintained all around the campus, and hygiene is given top priority. Hostels are good and very clean, but the food is something I am struggling with, very little variety, and the taste is also bad. Cafeteria is there.

overview_faqs.question: How is life at Usha Martin University?
overview_faqs.answer: Usha Martin University (UMU) attracts students from all around the nation who are interested in pursuing academic goals. There isn't a dominant national, ethnic, or cultural group at UMU. Living in such a diverse environment develops students' maturity, understanding, and multicultural perspectives. Students discover amazing chances, diverse cultures, and long-lasting friendships here.

overview_faqs.question: Is Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru good?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru is good in terms of placements and infrastructure. Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru's course curriculum is credit-based and the college's syllabus is research and industry-oriented. Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru also organises various national and international conferences, seminars, workshops, colloquia, training programmes, contests, and others.

review_summary.college_name: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. Robotics and Artificial Intelligence (RAI) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty are good.

content.Placements: I will complete my B.Tech in 2029. Coming to jobs basically depends on us, somewhat top in Amrita to be top, so we must work hard for placement. Life is very hard, we have to fight until we succeed. Coming to my course is basically to gain more knowledge than packages.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is average even the canteen food is average. There is a rule that only cash system is in college canteen. College is good but coming to food I am really very unhappy. We have to struggle for 4 years, but other facilities are really good apart from food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good college with decent placements and supportive faculty

content.Placements: Placements in our college are above average. Around 65–70 percent of students get placed from our batch. The highest package is about 8 LPA, the average package is 3–4 LPA, and the lowest package is around 2 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, and Infosys visit the campus. The roles offered are mostly software and support-based.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good and useful for daily study. Classrooms are clean, labs have the required computers, and Wi-Fi works most of the time. The library is peaceful for self-study. Hostel rooms are okay. The food is average but manageable. Medical and sports facilities are available for students.

individual_reviews.title: Detailed and unfiltered review of Amrita University, Bangalore.

content.Placements: Placements are decent, but more than corporate placement opportunities, research and foreign exchange studies are better. Placements are good in CSE and CSE AI. The average is around 12–15 LPA, but they are lower in branches like Robotics and Mechanical.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good at Amrita University Bangalore. Rooms are large enough for four students, which does not make it difficult because rooms have enough space. The campus is located in Bangalore, so it is not as large as it is seen in movies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: You should prefer Amrita Bangalore for B.Tech.

content.Placements: Do not choose this college if your only goal is placements, because placements are average at Amrita. Computer Science and AI branches are getting the best placements, but the lower branches are struggling with it. Many top companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Microsoft, etc., visit the campus.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good, and very spacious rooms are available. Each room is 4 sharing, but it doesn't cause any difficulty as the rooms are large enough. The infrastructure of the college is good enough, but it feels a little small but you have to keep in mind it is in Bangalore.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of Amrita Vishwa Vidya Peeth, Bengaluru.

content.Placements: I will really suggest joining two branches. If you are aiming for good placements, you should prefer branches like Computer Science, which has average of around 16 LPA, CSE, or artificial intelligence, or electrical and communication. Branches like mechanical placements are not that good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, cleanliness is maintained all around the campus, and hygiene is given top priority. Hostels are good and very clean, but the food is something I am struggling with, very little variety, and the taste is also bad. Cafeteria is there.

admission_overview.title: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru admissions 2026 are open on the official website of the institute. Eligible candidates can fill the application forms online. Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru offers a range of courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Admission to courses at Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru admissions are entirely entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on their scores obtained in JEE Main/ AEEE for BTech and GATE for MTech, respectively.

eligibility_selection.title: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Amrita School of Engineering course admissions are mainly entrance-based. Students need to clear the qualifying exam along with the entrance exams scores. The institute accepts both national-level Engineering entrance tests in addition to conducting in-house entrance test. The table below covers some popular Amrita School of Engineering, Bengaluru courses along with their eligibility criteria: Course Name

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru admissions?

faqs.answer: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru accepts several entrance exams. For BTech, valid scores in JEE Main and AEEE are accepted Candidates willing to get admission to the M.Tech course must have valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as GATE.
faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru?

faqs.answer: If you want to take admission in ASE, Coimbatore then you have a good rank in your JEE Mains of under 15 thousand rank or if you gave AEEE which is the entrance exam of ASE then also you have a good rank or marks. The cutoff for AEEE varies for the various categories of candidates, and it will vary for each of the four engineering school campuses under Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetam. However, the overall cutoff for AEEE is 159 - 194.5 marks.
faqs.question: What is the rank required to get B.Tech. admission in ASE, Coimbatore?

faqs.answer: Yes, Amrita School of Engineering accept JEE Score Admission to B.Tech programs offered at Amrita School of Engineering – Amaravati, Amritapuri, Bengaluru, Chennai, Coimbatore, Nagercoil is based on the rank secured in Amrita Entrance Examination – Engineering 2024 or JEE Mains Percentile 2024.Admission to BTech Programmes offered at Amrita School of Engineering is through and based on the rank scored in JEE Main and AEEE. 70% of the seats are allotted via AEEE scores and the rest of the 30% of seats are filled based on JEE Main ranks.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Amrita School of Engineering has six hostels, 4 for boys and 2 for girls. The hostel has a holistic lifestyle with activities like yoga, sports and extra-curricular activities. Nutritious food is served in centrally located mess.

library.description: Amrita School of Engineering's library holds about 45,880 + Collection of which, 36,000 books,  3,101 CDs & DVD’s, 2000 Back Volumes of Journals, 2000 Project Reports, 109 Engineering Journals, 46 Management Journals, 31 Technical Magazines, 65 General Magazines and 2,500+ e-Journals, e-Magazines, Conference proceedings and 28 Dailies etc.. The Library is fully automated with LIBSOFT, an integrated Library Management Software with advanced search options. The OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue) & WEBOPAC system provides easy access to the database of books,  journals and e-resources. Central Library is a member of the Developing Library Network, New Delhi (DELNET-New Delhi). There are more than 4931 Institutions / Libraries covered under this network, which enables access to Inter-Library Loan services from other libraries all over India.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Table Tennis, Volleyball Court, Throw Ball

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is average even the canteen food is average. There is a rule that only cash system is in college canteen. College is good but coming to food I am really very unhappy. We have to struggle for 4 years, but other facilities are really good apart from food.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with decent placements and supportive faculty
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and useful for daily study. Classrooms are clean, labs have the required computers, and Wi-Fi works most of the time. The library is peaceful for self-study. Hostel rooms are okay. The food is average but manageable. Medical and sports facilities are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed and unfiltered review of Amrita University, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good at Amrita University Bangalore. Rooms are large enough for four students, which does not make it difficult because rooms have enough space. The campus is located in Bangalore, so it is not as large as it is seen in movies.

reviews.review_heading: You should prefer Amrita Bangalore for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, and very spacious rooms are available. Each room is 4 sharing, but it doesn't cause any difficulty as the rooms are large enough. The infrastructure of the college is good enough, but it feels a little small but you have to keep in mind it is in Bangalore.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Amrita Vishwa Vidya Peeth, Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, cleanliness is maintained all around the campus, and hygiene is given top priority. Hostels are good and very clean, but the food is something I am struggling with, very little variety, and the taste is also bad. Cafeteria is there.

reviews.review_heading: Amrita College Bangalore campus detailed review and insights.
reviews.review_text: First hostels are good and clean, hygiene is taken care of, and all cleaning is done daily. Now talking about the hostel campus, it is quite small, but you should keep in mind it is in Bangalore, so its quite good. If you like a large campus, go for the Amritapuri or Coimbatore campus.

reviews.review_heading: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Bangalore Campus Review
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good. Rooms are very spacious. Bangalore doesn’t need AC, so rooms do not have AC, but ventilation is proper. The campus is a bit smaller, but since there are fewer students, it doesn’t feel small. If a big campus attracts you, you can consider the Coimbatore campus, which is around 500 acres.

reviews.review_heading: Good lectures and teaching, but lacking in infrastructure and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available are average. The Wi-Fi speed is too slow at times, and the food is very minimal. The canteen's food availability is limited. The medical facilities are good. There are very few games available. If you are interested, you can play, but the ground is too small and insufficient for students. There is only 1 badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Students get a high package during placement.
reviews.review_text: The campus is so beautiful, and every facility is available. The classrooms are properly maintained, and the labs have many types of advanced equipment. A well-stocked library is present with various books. The sports facilities are great, and students play after the end of classes. Medical facilities are available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching but bad food.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, hostels, and also at the library. The quality of food is not as good as expected, and no non-veg is available. Sports and games are very limited but okay, average. The first-year hostels are good, but the second-year hostels are not so good, and we have to clean our rooms. Also, there are no attached bathrooms.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: Amirta Vishwa Vidhyapeetham provides decent infrastructure with good labs and classrooms, though the hostel and mess facilities have room for improvement. The faculty are generally helpful, and the curriculum is considered relevant, with exams being challenging but fair.

reviews.review_heading: A review of my experience at Amrita School of Engineering, Bangalore campus.
reviews.review_text: Features available in my department were quite functional. We had Wi-Fi facility with an approximate speed of 2 MBPS. Various labs were also provided to facilitate hands-on experiential learning and testing. Although there was no air conditioning, the department had a continuous electricity supply there for 24/7. In the hostel, students were allotted four-sharing rooms, each with a personal cupboard for individual storage. Wi-Fi access was provided, and dedicated study rooms were available with ...

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and disciplined environment, but strict rules and average hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: In college, we have good Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a large library with updated books every month. Our campus features a big cricket ground, a badminton court, and a football field. We also have an excellent sports coach. In the hostel, there are two reading halls with good Wi-Fi, a gym, and a basketball court, all surrounded by plenty of trees. We have separate hygienic washrooms and a clinic that operates 24/7. The canteen offers delicious food, and there is a general st...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure including a library, good classrooms, and labs. The Wi-Fi connection is also in good condition. Our hostel rooms are good enough, but the food is horrible. However, the canteen food is good as compared to hostel food. Many games and sports are conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham- Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is medium; it isn't so high-five college; it has all the basic amenities; we have Wi-Fi; it works well in the labs and classrooms as well as in the hostel. Coming to the library, most of the books suggested by our lecturers are available, and even if they are not available, if we ask the librarian, they will provide us with e-book access. Our classroom has blackboards, white screens, and a projector common to all the classrooms. Now they have renovated half of t...

college_info.college_name: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru provides Student Financial Aid and Scholarships. These scholarships are based on economic need, merit, equal opportunity, and also affirmative actions for socially backward groups. The scholarship policy does not discriminate against students or even scholars based on gender, gender preference, caste, age, faith, or even disability. Below is the summary of the criteria that play a crucial role in making the scholarship decisions:

The university is greatly committed to affirmative actions for backward groups such as OBC, SC/ST, and other such groups that are approved by the Government of India. A certain percentage of such groups will always be receiving scholarships each year.

Top students in any of the schools are eligible for this scholarship consideration. To avail of and become eligible for the merit scholarship benefit, students must provide proof of academic and scholarly accomplishments. The percentile of students receiving this scholarship depends upon the school and area of specialisation.
The Special Disadvantaged groups include women, those with disabilities, and others. These groups are not treated with any discrimination and are afforded an equal opportunity for scholarship.
Scholarship Application Process

The students must contact the departmental office and submit the filled-out application form. The department will provide several students with a list of scholarship scheme options available for them. The students are responsible for submitting all the necessary documentation based on these scholarship schemes. Such documentation includes government-approved proofs for members of Backward communities, proof of merit, recommendation letters for merit scholarships, and any other necessary documentation for special disadvantaged groups.
Download the Amrita University Scholarships Brochure

Amrita School of Engineering Bengaluru under Amrita University awards various scholarships to students as financial assistance. The eligible students are awarded Amrita Chancellor’s Scholarships. The Amrita Chancellor’s Scholarships are offered to students according to their marks and admission interview performance. The below-mentioned is the criterion for Amrita scholarships:
Scholarships
Amrita Chancellor scholarship
100% tuition waiver
80% and above
Amrita Meritorious scholarship
50% tuition waiver

Note: The above-mentioned scholarships are applicable for undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD programmes. These scholarships are not applicable to programmes in the fields of Nursing, Pharmacy, and Allied Health Sciences.
The following clauses are communicated to students during the scholarship admission:

Amrita scholarships are awarded on a one-time renewable basis, for any single programme in an academic year. The scholarship is valid for a duration of one year and is renewable each and every year basis the student’s academic performance and also conduct

Scholarships commonly are tuition fee waivers only, and the amount of this waiver is based on the type of scholarship that is awarded to students. This is strictly non-negotiable and cannot be extended to any other fee categories or substituted in cash

The Scholarship Committee must set the evaluation criterion for cessation or renewal of the scholarship with applicable renewal conditions. The validity of a particular scholarship duration is based on the student's satisfactory academic performance in each and every trimester/ semester, regular class attendance as well as good standards of behavior throughout the course duration

The scholarships are awarded with the support of the academic transcripts that have been submitted by several students as part of the fulfillment of the eligibility criteria. Discrepancy in any of the supporting or even submitted documents will result in immediate withdrawal of the scholarship and/or the admission
Download the Amrita Scholarships Brochure

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering Guindy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements and faculty members.

content.Placements: Mostly, 80 percent of the students in Anna University Chennai got placements in good companies. The highest package is around 30 LPA to 40 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA to 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are TCS, Wipro, Accenture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Anna University Chennai is good, and laboratories and libraries are available. They provide separate hostels for both boys and girls with free Wi-Fi. Hostel food is not bad. Average in taste. They give importance to sports as well as studies.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Environmental Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I like hostel life more as college is strict.

content.Placements: The students from 3rd semester were eligible for placements. Companies like Toyota, EY, Micromax, Accenture, KPMG, Delliote, etc., will come to hire the freshers. The highest package offered was around 20 LPA, and the lowest package was around 4 LPA. The percentage of students getting placed was 70-80%. My plans after degree were to work for 5 years in an MNC.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was good enough to accommodate 2500 students including two colleges as we had two colleges under the same campus. Blocks were different but common facilities were shared be it library, canteens, sports ground, or the perpetual seminar halls. We had plenty at our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Industrial Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The pride in sharing the greatness of Asia's oldest college.

content.Placements: In our course last year, around 81% of students got placed. The remaining students opt for higher studies abroad. So the remaining students do not apply for placements. The students are being given an enormous number of opportunities for placements.
content.Infrastructure: It is the best infrastructure available among the government colleges. The standards and the fees that we pay are very different. Though the fee is low. The infrastructure is very good. The greenery of the trees within the campus gives a good feeling to stay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Industrial Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is a 10 for those who prefer exposure rather than infrastructure.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in IT companies and manufacturing companies, mechanical sectors as well. Remaining students focused on building their own company, and some of them are getting into higher studies. The highest package known to me was 18LPA, and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Companies like TATA, Hyundai, Mahindra, CATERPILLAR, etc. Roles offered are mechanical, automobile, manufacturing, management, data analytics, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available, but the maintenance is poor. Wi-Fi is available, but it lags sometimes. Medical facilities are good enough, and the food is also good. But there is no proper maintenance of restrooms and infrastructure. The canteen still doesn't have Epay, but it is still in development. Cleanliness is at its worst on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with nice campus and social life.

content.Placements: 26 LPA is the highest package and 5.6 LPA is the lowest, and 6 LPA is the average. Associate engineer is the position offered. Caterpillar recruits more freshers here 70% of students are placed/in internships. The exact numbers are not known off-campus students are like 10.
content.Infrastructure: The campus life is lot enjoyable. There are lot of space to spend time inside campus, like clubs. Architecture classes are quite good. You can have Wi-Fi access on laptops for free. A wide range of sports are available. Two canteens are available. Hostel and mess food is decent.

All these courses are offered across 10 distinct streams amongst which the flagship streams are Engineering and IT & Software.

This practical exposure makes students industry ready and broadens the horizon of job profiles that students can pursue. hostel.description: The campus has 16 hostels, housing for 3500 students. Each hostel block has the requisite facilities to take care of student needs. Hostel messes, located in large centralized halls, serve hygienic and nutritious meals at regular intervals.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Anna University Chennai is good, and laboratories and libraries are available. They provide separate hostels for both boys and girls with free Wi-Fi. Hostel food is not bad. Average in taste. They give importance to sports as well as studies.

reviews.review_heading: I like hostel life more as college is strict.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was good enough to accommodate 2500 students including two colleges as we had two colleges under the same campus. Blocks were different but common facilities were shared be it library, canteens, sports ground, or the perpetual seminar halls. We had plenty at our campus.

reviews.review_heading: The pride in sharing the greatness of Asia's oldest college.
reviews.review_text: It is the best infrastructure available among the government colleges. The standards and the fees that we pay are very different. Though the fee is low. The infrastructure is very good. The greenery of the trees within the campus gives a good feeling to stay.

reviews.review_heading: My college is a 10 for those who prefer exposure rather than infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, but the maintenance is poor. Wi-Fi is available, but it lags sometimes. Medical facilities are good enough, and the food is also good. But there is no proper maintenance of restrooms and infrastructure. The canteen still doesn't have Epay, but it is still in development. Cleanliness is at its worst on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with nice campus and social life.
reviews.review_text: The campus life is lot enjoyable. There are lot of space to spend time inside campus, like clubs. Architecture classes are quite good. You can have Wi-Fi access on laptops for free. A wide range of sports are available. Two canteens are available. Hostel and mess food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: I highly recommend, it is good.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available for laptops, and the library is really good with sufficient books and infrastructure. Hostel infrastructure is good, but the taste of mess food is a con, especially lunch. It is really a good college for sports, PPL in ball badminton, hockey, and throw ball. Health facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anna University College, Chennai for M.E course.
reviews.review_text: The best quality of infrastructure and hostel facilities are also available. College department and hostel facilities include classrooms, lab, fast internet, garden, gym, lift elevator, etc. Canteen food is also good and many varieties of food are available.

reviews.review_heading: My experience of M.Sc. electronic media at Anna University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Anna University is good. University is well-managed for students. Labs are advanced. Library has more than 1 lakhs books and journals and full campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel is clean and well-managed. Mess has separate vegetarian and nonvegetarian food. So this is a better option for students who are vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education with strong placements and affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: For my course, they provide good infrastructure with high-speed network in Wi-Fi and data. It provides well-organized labs and wonderful Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan library which has more than 40,000 books. The canteen provides food 3 times a day with good quality and good taste.

reviews.review_heading: Anna University is well satisfied with placements and exploration.
reviews.review_text: All the students of the college are provided with Anna Wi-Fi. The speed of the Wi-Fi is quite enough for academics. There is a health centre inside the campus, which is open to all students, faculty members, etc. There is a huge library inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Anna University, Chennai in the year 2025 admission in M.Tech course information.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the best facilities. They use high-quality infrastructure, products, and materials. This college provides facilities like classrooms, labs, benches, a library, fans, bathrooms, computers, etc. Facilities are available. This college has a canteen. Its food is very tasty and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Good exposure and campus.
reviews.review_text: The department has working labs and classrooms. There is a common library for all students within and outside the nearby campus. You cannot connect to data on your mobile within the department, but they will provide students with Wi-Fi that can be registered with your laptop. The quality of food is subpar in the international hostel. It is very repetitive. Housekeeping is prompt. The medical center closes by 5 pm, so in case of emergency, you have to visit Malar hospital nearby. Sports culture i...

reviews.review_heading: Vibrant Campus Life at CEG.
reviews.review_text: Even though our college is 200 years old, all the infrastructure is present and is very much available for students. But, we may not have a mobile network on the college campus. But there is Wi-Fi present all around the campus so it is very much helpful. Labs have very high facilities like the computers software required are very much pre-installed and ready to use. Hostels are affordable and manageable but still a bit of improvement is required.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, nothing negative as such.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure that is provided to us in our course is that we have access to Wi-Fi 24/7, labs, and also audio-video classrooms. The quality of the facilities that are provided to us in our hostel is really good, and the medical facilities are also really great.

reviews.review_heading: The best university with many facilities.
reviews.review_text: College facilities were good at our university. The infrastructure is very attractive. Our course provides Wi-Fi and a library that has books on all fields. The food quality in the mess is good. The hostel facilities are also good. Many sports events were conducted.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about College of Engineering, Anna University

likes.text: Companies like Amazon, Adobe, Standard Charterer, Trilogy Innovation, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visit our college for placements.
Our college provides its best to encourage and enhance the placement facilities to the students.

highlights.summary: Shiv Nadar University admissions 2025 are open for UG and PG courses. Interested students can visit the official website of the university to apply for the desired programme. A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
The Shiv Nadar University Chennai popular programmes are its BTech and BSc courses. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Ernst & Young, Deloitte, HCL Tech, etc. SNU Chennai BTech programme emphasises various practical skills and hands-on learning experiences. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, Data Engineers, and others. On the other hand, BSc is offered for 3 years at the UG level. SNU Chennai BSc is provided in Economics, Data Science, and Finance specialisations.
These programmes have been recognised by the UGC and approved by the AICTE.
To get admission to the BTech and BSc courses, candidates must qualify for an entrance exam. Also, the Shiv Nadar University Chennai fee structure consists of tuition fees, security deposit, admission fees, etc. with the SNU Chennai fees for BTech and BSc being INR 12 Lakhs and INR 7.5 Lakhs, respectively without any miscellanious fees. Below are the Shiv Nadar University Chennai popular courses, along with their fees:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shiv Nadar University Chennai offers UG and PG courses to students. SNU Chennai courses are extended across the streams of Commerce, Engineering, etc. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BCom, BSc, and various other courses. At the PG level, SNU Chennai provides MTech courses to students. Shiv Nadar Chennai also offers PhD programmes to students. These programmes are offered in full-time mode.

faqs.answer: A:    Out of SNU Chennai, Loyola College Chennai, and Madras Christian College. Loyola College has the most affordable tuition fee among BCom colleges in Chennai. The total fee to pursue BCom at Loyola College is INR 47,900 – 2.5 lakh depending on the specialisation chosen.If we look at the total fee of Madras Christian College and SNU Chennai the total fee is INR 83,760 and INR 7.97 lakh, respectively. Thus the total fee of both the colleges is much higher than Loyola College Chennai.
faqs.question: Which is the most affordable BCom college out of SNU Chennai, Loyola College Chennai, and Madras Christian College?

faqs.answer: A:    SNU Chennai BCom fees is INR 7.97 lakhs and a refundable caution deposit of INR 20,000. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay the fee, which ranges from INR 98,000 to INR 2.32 lakh, depending on the type of accommodation.The course fee is a little higher in comparison to other private universities. However, the university provide good placements support as well. Hence, the course return on investment is good.
faqs.question: Is BCom at SNU Chennai expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    SNUC BSc Fees 2026 includes various components. The total fees of SNU Chennai for the BSc programme is INR 7.5 lakh. It is inclusive of the refundable caution deposit of INR 20,000, a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,500 and an admission fee of INR 20,000.The candidate will also have to pay additional charges if they are availing hostel and transportation from the campus. The hostel fees costs around INR 2.62 Lacs depending on the type of accommodation chosen.

reviews_list.review_title: A authenticate review of Shiv Nadar University Chennai.

review_content.Placements: Around 60 to 70% of students were placed in Shiv Nadar University Chennai. In the aid branch, most of the students got placed with the highest package last year by Paypal of 1.2 crores. The highest package as of now is 1.2 CPA. The average is 7.5 LPA. The lowest as of now is 6.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our course are Wipro, Paypal, and Mahindra. Top roles offered are security architect, etc. Around 70% of students got internships from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. There are 3 academic blocks for the courses in our college with AC-equipped classrooms for each department and Wi-Fi connection is very fast and secured. There is also a library in our college with around 600+ books available. The quality of the hostel is quite average but the buildings are amazing. The quality of food available in the mess is not up to the mark. There are 2 types of messes in our college, premium and undergraduate messes. Also, there is 1 main canteen and 1 clinic in our college.

review_content.Placements: You can't really say too much about the placements at SNUC because no one's actually been placed yet. However, if it's anything like SSN's placements ( which is what they've promised ) then it would definitely have to be considered one of the better universities in Tamil Nadu.
review_content.Infrastructure: There's no doubt that the infrastructure is first class. You get good Wi-Fi in most places the labs are well-equipped, so are the classes. The academics blocks are neat and it shouldn't go unnoticed that restrooms (in AB 1 are super clean ). The sports facilities are more than adequate and even if you're a day scholar you still get the chance to use them. However, the canteen isn't the most hygienic you'll SEE.

review_summary.college_name: Shiv Nadar University Chennai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, neat and clean campus, good placements.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are Motorq, Google, Amazon, PayPal, and other companies. Roles offered are web developer, SDE, and data scientist. The highest package is upto 1 crore per annum which depends on the skills and projects done by the student. Seniors from my university got internships at Google and PayPal.
content.Infrastructure: Air-conditioned classrooms, library, and labs are available. We have neat and Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The quality of food is decent in the hostel. They provide facilities to cook, iron clothes, common room for reading, etc. There is a women's fitness gym for free in the hostel. Also, we have badminton court, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I face challenges, but I get admission into this college.

content.Placements: Since this is the first year of college, and the first batch went out, placements are okay, and they will increase in the upcoming years. This college will become one of the top colleges in Tamil Nadu. It may take time, but it will grow and become a strong competitor to SSN College, which is generally its sister college.
content.Infrastructure: The course infrastructure is very good. The hostel infrastructure is not so good, and the hostel cleaning is not very effective. The college maintenance is very good. The food quality is very poor, and we sometimes find houseflies and insects in the food while eating. The food quality is also very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A authenticate review of Shiv Nadar University Chennai.

content.Placements: Around 60 to 70% of students were placed in Shiv Nadar University Chennai. In the aid branch, most of the students got placed with the highest package last year by Paypal of 1.2 crores. The highest package as of now is 1.2 CPA. The average is 7.5 LPA. The lowest as of now is 6.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our course are Wipro, Paypal, and Mahindra. Top roles offered are security architect, etc. Around 70% of students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. There are 3 academic blocks for the courses in our college with AC-equipped classrooms for each department and Wi-Fi connection is very fast and secured. There is also a library in our college with around 600+ books available. The quality of the hostel is quite average but the buildings are amazing. The quality of food available in the mess is not up to the mark. There are 2 types of messes in our college, premium and undergraduate messes. Also, there is 1 main canteen and 1 clinic in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering with Internet of Things - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: SNUC - A first year's Review.

content.Placements: You can't really say too much about the placements at SNUC because no one's actually been placed yet. However, if it's anything like SSN's placements ( which is what they've promised ) then it would definitely have to be considered one of the better universities in Tamil Nadu.
content.Infrastructure: There's no doubt that the infrastructure is first class. You get good Wi-Fi in most places the labs are well-equipped, so are the classes. The academics blocks are neat and it shouldn't go unnoticed that restrooms (in AB 1 are super clean ). The sports facilities are more than adequate and even if you're a day scholar you still get the chance to use them. However, the canteen isn't the most hygienic you'll SEE.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering with Internet of Things - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the good faculty members, infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: As it is a new campus, official placements are not yet started. Compared to SSN College Chennai, placements are very good. Many top companies like Amazon, Facebook, Google, Microsoft, etc., are coming to the SSN campus, and the same recruiting companies come to SNU Chennai too.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are very good. Hostel rooms are very good, but the quality of the food available in the mess and canteen is average. Still, remaining all facilities like medical facilities, sports and games are very good.

paragraphs: Admission to all the courses at SNU Chennai is carried out as per well-defined criteria. Candidates who successfully go through all the admission rounds are granted a seat in the preferred course. The admission process involves the application process, entrance exam, personal interview, merit list release, and admission confirmation. Find below the stepwise explanation ofSNU Chennai admission process:
1: Application Process
To apply for SNU Chennai admission 2026, apply in an online mode. Along with that, pay an adequate amount of the application fee at the time of filling the application form.
2: Entrance Examination

Appear for SNUCEE. Take the respective entrance exam in order to be eligible for admission. The students are further shortlisted for the next admission round based on their scores in the entrance exam.
3: Personal Interview
Shortlisted candidates are interviewed by a panel of experts. The dates and information on the interview round are published on the SNU Chennai official website.
4: Release of Merit List & Admission Confirmation
After the selection rounds, a merit list is released for each course by the university. Selected students can confirm their seat in the course by paying the admission fees.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BCom at SNU Chennai?

faqs.question: Can I take multiple attempts for SNUCEE exam?

Check the following table for a detailed process aroundSNU Chennai PhD admission:

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for PhD at SNU Chennai?
faqs.answer: SNU Chennai PhD admissions are entrance-based. The university conducts an in-house entrance exam for the selection of right candidates to its PhD course. There is no other entrance exam acceptable for the admission. Candidates have to apply and qualify for the exam with a valid score. Candidates who will secure a good rank in the respective exam will be called for PI round.

faqs.question: How to get admission to PhD at SNU Chennai?
faqs.answer: SNU Chennai PhD admissions are based on multiple selection parameters. In the beginning of the admission process, candidates are evaluated based on their past academic merit. Candidates must have a PG degree at the time of applying for the course. Further, the university conducts an in-house entrance exam/ written test for the selection of candidates. Futher, the final selection is based on the research proposal submisson and a PI round conducted by the university.

faqs.question: How to apply for PhD at SNU Chennai?
faqs.answer: SNU Chennai PhD registrations are completely online. Candidates need to apply for the university-level exam on the official website of SNU Chennai and fill an online application form with all the relevant details. Check out the step-wiseSNU Chennai PhD application processin the following section:Visit the official website of SNU Chennai and click on the 'APPLY NOW' tab on the Homepage.Register yourself using your e-mail ID and other details.Fill in the other required details in the application f

faqs.question: What is the highest salary at SNU Chennai?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Shiv Nadar University Chennai placement for BCom in 2024 stood at INR 6.4 LPA. Refer to the table to know the same:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2024)the highest PackageINR 6.4 LPA

faqs.question: How to get a seat in Shiv Nadar University Chennai?
faqs.answer: Admission to all the undergraduate and postgraduate courses at SNU Chennai is carried out as per well-defined and pre-planned criteria. Candidates who successfully go through all the admission rounds like interview rounds, group discussion rounds, and others are granted a seat in any of the desired courses. The admission process involves the entrance exam, application process, Personal Interview rounds, merit list releases, and at the end the admission confirmation. In this way, students can get a seat at Shiv Nadar University Chennai.

faqs.question: How to take admission at Shiv Nadar University Chennai?
faqs.answer: The mode of application for all the undergraduate and postgraduate courses is online, and admission is entrance exam-based or merit-based. The university conducts Shiv Nadar University Chennai Entrance Examination SNUCEE followed by a Personal Interview round on the basis of which admission to mostly all the courses (Except Ph.D. is done. A group discussion round is also conducted. For Ph.D. SNU Chennai Ph.D. Entrance Exam is conducted and the final selection is done on the basis of entrance exam scores, PG Degree aggregate, Research Proposal, and performance in the interview round.

faqs.question: Can students get direct admission at Shiv Nadar University Chennai?
faqs.answer: No, admissions are through entrance exam scores only. The mode of application for all the courses is online, and admission is entrance exam-based or merit-based. The university conducts Shiv Nadar University Chennai Entrance Examination SNUCEE followed by a Personal Interview PI round. The accepted entrance exams are TNEA, GATE, SNUCEE, and others. So apply as the seats are limited and the competition is quite high.

faqs.question: How much percentage is required for admission to various courses at Shiv Nadar University Chennai?
faqs.answer: The percentage required for admission to various courses depends on the course selected by the students. For the undergraduate courses Class 12 with a minimum of 45%-75% aggregate is accepted by the university along with the various entrance exam scores. For postgraduate courses, a minimum of 60% aggregate in graduation is accepted by the university. The accepted entrance exams for admission to various courses isGATE,TNEA, and others. The top recruiters were Ernst & Young, Deloitte, HCL Tech , etc. SNU placement team helps students find their jobs by helping with resume building, interview preparation, and employer networking. There are events, such as industry talks, hackathons, and internships to give students real-world experience for support. The placement training helps in understanding job market, covering areas such as aptitude tests, technical skills, and resume writing, along with mock interviews and networking chances.
