hostel_campus.college_name: Shiv Nadar University Chennai Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, neat and clean campus, good placements.
reviews.review_text: Air-conditioned classrooms, library, and labs are available. We have neat and Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The quality of food is decent in the hostel. They provide facilities to cook, iron clothes, common room for reading, etc. There is a women's fitness gym for free in the hostel. Also, we have badminton court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I face challenges, but I get admission into this college.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is very good. The hostel infrastructure is not so good, and the hostel cleaning is not very effective. The college maintenance is very good. The food quality is very poor, and we sometimes find houseflies and insects in the food while eating. The food quality is also very bad.

reviews.review_heading: A authenticate review of Shiv Nadar University Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are 3 academic blocks for the courses in our college with AC-equipped classrooms for each department and Wi-Fi connection is very fast and secured. There is also a library in our college with around 600+ books available. The quality of the hostel is quite average but the buildings are amazing. The quality of food available in the mess is not up to the mark. There are 2 types of messes in our college, premium and undergraduate messes. Also, there is 1 main cantee...

reviews.review_heading: SNUC - A first year's Review.
reviews.review_text: There's no doubt that the infrastructure is first class. You get good Wi-Fi in most places the labs are well-equipped, so are the classes. The academics blocks are neat and it shouldn't go unnoticed that restrooms (in AB 1 are super clean ). The sports facilities are more than adequate and even if you're a day scholar you still get the chance to use them. However, the canteen isn't the most hygienic you'll SEE.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good faculty members, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are very good. Hostel rooms are very good, but the quality of the food available in the mess and canteen is average. Still, remaining all facilities like medical facilities, sports and games are very good.

reviews.review_heading: For now, SNUC is a subset of SSN. The campus is expanding. Available courses are invaluable.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good but restricted for social media except for WhatsApp. It is restricted for using games, video streaming apps, etc. Web browsing will work, and sites which seem productive will work. The food served is average and eatable. They serve 2 eggs a week apart from the available canteen. Sweet is served in place of egg if vegetarian is preferred. Chicken is served 3 times a week in low quantity. Some vegetarian variety dishes are replaced with vegetarian dishes. The food is not much good, b...

reviews.review_heading: I recommend everyone to join in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. When it comes to sports, we have maximum every kind of ground, indoor or outdoor. Everything on the campus is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are pretty good. Here the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc. are all very good. The hostel rooms are also good. But mess food provided in hostel and canteen are average and could be improved for its quality. The remaining facilities meant for medical, sports, and games are also really good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty and good placements
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are really very good. Hostel rooms are also good here but food in mess and canteen are of average quality. The rest of the facilities like medical facilities, sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The titles of the review are college and the placement rate.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure of the campus are highly proactive. Wi-Fi is available in labs classrooms and library. The facilities in the hostel are not so bad. The food available in the mess and canteen is not excellent but okay. Medical facilities are available at any time.

college_info.college_name: Shiv Nadar University Chennai Scholarship Details

paragraphs: In order to provide equal educational opportunities to students, SNU Chennai provides scholarships to Meritorious students from all backgrounds. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria predefined for a scholarship to avail it. The reward for each scholarship also varies. Further, the different types of scholarships offered by Shiv Nadar University, Chennai are mentioned below:
Download the Shiv Nadar University Chennai Scholarships Brochure
tables: As long as the students don't have any backlogs, the top ten rank holders of any State Board or Central Board of Examination at the Plus Two level are eligible to pursue UG programmes at Shiv Nadar University Chennai with tuition fees waived for the entire duration of the programme.
Students with good athletic credentials are given Sports Scholarships. These scholarships are typically available to students who have competed in events at the national and international levels.

This scholarship is valid for all the courses offered at the university. For freshers, the scholarship is awarded based on scores in SNUCEE. Additionally, seniors can get this scholarship based on marks secured in the preceding year's examinations.

First-generation students whose family's yearly income is less than three lakh rupees will receive scholarships every year based on Merit-cum-Means. If the recipient of the scholarship does not have any backlogs, 75% of the tuition fee will be waived.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Cardiac Care Technology.

review_content.Placements: Most placements are good in SRM 90% of students get selected in placements and we do internships both in SRM hospital and outside in our vacation. The highest salary is Rs. 65,000 and the lowest package is Rs. 20,000. Top hospitals offered vacancies for our course. The role offered in our course is cardiac care technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have AC classrooms and the infrastructure is also very good. We have separate labs for all subjects and the classrooms are also comfortable. The food in the mess is also good and the rooms are comfortable. We have 3 sharing and 6 sharing with AC and non-AC we have a hospital in the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Tiruchirappalli. I did B.Tech in Biotechnology.

review_content.Placements: Placements were average. Many opted for higher studies, and many of my friends pursued master's degrees. Those who got placed received a salary of 3-4 LPA. Not many people opted for placements. Only some did. Since this was a bachelor's course, not many were looking for good jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, certainly not really good, but quite okay. We had good classrooms with Wi-Fi all around the campus. Our hostel was good and neat, cleaned regularly. The mess food was quite average, so many students used to have lunch outside.

review_summary.college_name: SRM IST Trichy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physician Assistant - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A detailed view of the reality of college.

content.Placements: Hi, I'm doing a B.Sc. in Physician Assistant in Allied Health Science. It is a major course in paramedical. We can assist the doctor and serve the patient. Beyond this, if we learn more knowledge, we can achieve in the medical field. The average package in India is 20k per month, starting with no experience. Abroad, we can have 1.5 Lacs per month. For this course, an internship is provided in our hospital itself.
content.Infrastructure: Neat, good, vibrant hostel rooms. Good and silent situation to study. Nice food and caring wardens. AC facilities are also available. But sometimes the theatre is not working that well, issues will come, but asap they will fix it. Safe and secure environment. Hostel surrounded by green stress and ventilated areas.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has great staff members and infrastructure. Staffing and discipline have to be improved.

content.Placements: 30% of my seniors from the BBA course got placed with an average package of 1.8 LPA. Companies like VDart and Amazon hire students with roles like sales executive, team lead, HR, and management teams. From 1st year, it provides strong placement training from experienced staff members from outside.
content.Infrastructure: My favorite part of the college is its infrastructure. It has great ambience and facilities such as a gym, hotels, hangout spots, canteen, library, labs, playroom, etc. Every floor has its own Wi-Fi. The college's hostel food and rooms are very nice. It also follows strict hostel rules.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Cardiac Care Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Cardiac Care Technology.

content.Placements: Most placements are good in SRM 90% of students get selected in placements and we do internships both in SRM hospital and outside in our vacation. The highest salary is Rs. 65,000 and the lowest package is Rs. 20,000. Top hospitals offered vacancies for our course. The role offered in our course is cardiac care technician.
content.Infrastructure: We have AC classrooms and the infrastructure is also very good. We have separate labs for all subjects and the classrooms are also comfortable. The food in the mess is also good and the rooms are comfortable. We have 3 sharing and 6 sharing with AC and non-AC we have a hospital in the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Tiruchirappalli. I did B.Tech in Biotechnology.

content.Placements: Placements were average. Many opted for higher studies, and many of my friends pursued master's degrees. Those who got placed received a salary of 3-4 LPA. Not many people opted for placements. Only some did. Since this was a bachelor's course, not many were looking for good jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, certainly not really good, but quite okay. We had good classrooms with Wi-Fi all around the campus. Our hostel was good and neat, cleaned regularly. The mess food was quite average, so many students used to have lunch outside.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SRM has good infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: In our college, we get placements from many companies with good packages. Most of the students get placed during placements; only a few miss the opportunity. In percentage terms, more than 95% of students get placed in companies. SRM is good for placements.
content.Infrastructure: There are 2 types of rooms, one is 3-sharing and the other is 6-sharing. Each student has their own wardrobe and study place. There are also AC and non-AC rooms. The hostel also has Wi-Fi facilities. The food is very good, and there are alternatives available if we don't like the food.

admission_overview.title: SRM IST Trichy Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: SRM IST Trichy (Deemed-To-Be-University) admission is both merit and entrance-based. SRM Trichy (SRM IST Trichy) conducts SRMJEEE for admission to the BTech programme. Besides, it also accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main/ SAT for BTech admission. For all other courses, admissions are merit-based. SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Tiruchirappalli offers courses at UG, PG and diploma levels including BTech, BSc, MTech, MBA, etc. The mode of application for all the programmes at SRM University Trichy (SRM IST Trichy deemed-to-be university) is online.

SRM IST Course-Wise Eligibility

SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Tiruchirappalli admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts entrance exams for BTech. While for other courses, admissions are likely based on merit. Below are the topSRM IST Trichy coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
BCA/ BSc Computer Science/ BSc Information Technology/ Bachelor's degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent or,
BSc/ BCom/ BA with Mathematics at Class 12 and graduation level

SRM IST Trichy admission process includes multiple steps. Candidates can begin with registration followed by the selection process. Below is the step-wise SRM Trichy (SRM University Trichy) for IST admission process:
STEP 1: SRM IST Trichy Application Process 2025
Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the official website of the university. Aspirants must fill out the application form and upload documents.
STEP 2: Selection Process

SRM IST shortlists candidates based on merit in the last qualifying exam. For BTech, the university conducts SRMJEEE. SRM also accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main/ SAT for admission to BTech courses.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
After completion of the selection rounds, aspirants receive an offer letter. Selected candidates are required to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM IST Trichy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A detailed view of the reality of college.
reviews.review_text: Neat, good, vibrant hostel rooms. Good and silent situation to study. Nice food and caring wardens. AC facilities are also available. But sometimes the theatre is not working that well, issues will come, but asap they will fix it. Safe and secure environment. Hostel surrounded by green stress and ventilated areas.

reviews.review_heading: It has great staff members and infrastructure. Staffing and discipline have to be improved.
reviews.review_text: My favorite part of the college is its infrastructure. It has great ambience and facilities such as a gym, hotels, hangout spots, canteen, library, labs, playroom, etc. Every floor has its own Wi-Fi. The college's hostel food and rooms are very nice. It also follows strict hostel rules.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Cardiac Care Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have AC classrooms and the infrastructure is also very good. We have separate labs for all subjects and the classrooms are also comfortable. The food in the mess is also good and the rooms are comfortable. We have 3 sharing and 6 sharing with AC and non-AC we have a hospital in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Tiruchirappalli. I did B.Tech in Biotechnology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, certainly not really good, but quite okay. We had good classrooms with Wi-Fi all around the campus. Our hostel was good and neat, cleaned regularly. The mess food was quite average, so many students used to have lunch outside.

reviews.review_heading: SRM has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 types of rooms, one is 3-sharing and the other is 6-sharing. Each student has their own wardrobe and study place. There are also AC and non-AC rooms. The hostel also has Wi-Fi facilities. The food is very good, and there are alternatives available if we don't like the food.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty and we get to learn more things apart from studies.
reviews.review_text: As I am in the medical field, labs are too good, with equipment, and classrooms have a good atmosphere with AC. About the hostel, they have cameras for our safety, the food is good, and rooms are too spacious. We make more friends from different cultures, and if needed, AC rooms are also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied here.
reviews.review_text: Really good infrastructure and the hostel facilities are excellent. The campus is so clean. The restroom is twice a day. Classroom is fitted with digital smartboard, which helps us to learn in an advanced way. The hostel is so good. The food is very tasty and weekly thrice the non-veg will be provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: As the IST block was built recently, the classrooms are well-organized, clean, and equipped with proper furniture. All classrooms are air-conditioned. Event the hostel building is newly built and is good. It has also got a proper laundry, which is very useful.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and well-trained faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Air-conditioned classrooms, labs, and a digital library are provided by the college. There is a fully air-conditioned auditorium with a seating capacity of 1,500 students. Badminton, basketball, volleyball, and other sports courts are available. There is a hospital on campus for medical care. Our college provides well-maintained hostel rooms, but Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel. The hostel has both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. An indoor gymnasium is available in the hostel...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel quality is somewhat good and food quality needs to be improved. There should be more than one canteen, as the main one gets crowded during peak times. Wi-Fi facility is not so good. They don't give students access to college Wi-Fi. Overall lab facility and classroom facilities are very good. We can easily get access to lab. Classrooms are very spacious as well.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are top notch at SRM Trichy providing students with an ideal environment for learning and growth. Classrooms are well furnished ventilated and equipped with modern teaching and WiFi connectivity. Labs equipped with the latest equipment and technology.

reviews.review_heading: The campus and study is good in Trichy campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in the college is very good. The infrastructure available for my course is good. Faculty also having with high talents. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the college. And college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: SRM Tiruchirappalli campus is good, but there are no fests.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for your course are excellent. Wi-Fi is available on campus. Many types of laboratories are in our college, such as chemistry labs, physics labs, and workshops. The hostel is good to live.

reviews.review_heading: College is a good place to live and study.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are super. Classrooms are clean and air-conditioned. Gym facility is available in a hostel. Chemistry and Physics laboratories and workshops are available in our college. Hostel contains a hotel, and the quality of food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is great at SRM Tiruchirappalli Institute of Technology. Good placements are available.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course include departments with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Our campus classrooms are very good. Library is well-equipped, and there is also a central library. College mess is excellent. Medical facilities are also available.

college_info.college_name: SRM IST Trichy Scholarship Details

paragraphs: SRM Trichy provides various scholarships to students. The university offers Founder's Scholarship, SRM Merit Scholarship, Chancellor Constituency Scholarship, Employee Ward Scholarship, etc. Check below details for SRM Merit Scholarship:
SRM Merit Scholarship
Criteria: Candidates who have secured SRMJEEE Rank 101-500, as fixed for various Phases (I, II & III) in SRMJEE (UG/ campuses)
Prerequisites: Candidates must be eligible for admission to first-year BTech
